\- March 4, 2023 - Highlights from President Trump's Speech at CPAC 2023 **No Turning Back** **We Will Finish What We Started**
President Trump had a triumphant return to CPAC on Saturday night where he put forward the case both for his nomination and general election. Speaking to an enthusiastic crowd of conservative grassroots leaders, President Trump recalled all that was accomplished for the movement when he was President, and he laid out his vision for America when he returns to the White House.
Declaring that “I alone will not retreat,” President Trump reminded the crowd that he is the “only president in history who has ever taken on the entire corrupt establishment in Washington” and asserted that “anyone else will be intimidated, bought-off, blackmailed, or ripped to shreds.”
President Trump also said that while he faces relentless attacks, he is not the real target. The real target are the people he is standing up for.
_“Our enemies are desperate to stop us because they know that WE are the ONLY ONES who can stop THEM. They know that we CAN defeat them. They know that we WILL defeat them. But they’re not coming after me, they’re coming after YOU – and I’m just standing in their way.”_
_"In 2016, I declared, 'I am your voice.' Today I add: I am your warrior, I am your justice, and for those who have been wronged and betrayed, I am your retribution!"_
In vivid language, President Trump signaled at the outset of his speech what his supporters will get with him in a second term:
_“With you at my side, we will demolish the Deep State, we will expel the warmongers, we will drive out the globalists, we will cast out the Communists, we will throw off the political class that hates our country, we will beat the Democrats, we will rout the fake news media, we will expose and appropriately deal with the RINOS, we will evict Joe Biden from the White House, and we will liberate America from these villains and scoundrels ONCE AND FOR ALL.”_
In a rousing battle cry, he then made clear the stakes in 2024:
_“This is the final battle—they know it, I know it, YOU know it, everybody knows it. Either they win, or we win. And I promise you this: if you put me back in the White House, their reign will be OVER, and America will be a FREE NATION once again.”_
President Trump also underscored how he and his political movement have transformed the Republican party and that today there is no going back:
_“When we started on this journey, a journey like there has never been before, we had a Republican Party that was ruled by freaks, neo-cons, globalists, and open border zealots, and fools. But we are NEVER going back to the Party of Paul Ryan, Karl Rove, and Jeb Bush.....We are never going back to a country ruled by entrenched political dynasties in both parties, rotten special interests, China-loving politicians, and a militant left-wing news media that’s either frightened of telling the truth or is truly evil and bad—you never know which. We are not going back to this—Not now, not EVER.”_
President Trump recounted many of his administration’s achievements and how they have been reversed by the Biden administration, including standing up strong to China, not starting any new wars thanks to a policy of peace through strength, shutting down the illegal foreign invasion on the southern border and establishing the most secure border in history, and defending our heroes against the thugs tearing down statues and pushing Critical Race Theory in our institutions.
He went on to describe in great detail what he will do in a second term:
**War and Peace.** _“I am the only candidate who can make this promise: I will prevent World War Three.”_
**Border:** _“Three years ago, we had the safest border in the history of our country—and I will quickly do that again._
_“When I am back in the White House, the very first reconciliation bill I sign will be for a massive increase in border patrol, and a colossal increase in the number of ICE deportation officers.”_
_“Under my leadership, we will use all necessary state, local, federal, and military resources to carry out the largest domestic deportation operation in American History.”_
_“I will ask every state and federal agency to identify every known or suspected gang member in America, and every one of them that is here illegally, we will pick them up, and we will throw them out of our country, and there will be no questions asked.”_
_“To stop the flow of deadly drugs, it will be my policy to take down the cartels just as I took down the ISIS caliphate that everybody said was impossible to do.”_
**Law and Order:** _“In cities where there has been a complete breakdown of public safety, I will send in federal assets, including the National Guard, until law and order is restored.”_
**Homelessness:** _“I will end the scourge of homelessness taking over our cities and suburbs. We will take the homeless, drug addicted, and severely deranged, get them off our streets, and create Tent Cities, where we will get them the help they so clearly need.”_
**Eradicating Marxism from the Government.** _“On Day One, I will revoke Joe Biden’s crazy executive order installing Marxist Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion Czars in every federal agency, and I will immediately terminate all staffers hired to implement this agenda. I will urge Congress to create a restitution fund for Americans who have been unjustly discriminated against by these Biden policies. And we will ban all racial discrimination by the government.”_
**Champion of Parent’s Right.** _“I will fight for PARENTS’ RIGHTS, including universal school choice, and the direct election of school principals by the parents. If any principal is not getting the job done, the parents should be able to vote to fire them and select someone who will.”_
**Promoting Patriotic Education.** _“Continuing the work of the 1776 Commission, we will teach OUR values and promote OUR history and OUR traditions to our children.”_
**Protecting Our Youth.** _“I will revoke every Biden policy promoting the chemical castration and sexual mutilation of our youth—and ask Congress to send me a bill prohibiting child sexual mutilation in all 50 states.”_
**Protecting Women's Sports.** _“We will keep men out of women’s sports.”_
**Smashing the Censorship Cartel.** _“I will destroy the illegal censorship regime and bring back FREE SPEECH in America.”_
**America First Trade Policy:** _“I will create a true national trade policy like the kind that made America the world’s economic powerhouse.”_
**Total Independence from China.** _“Because economic security is national security, I will revoke China’s Most Favored Nation trade status. I will implement a 4-year plan to phase out all Chinese imports of essential goods and gain total independence from China._
**China Accountability for Virus.** _“And I will hold China financially accountable for unleashing the China Virus upon the world."_
**Withdraw from W.H.O.** _“I will again withdraw from the W.H.O.—which stands for “We Hide Outbreaks.”_
**Energy Independence.** _“Under my leadership, will regain energy independence, as we had three years ago.”_
**Term Limits.** _“I will fight for a Constitutional Amendment to impose term limits on members of Congress._
**Using All Lawful Tactics to Win Elections:** _“I will move heaven and earth to fully and finally secure our elections. Our goal will be one-day voting with only paper ballots. But until that day comes, Republicans must compete using every lawful means to win. That means swamping the left with mail-in votes, early-votes, and Election Day votes. Where we can’t get rid of drop boxes, we need them in every church and veteran center. And until we can eliminate ballot harvesting, we will become MASTERS at ballot harvesting—beating the Democrats at their own game, except we will do it LEGALLY._
**Bringing Forth a Quantum Leap in American Standard of Living.** _“It is not enough just to stop the forces tearing America DOWN—I want once again to build America UP. It is time to start talking about GREATNESS for our country again. Our objective will be a quantum leap in the American Standard of Living, especially for our young people.”_
_“We will hold a competition to build new Freedom Cities on the frontier to give countless Americans a new shot at home ownership and the American Dream.”_
_“I will challenge the governors of all 50 states to join me in a great beautification campaign. We will rename our schools and boulevards not after communists but after patriots. We will get rid of ugly buildings, and return to the magnificent classical style of Western Civilization."_
_“We will support Baby Bonuses for a new Baby Boom.”_
President Trump then concluded with an inspirational call to action for what he and his supporters will accomplish together:
_“WE WILL FINISH WHAT WE STARTED. We will cross the finish line. We will dismantle the Deep State. We will demolish woke tyranny and we will restore the American Republic to all its radiant glory.”_
|

**LIVE POLL: CHUCK GRASSLEY POLLING TEAM**
** _We need you to vote: it will only take 20 seconds or less._
**
A recent poll just came out with President Biden's approval rating: it is UNDERWATER at a near **RECORD LOW OF JUST 41%!!!**

But there is still a large portion of CONSERVATIVE Americans not accounted for! This includes **YOU, friend!**

SO - we are compiling more accurate data as the original polling team **DID NOT** account for **YOUR ANSWER**. So we are asking now:

**OFFICIAL REVISED POLL (as of March 2023):

subject: the GOP’s 𝐧𝐞𝐰 attack on D.C. Statehood >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:

name: Signature Requested (via DLCC.org)
subject: re: Louis DeJoy
body:
We’re gathering signatures from active Democrats in your area and across the country to sound the alarm on DeJoy | | |
---
| | **✍️Local Signatures Needed:** [Add your name to stand with grassroots Democrats calling for Louis DeJoy to be removed as Postmaster General →](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0gVmqLBk4ptk_P_GMRx-1TaMefmZ_oa_wLVAPHTW1kHrzkPXs7loaPZVLTU2WLsGsIQLc0eCFfdsYpKV7vpFHTD_jEwwPUmEpYmi5XtFNZSVQEjMe_vUOFB3DpdIpaMLezsCuivlu3dhS_SQ4Vw_rgvMbSmHHIJeG_y8qeoX_8UeqWAn0a3O5-t9DNIF5dqDK9vTVsl103A8Jo004_Dyjqq04rVAsg6oOiHmN04bnqZxqoZfciH9M1IAiXjaoZ2hhr0Uc_HCVI1oQKhabZ289yWSzuApvrK-gws1Mp3pPbDzzn2xOBcZAMFqLSUetGTx9T7U879qd79xZzj_Gbw2Pkc/3u9/lB6UBvw5SPC6H_oQjWtaYA/h0/UALYn6dcfYMwr_8xOEJAOTiktJ8r7Civ_TIAUrlJyyg)
* * *
**FIRST:** Under Trump, DeJoy sabotaged the USPS, slowing mail delivery by reducing the number of deliveries, sorting machines, and so much more – all before _millions_ of vote-by-mail ballots were cast in 2020! **THEN:** He announced plans to cut 50,000 postal worker jobs and shut down _hundreds_ of post offices – **these cuts could wreak havoc on vote-by-mail ahead of this year’s ultra-competitive elections in Virginia!** **NOW:** We’re gathering signatures from active Democrats in your area and across the country to sound the alarm on DeJoy’s failure as Postmaster General and call for his removal. name: Senator Scott
subject: America needs a plan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Peter,
---
For too long, Washington politicians have led America without a plan.

Congress is racking up _TRILLIONS_ in debt while our priorities as a country remain unclear.
_Enough is enough._ America needs a plan, and that’s why I released mine to [**RESCUE AMERICA.**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=a2ebb9f33dce43b6971cec215c9c9f05&_e=ei0Sh7Wdm5vbl8y7ma3wr0iVAL-4bzEFaOw4SWKPKWO-TtnXZJgcg5wBJToUszinM7SafW6NqMydSGZ7DpbzJc_HCr_McQJp0FUeFe80KwJJkW1CH1oRcl2MY2jg3EXf5dCaJ5TQMMJ_lTwiTJ8uBdjXOZ0clboDXKpAHjcHD5VUR1eb3VPAplMEajkt-U8KmXuwTvA913irmvsdk2A42HNC-MofsiKgJ-qeAQk8YiXeqaG9WA_ybkEi4qis1vKfrIFjTwGgr6MsL--I6FMk3nCp5KOOf7xTr8hyVe5qzcZt14kogg15AGZQ_Y2xuet3fkKmgCLhQi9zEsC5knRfeFhR2qTvauIuZED_JRt3G1nvRsTTBiUsy8RIXHMt2-c7)
But the truth is, I shouldn’t be the only one putting out a plan for America’s future, Peter.
In fact, I’d love to see leaders from both sides of the aisle come out with their own plans so we can debate them and find the solutions that are best for the American people.
But the truth is, they are too scared of the political backlash to take a stand and release a plan.
I’ve NEVER been afraid of what the Washington insiders have to say about me, and I know you aren’t either.
My plan has everyone talking, and the DC elites are bashing it at every chance they get.
**But the people who REALLY matter - patriots like you - are standing by our side. **
[**Join our team today to RESCUE AMERICA from the radical Left and create a bright future for our great country.**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=a2ebb9f33dce43b6971cec215c9c9f05&_e=ei0Sh7Wdm5vbl8y7ma3wr0iVAL-4bzEFaOw4SWKPKWO-TtnXZJgcg5wBJToUszinM7SafW6NqMydSGZ7DpbzJc_HCr_McQJp0FUeFe80KwJJkW1CH1oRcl2MY2jg3EXf5dCaJ5TQMMJ_lTwiTJ8uBdjXOZ0clboDXKpAHjcHD5VUR1eb3VPAplMEajkt-U8KmXuwTvA913irmvsdk2A42HNC-MofsiKgJ-qeAQk8YiUM99S1u6w6uZlHXecDwZkTKrhSfvpJkISqn5aCqUh-zyrmAN0pnd9EdKtpAntTHksm7IIQR0Rl6bnO0BFLK_KuIOOQ6lPmVJxm-DBZg4gyQzXZoo6-FGmhthS9niRAEhnWHfyRZOkK3itEuJ4hlxdr)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Illinois=20Review?=
subject: Sunday Second Amendment Special Edition
body:
A direct appeal to the Illinois Supreme Court brought by Gov. Pritzker and stipulated to by Rep. Caulkins jeopardizes the livelihoods of thousands.

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/c2a6b3fddda8/sunday-second-amendment-special-edition?e=1cb5fdae9e)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=7b19664c1c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_05_11_09&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-7b19664c1c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
https://www.goldentreewealth.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=7b19664c1c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_05_11_09&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-7b19664c1c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
SUNDAY SECOND AMENDMENT SPECIAL EDITION

Kaspar: Caulkins' Sprint to the IL Supreme Court Jeopardizes Rights of Thousands of Illinoisans and Livelihoods of Hundreds of Small Business Owners and Their Employees (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/03/kaspar-caulkins-sprint-to-the-il-supreme-court-jeopardizes-rights-of-thousands-of-illinoisans-and-livelihoods-of-hundreds-of-small-business-owners-and-their-employees.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=7b19664c1c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_05_11_09&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-7b19664c1c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

On January 20th, a week-and-a-half after Gov. JB Pritzker’s assault weapons ban went into effect, Gov. Pritzker was caught flat-footed when an Effingham County judge entered a Temporary Restraining Order (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/breaking-judge-rules-in-favor-of-former-ag-candidate-tom-devore-and-over-860-plaintiffs-halts-pritzkers-assault-weapons-ban.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=7b19664c1c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_05_11_09&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-7b19664c1c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) (TRO) against his gun ban. It was a win that no one saw coming based on a novel theory (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=r1BST11qzl8&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=7b19664c1c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_05_11_09&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-7b19664c1c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) by former Republican AG candidate Thomas DeVore that the gun ban violates the Equal Protection Clause of the Illinois Constitution.

And since that early win, additional TROs have been secured across Illinois, with additional plaintiffs now joining the
consolidated (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/02/illinois-supreme-court-denies-consolidation-of-state-rep-caulkins-lawsuit-against-gov-pritzkers-assault-weapons-ban-with-the-devore-cases.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=7b19664c1c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_05_11_09&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-7b19664c1c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) litigation in Effingham County that very soon will cover nearly 7000 Illinoisans, including nearly 200 gun shops.

But a
direct appeal (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/03/macon-county-judge-grants-rep-caulkins-summary-judgment-motion-fast-tracks-case-to-illinois-supreme-court.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=7b19664c1c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_05_11_09&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-7b19664c1c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) to the Illinois Supreme Court of the basis for the TRO – the Equal Protection violation – brought by Gov. Pritzker and stipulated to by Illinois State Rep. Dan Caulkins of Decatur, now jeopardizes the rights of thousands of Illinoisans safeguarded under the TRO – including the livelihoods of hundreds of small business gun shop owners and their employees.

It’s a development so shocking that the only rational explanation must be that Caulkins cut a deal with Pritzker.
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/03/kaspar-caulkins-sprint-to-the-il-supreme-court-jeopardizes-rights-of-thousands-of-illinoisans-and-livelihoods-of-hundreds-of-small-business-owners-and-their-employees.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=7b19664c1c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_05_11_09&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-7b19664c1c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
(Getty Images)

When Effingham County judge Joshua Morrison entered the TRO, his order (https://drive.google.com/file/d/1MvVjOOuD-kcN4flDyv8evltvfM0cDU3a/view?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=7b19664c1c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_05_11_09&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-7b19664c1c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) found that DeVore is likely to prevail on the Equal Protection grounds. That is not an invitation to take the matter directly to the Illinois Supreme Court. Rather, it is the judge signaling to the parties that if the case is developed and brought to trial, DeVore is likely to win.

DeVore’s Equal Protection argument is based on seemingly arbitrary
exemptions (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/02/second-effingham-county-judge-enters-restraining-order-against-pritzkers-assault-weapons-ban-cites-appellate-court-ruling-and-equal-protection-clause.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=7b19664c1c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_05_11_09&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-7b19664c1c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) in the gun ban that allow for certain people to purchase or own banned weapons.

For instance, active and retired law enforcement are excluded from the ban, as are active military, prison guards, and employees in private security.

Not excluded, however, are retired members of the military.

In other words, a
mall cop (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=r1BST11qzl8&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=7b19664c1c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_05_11_09&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-7b19664c1c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) is exempt from the assault weapons ban and is free to buy an AR-15, but a retired member of SEAL Team Six is not.

To prevail on this argument, though, DeVore would have to show that the State cannot satisfy its legal burden to justify the constitutional violation – that is, at a minimum there must be some rational basis justifying these exemptions. And DeVore was doing just that: he served discovery requests on the defendants including requests for admission that the gun ban legislation is totally devoid of any justification whatsoever.

Rather, many legal experts who have analyzed the legislation believe that the exemptions were included to appease lobbyists in order to secure enough votes in Springfield for the bill to pass. There’s no other reason why mall cops would be exempted, unless lobbyists for the private security sector insisted.

And the rationale cannot be that the exempted groups are properly trained with so-called assault weapons, because most mall cops are not. And retired military, who would have been qualified with banned weapons, are not among the exempted groups.

Defendants Gov. Pritzker and Illinois AG Kwame Raoul have refused to answer DeVore’s discovery requests on the basis for the exemptions, citing what appears to be some type of executive privilege that allegedly cloaks the legislative history of the gun ban.

In other words, the defendants don’t want to give anyone a window into how the sausage is made in Springfield that might expose which lobbyists and which members of the General Assembly carry the influence.

Then enters Rep. Caulkins, who
filed (https://www.decaturtribune.com/2023/01/27/state-representative-dan-caulkins-files-lawsuit-to-defend-second-amendment-rights/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=7b19664c1c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_05_11_09&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-7b19664c1c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) his separate stand-alone complaint that largely copied DeVore’s complaints, including the same Equal Protection violations. But Caulkins chose to fundraise (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/breaking-devore-representing-plaintiffs-solicited-to-join-state-rep-dan-caulkins-lawsuit-challenging-pritzkers-assault-weapons-ban.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=7b19664c1c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_05_11_09&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-7b19664c1c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) off his case, allegedly taking $200-per-person campaign donations in exchange for “joining” the litigation.

There’s one hitch: Caulkins’ complaint failed to name the hundreds of campaign donors properly, instead naming an unincorporated association that does not appear to actually cover the donors. That put Caulkins in a bind with his donors and potentially with the Illinois State Board of Elections.

Hence, the opportunity was ripe for Caulkins to cut a deal with Pritzker to short-circuit the litigation and get Caulkins out from underneath potential campaign finance violations and save Gov. Pritzker from having to answer DeVore’s discovery.

That is, fast-track a case with absolutely no record to the Illinois Supreme Court and rush to a final adjudication.

There is just no other reason why Caulkins would have agreed to this rush to judgment, unless it was to get himself out of hot water.

And maybe the
Democrat-controlled (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/il-gop-points-fingers-at-illinois-review-grassroots-despite-supporting-democrat-richard-irvin.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=7b19664c1c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_05_11_09&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-7b19664c1c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) Illinois Supreme Court will agree that the assault weapons ban violates the Equal Protection Clause and give Caulkins the win. Maybe sacrificing this law to protect how the sausage is made in Springfield is more valuable to Gov. Pritzker, as there no doubt will be another run at an assault weapons ban should this one be struck down.

But why would Caulkins take that risk, when the rights of thousands of Illinoisans and the livelihoods of hundreds of gun shop owners and their employees hangs in the balance?

No one willingly enters into a game of Russian Roulette. It’s a gamble one would take only if the 80% chance of potential success outweighed the 20% chance of certain death.

But that’s where Caulkins finds himself now.

And Gov. Pritzker just pulled the trigger on an empty chamber and now has handed the revolver back to Caulkins for his turn.

Scott Kaspar is a 20-year trial lawyer licensed in Illinois, Iowa, Colorado, and California, who has handled and won complex litigations in federal courts across the country. Kaspar also is one of the plaintiff’s in the first DeVore case in which a TRO was granted on January 20th. He can be followed on Twitter at @ScottKaspar.

https://youtu.be/gg_Zmd-CDww?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=7b19664c1c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_05_11_09&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-7b19664c1c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Publisher Scott Kaspar joins Addison Smith on OANN to discuss the latest developments in the litigations against Gov. JB Pritzker's assault weapons ban.

https://www.goldentreewealth.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=7b19664c1c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_05_11_09&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-7b19664c1c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

name: AdamSchiff.com
subject: gravity
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| Like a black hole, the Republican Party’s gravitational pull absorbs craven political opportunists and conspiracy theorists from the margins of the party into its very core.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=1901%2E5257348%2EkNQ299)
Derek —
Like a black hole, the Republican Party’s gravitational pull absorbs craven political opportunists and conspiracy theorists from the margins of the party into its very core.
Marjorie Taylor Greene went from being a fringe Member kicked off her committees for inciting violence against her colleagues, and someone who was spreading lies about a Rothschild-funded “Jewish space laser,” to a MAGA power broker and one of Speaker Kevin McCarthy’s staunchest and most important allies.
As Donald Trump and his imitators continue to debase our politics and destroy our political norms and guardrails, it is more important than ever that we have a fighter in the U.S. Senate. Someone who will stand up to Trump’s very worst enablers in that chamber. And hold them accountable. Someone who will help put our country back on the right track.
Someone like Adam Schiff.
When virtually every Republican on Capitol Hill was willing to excuse Trump’s abuses of office and accept such immorality as the new normal, Adam spoke up for millions of Americans when he insisted that, _“This is not okay.”_
He has fought right-wing extremists for years, helped lead the most productive two years of Congress in recent history as a member of Democratic leadership, and his work isn’t done yet.
Right matters. Truth matters. Decency matters. And **our Democracy matters.**
**[So if you’re with Adam in this fight, we’re asking you to take the incredibly important step of supporting his campaign. We are in an era-defining moment in American history, and we cannot — we must not — fall short.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=mar2023_abs_em.pVOgM2&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230305_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=1901%2E5257348%2EkNQ299)**

name: Senator Amanda Chase
subject: Reminder: Week 1 Campaign Newsletter End of Week Update
disclaimer_text: paid for by political action committees and lobbyists
body:
How can I help Amanda?
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016EFDlXbu4AA01ipVDpIY0eiXCs37P_IYJnOZZzDEbY2pSdF49mF6pWEYRHeAQyyRB6eAjKRHMtGMNV8bw8Ieit2NZAodfAOPvJ4DjI-Z_mAyP1A4OEf6aGA8hjrXjIiRmJFgj-KGR1jfI7YxXJaahPS02Yo4vIUfmvxCH3TNYig=&c=Ho7EKV7oNAHDydrR3dh6Ip1VYQGX6MbpRnKbWZglKsQ4PR7AuIsd9g==&ch=QKVMQ1vPXl2REhLKyoApU2LZIoQ-IingmjMw_MSDQn41XIdNRwu87A==)
---
| CUT TO THE CHASE WITH SENATOR CHASE Weekly Campaign Newsletter SIGNS, SIGNS SIGNS 3 1/2 months left until Election Day Tuesday, June 20
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| |
---
| WHAT HAPPENED THIS WEEK?
---
| WEEK 1: CAMPAIGN UPDATE 2
---
| How Can I Help Amanda?
---
| |
---
| Senator Amanda Chase
---
Senator Chase has represented Chesterfield, Colonial Heights and Amelia Counties in the Senate since first elected in 2015, almost 8 years. She grew up in Bon Air and has lived most of her life in Chesterfield, since 1979.
She has been rated as one of the most conservative Senators in Virginia by the American Conservative Union and has a lifetime score of 100% with the Family Foundation, VCDL and A with the NRA.
She is also a champion in the General Assembly for pushing back against vaccine and mask mandates, calling for a full investigation into the 2020 Presidential Election, parental rights in education, medical freedom, protecting gun rights and help for our veterans.
---
| | |
---
| MY OFFICE IS A TRUCK
---
| Dear Friends and Supporters, There's no place like home, and better yet riding around the district in our pick up truck. While I'm thankful for the opportunity to represent you in Richmond, I love being back in the district spending time with many of you. This was my first full week back home in the district.
Now that session is over, Mike and I have been driving across the district putting up 4 by 8 signs. Why? So that you know an election is coming and remember to get out and vote. I believe signs ARE important. The Republican Primary is just around the corner in less than 3 1/2 months on Tuesday, June 20 and I humbly ask for your vote.
We've really enjoyed stopping by many of your homes and businesses throughout Chesterfield and Colonial Heights. Honestly, we've spent more time talking with you, than putting up signs. And we love it. If you have a great location for a sign, please let Mike know at mike@chaseforva.com. We've enjoyed talking to many of you who have come out and talked to us while we put up the sign on your property. I enjoy listening to what's on your mind and what's important to you.
At every stop, people are telling us to keep up the good work and keep fighting. You're telling us that we've compromised so much that we're giving our country away and that you're tired of it. You're telling us to continue to stand strong and don't back down. You're telling us that you like that I don't go along to along and that you appreciate that I don't back down. What we love most is when you tell us that you're praying for us and particularly for our protection. Mike and I return home each day reinvigorated and determined to stand strong for you and our conservative values.
Many of you also expressed that you were confused over the new legislative lines and were concerned as to whether or not you could still vote for me after redistricting. So I've included this information in this newsletter. You've also asked how can you help. So we have information about that as well.
We are looking forward to seeing many of you Monday night at the Chesterfield VA Tea Party meeting for a legislative update. All legislators and candidates are invited and will be given an opportunity to speak. However, speakers will need to RSVP to Debbie at debbie@chaseforva.com.
If you can't stay but want to pick up a yard sign, bumper sticker or want to sign the petition to get my name on the ballot, that's fine too. We also have t-shirts and hats for a donation of $50 or more. I look forward to seeing you Monday!
If you're unsure if you can vote for me, please check the map below to see if you live in the district.
---
| How can I help Amanda?
---
| Is there anything you can do today to help us win this June 20 Primary?
---
| | | [DONATE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016EFDlXbu4AA01ipVDpIY0eiXCs37P_IYJnOZZzDEbY2pSdF49mF6pRh4v3olm1rIJPKzR_rI0x1hpRKN3hn0-7maS46cjwOaENM2eY5zrvt22hEVMd9Hny3tl3Z4RWOU4yL0_xkfbj5RW2A-EcontxYQJSmFAO6u4OWnY0At1H22aR0_XwA4NZmWBEC-MmIOArPBL6DHOR_AShxXYTU6YA==&c=Ho7EKV7oNAHDydrR3dh6Ip1VYQGX6MbpRnKbWZglKsQ4PR7AuIsd9g==&ch=QKVMQ1vPXl2REhLKyoApU2LZIoQ-IingmjMw_MSDQn41XIdNRwu87A==)
---
| How much do you value your freedom? Most candidates are bought for and paid for by political action committees and lobbyists. Not me. I rely on the generous donations from you. So please answer this call for help. Anyone can donate and you don't have to live in the district to give. I can still vote for you.
Successful campaigns are expensive unfortunately. Many people are surprised to find out that we have to raise our own money to run for public office. I've heard people express that they didn't know about a campaign and I know it was because the candidate didn't raise enough money to get the word out.
Signs, mailers, radio, tv and social media ads let people know there's an election coming and to get out and vote. In order to communicate to voters it costs money. If 5,000 people gave $100 we would be able to fully fund my campaign. Would you please donate $100 today or more if you are able?
---
| | | [VOLUNTEER](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016EFDlXbu4AA01ipVDpIY0eiXCs37P_IYJnOZZzDEbY2pSdF49mF6pRPOx1FjM1N1-md_F6MXFT0X7P6qatj12jp9ZUk0laCwrLDswlnFF8fTCAnYNWwvJEv992zqj6GTen7u7G1JGWEDvCyszusGWf1J_ExDlieIWaSZrQYBpN4=&c=Ho7EKV7oNAHDydrR3dh6Ip1VYQGX6MbpRnKbWZglKsQ4PR7AuIsd9g==&ch=QKVMQ1vPXl2REhLKyoApU2LZIoQ-IingmjMw_MSDQn41XIdNRwu87A==)
---
|
Want to Walk your Neighborhood with Amanda? Please help us collect signatures to get my name on the ballot, drop off some campaign literature along with an invitation to our upcoming community event. Our goal is to reach a different neighborhood every week.
Beginning Saturday, March 11 and every Saturday going forward we will go door to door from 10am to 5pm in 2 shifts.
For the first shift please arrive at 9:30am for instructions and we will begin walking at 10am. This first shift is from 10am until 1pm.
For the second shift please arrive at 1:30am for instructions and we will begin walking at 10am. The second shift is from 2pm to 5pm.
We will meet at the Arby's on Hull Street parking lot located at: 6541 Bayside Ln, Midlothian, VA 23112
---
| | | [HOST A MEET & GREET](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016EFDlXbu4AA01ipVDpIY0eiXCs37P_IYJnOZZzDEbY2pSdF49mF6pRPOx1FjM1N1-md_F6MXFT0X7P6qatj12jp9ZUk0laCwrLDswlnFF8fTCAnYNWwvJEv992zqj6GTen7u7G1JGWEDvCyszusGWf1J_ExDlieIWaSZrQYBpN4=&c=Ho7EKV7oNAHDydrR3dh6Ip1VYQGX6MbpRnKbWZglKsQ4PR7AuIsd9g==&ch=QKVMQ1vPXl2REhLKyoApU2LZIoQ-IingmjMw_MSDQn41XIdNRwu87A==)
---
|
What is a "Meet and Greet"? I look forward to meeting your friends and neighbors.
Would you be willing to open your home, business or neighborhood clubhouse so that I can meet your friends and neighbors?
Know that we will help you with invitations and getting the word out about your meet and greet. We encourage hosts to keep it simple. Dessert and coffee are perfect and the event should only last about an hour and a half. We've found that Tuesday and Thursday evenings or Sunday late afternoons work best.
If this interests you please reach out to Debbie at [debbie@chaseforva.com](mailto:debbie@chaseforva.com) to schedule a date.
---
|
---
| Can I vote for Amanda?
---
| Do you live in SD12 in Chesterfield? Yes
---
| Do you live in Colonial Heights? Yes
---
| If you live in Chesterfield, you will either live in Senate District 12 or Senate District 15. Please review the map below. The purple area is Senate District 12. The orange area represents Senate District 15. If you live in Senate District 12, you can vote for me. All of Colonial Heights can vote for me.
---
|
---
| | | [For a Closer Look Click Here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016EFDlXbu4AA01ipVDpIY0eiXCs37P_IYJnOZZzDEbY2pSdF49mF6palMNU2IZ6qZbOkznqia74VOuRUKKnsZDjPqNUrrULqINPrqeh4dGlKfmFpDXnBUGhoSVFANmXQ_1n1ky4I9xFd0kwQnu_1XSvY069CV08kuEChUDcPV_vX1zECC6lqZZffGc2Iu_Ktn8S78SIPV6lwrFvo9IRrry8i2KmA_VoLUcI6w-T8gCxXX6YJbNKIWYHuzJxzjHrAe&c=Ho7EKV7oNAHDydrR3dh6Ip1VYQGX6MbpRnKbWZglKsQ4PR7AuIsd9g==&ch=QKVMQ1vPXl2REhLKyoApU2LZIoQ-IingmjMw_MSDQn41XIdNRwu87A==)
---
| WHERE IS THE 12th SENATE DISTRICT?
---
| The 12th Senatorial District includes most of Chesterfield and all of Colonial Heights. Anyone who is registered to vote in Colonial Heights can vote for me on Tuesday, June 20 at their regular polling location between the hours of 6am and 7pm.
In the 12th Senatorial District, there are 51 voting precincts in Chesterfield and 5 voting precincts in Colonial Heights. Click on the link below to see a map of each Chesterfield precinct within SD 12.

Please Sign The Petition to Get My Name on the Ballot
| In order to get my name on the ballot we must get at least 250 registered voters who live in [Senate District 12 ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016EFDlXbu4AA01ipVDpIY0eiXCs37P_IYJnOZZzDEbY2pSdF49mF6pdPpC9WAxVYEvYKc89vPOOSUdItw2Ssum5qXCVkd6YFj95G__Khb1M7aTflsSaj6kwQj23R0GPtgHdAPbxlZQAEGfuaGgsb-pegl6KoVzJ2Gm7Viw_3v3gGAgKnZ5JuqBXD1h2RyEP1C-45VVxbdhuMg1Xm7UMHLjfpyrS5VBDLppCfQW9jmSxIMvGvXH_QdXewLL41tgBl6&c=Ho7EKV7oNAHDydrR3dh6Ip1VYQGX6MbpRnKbWZglKsQ4PR7AuIsd9g==&ch=QKVMQ1vPXl2REhLKyoApU2LZIoQ-IingmjMw_MSDQn41XIdNRwu87A==) to sign my petition. This is something I have to do every time I've run for re-election.
Senate District 12 includes most of Chesterfield and all of Colonial Heights. Do you live in Bon Air, North Chesterfield, Woodlake, Summerlake or Smoketree? You live in SD12. For a complete map of the district please click the link above.
You must actually sign a physical petition. This is not something that can be done online.
You can sign in person at our next event or we can email the form to you. If we mail you the form, you can ask family members to sign the petition and mail the form back to us, but please remember to get the form notarized at your bank before you mail it back to us. Here's our address:
Friends of Amanda Chase Attention: Petition PO Box 5811 Midlothian, VA 23112
If you'd like to sign my petition, you can stop by my senate office, see me at church on Sunday in the foyer in between services or attend one of our upcoming events like our Tea Party meetings, held on the first of each month. Thanks to all who have already signed and asked to collect signatures for us.
We must turn in our signatures before Monday, March 20 at noon sharp to the GOP District Chair.
Please reach out to Mike at Mike@chaseforva.com.

clean_body: How can I help Amanda? | | | | | | == | CUT TO THE CHASE WITH SENATOR CHASE Weekly Campaign Newsletter SIGNS, SIGNS SIGNS 3 1/2 months left until Election Day Tuesday, June 20 | | | | | | WHAT HAPPENED THIS WEEK? | WEEK 1: CAMPAIGN UPDATE 2 | How Can I Help Amanda? | | | Senator Amanda Chase Senator Chase has represented Chesterfield, Colonial Heights and Amelia Counties in the Senate since first elected in 2015, almost 8 years. She grew up in Bon Air and has lived most of her life in Chesterfield, since 1979. She has been rated as one of the most conservative Senators in Virginia by the American Conservative Union and has a lifetime score of 100% with the Family Foundation, VCDL and A with the NRA. She is also a champion in the General Assembly for pushing back against vaccine and mask mandates, calling for a full investigation into the 2020 Presidential Election, parental rights in education, medical freedom, protecting gun rights and help for our veterans. | | | | MY OFFICE IS A TRUCK | Dear Friends and Supporters, There's no place like home, and better yet riding around the district in our pick up truck. While I'm thankful for the opportunity to represent you in Richmond, I love being back in the district spending time with many of you. This was my first full week back home in the district. Now that session is over, Mike and I have been driving across the district putting up 4 by 8 signs. Why? So that you know an election is coming and remember to get out and vote. I believe signs ARE important. The Republican Primary is just around the corner in less than 3 1/2 months on Tuesday, June 20 and I humbly ask for your vote. We've really enjoyed stopping by many of your homes and businesses throughout Chesterfield and Colonial Heights. Honestly, we've spent more time talking with you, than putting up signs. And we love it. If you have a great location for a sign, please let Mike know at mike@chaseforva.com. We've enjoyed talking to many of you who have come out and talked to us while we put up the sign on your property. I enjoy listening to what's on your mind and what's important to you. At every stop, people are telling us to keep up the good work and keep fighting. You're telling us that we've compromised so much that we're giving our country away and that you're tired of it. You're telling us to continue to stand strong and don't back down. You're telling us that you like that I don't go along to along and that you appreciate that I don't back down. What we love most is when you tell us that you're praying for us and particularly for our protection. Mike and I return home each day reinvigorated and determined to stand strong for you and our conservative values. Many of you also expressed that you were confused over the new legislative lines and were concerned as to whether or not you could still vote for me after redistricting. So I've included this information in this newsletter. You've also asked how can you help. So we have information about that as well. We are looking forward to seeing many of you Monday night at the Chesterfield VA Tea Party meeting for a legislative update. All legislators and candidates are invited and will be given an opportunity to speak. However, speakers will need to RSVP to Debbie at debbie@chaseforva.com. If you can't stay but want to pick up a yard sign, bumper sticker or want to sign the petition to get my name on the ballot, that's fine too. We also have t-shirts and hats for a donation of $50 or more. I look forward to seeing you Monday! If you're unsure if you can vote for me, please check the map below to see if you live in the district. | How can I help Amanda? | Is there anything you can do today to help us win this June 20 Primary? | | | == | How much do you value your freedom? Most candidates are bought for and paid for by political action committees and lobbyists. Not me. I rely on the generous donations from you. So please answer this call for help. Anyone can donate and you don't have to live in the district to give. I can still vote for you. Successful campaigns are expensive unfortunately. Many people are surprised to find out that we have to raise our own money to run for public office. I've heard people express that they didn't know about a campaign and I know it was because the candidate didn't raise enough money to get the word out. Signs, mailers, radio, tv and social media ads let people know there's an election coming and to get out and vote. In order to communicate to voters it costs money. If 5,000 people gave $100 we would be able to fully fund my campaign. Would you please donate $100 today or more if you are able? | | | == | Want to Walk your Neighborhood with Amanda? Please help us collect signatures to get my name on the ballot, drop off some campaign literature along with an invitation to our upcoming community event. Our goal is to reach a different neighborhood every week. Beginning Saturday, March 11 and every Saturday going forward we will go door to door from 10am to 5pm in 2 shifts. For the first shift please arrive at 9:30am for instructions and we will begin walking at 10am. This first shift is from 10am until 1pm. For the second shift please arrive at 1:30am for instructions and we will begin walking at 10am. The second shift is from 2pm to 5pm. We will meet at the Arby's on Hull Street parking lot located at: 6541 Bayside Ln, Midlothian, VA 23112 | | | == | What is a "Meet and Greet"? I look forward to meeting your friends and neighbors. Would you be willing to open your home, business or neighborhood clubhouse so that I can meet your friends and neighbors? Know that we will help you with invitations and getting the word out about your meet and greet. We encourage hosts to keep it simple. Dessert and coffee are perfect and the event should only last about an hour and a half. We've found that Tuesday and Thursday evenings or Sunday late afternoons work best. If this interests you please reach out to Debbie at mailto:debbie@chaseforva.com to schedule a date. | | Can I vote for Amanda? | Do you live in SD12 in Chesterfield? Yes | Do you live in Colonial Heights? Yes | If you live in Chesterfield, you will either live in Senate District 12 or Senate District 15. Please review the map below. The purple area is Senate District 12. The orange area represents Senate District 15. If you live in Senate District 12, you can vote for me. All of Colonial Heights can vote for me. | | | | == | WHERE IS THE 12th SENATE DISTRICT? | The 12th Senatorial District includes most of Chesterfield and all of Colonial Heights. Anyone who is registered to vote in Colonial Heights can vote for me on Tuesday, June 20 at their regular polling location between the hours of 6am and 7pm. In the 12th Senatorial District, there are 51 voting precincts in Chesterfield and 5 voting precincts in Colonial Heights. Click on the link below to see a map of each Chesterfield precinct within SD 12. | | | == | List of 51 Chesterfield Precincts in SD12 | == at Carver College and Career Academy at 12400 Branders Bridge Rd == at Gates Elementary at 10001 Courthouse Road == at Ironbridge Baptist Church at 10900 Iron Bridge Rd VSU Multipurpose Center at 20809 Second Ave == at Cloverhill Library Matoaca Middle School == at Chesdin Landing Golf == at Second Branch Baptist Church == at Bethia United Methodist Church == at Cosby High School == at Manchester High School == at Mt Herman Baptist Church == at Cosby High School == at Matoaca High School == at Bailey Bridge Middle School == at Alberta Smith Elementary == at Spring Run Elementary == at Second Branch Baptist == at Chesterfield Baptist Church == at Swift Creek Baptist Church == at Brandermill Church Swift Creek Elementary Gordon Elementary == at Monacan High School == at Reams Elementary School == at Central Chesterfield Ruritan Swift Creek Middle == at Cloverhill High School == at Shenandoah Community Evergreen Elementary == at Tomahawk Middle School == at Tomahawk Middle School Woolridge Elementary School == == at Cloverhill Elementary == at Brighton Green Pool Crestwood Elementary School == at Midlothian High School == at Robious Elementary School St Michael's School == at Greenfield Elementary School Church of the Redeemer == at Robious Middle School == at Community of Grace == at Midlothian Middle School == at Salisbury Presbyterian Watkins Elementary School == == the Islamic Center == | List of Colonial Heights Precincts in SD12 | Colonial Heights Precinct 1 at Community Building 157 Roanoke Ave. Colonial Heights Precinct 2 at Colonial Heights Middle School 500 Conduit Rd. Colonial Heights Precinct 3 at Lakeview Elementary School 401 Taswell Ave. Colonial Heights Precinct 4 at Colonial Heights High School Technical Center 3451 Conduit Rd. Colonial Heights Precinct 5 at Tussing Elementary School 5501 Conduit Rd. | | | == | Still not sure? Click below | | | == | How can I help Amanda? | | | ---|--- | Please Sign The Petition to Get My Name on the Ballot | In order to get my name on the ballot we must get at least 250 registered voters who live in == to sign my petition. This is something I have to do every time I've run for re-election. Senate District 12 includes most of Chesterfield and all of Colonial Heights. Do you live in Bon Air, North Chesterfield, Woodlake, Summerlake or Smoketree? You live in SD12. For a complete map of the district please click the link above. You must actually sign a physical petition. This is not something that can be done online. You can sign in person at our next event or we can email the form to you. If we mail you the form, you can ask family members to sign the petition and mail the form back to us, but please remember to get the form notarized at your bank before you mail it back to us. Here's our address: Friends of Amanda Chase Attention: Petition PO Box 5811 Midlothian, VA 23112 If you'd like to sign my petition, you can stop by my senate office, see me at church on Sunday in the foyer in between services or attend one of our upcoming events like our Tea Party meetings, held on the first of each month. Thanks to all who have already signed and asked to collect signatures for us. We must turn in our signatures before Monday, March 20 at noon sharp to the GOP District Chair. Please reach out to Mike at Mike@chaseforva.com. | DO YOU HAVE A GOOD SIGN LOCATION? | | Mike and I are putting up 4 by 8s across Senate District 12 which includes Chesterfield and Colonial Heights and will continue until all of our 4 by 8s have been placed. Please reach out to Mike if you have a good 4 by 8 location on a main road or want to help put up 4 by 8s at mike@chaseforva.com. Please remember to include the contact information of the property owner. We respect property rights and only put up signs where we have permission from the home or business owner. Thanks to all who've already provided such great locations on main thoroughfares throughout Chesterfield and Colonial Heights. The primary is Tuesday, June 20. If you'd like to add your business as a pick up location, please reach out to Mike at mike@chaseforva.com | | | ---|--- | Want a Yard Sign for your Yard? | Yard signs are also available for pick up at these location during their business hours: Bob Moate's Sports Shop 10418 Hull Street Road Midlothian, VA 23112 Hours: Monday-Thursday 8:30-6pm Friday 9-7pm Saturday 8-5pm Sunday 8-4pm Dance's Sporting Goods 570 Southpark Blvd Colonial Heights, VA 23834 Hours: Weekdays 8am to 6pm Saturday 10-4pm Sunday 12-4pm Or click here to request a sign: mailto:mike@chaseforva.com | ENDORSEMENTS | President Donald J Trump Congressman Bob Good Former Congressman Dave Brat Former Congressman Virgil Goode Bishop EW Jackson Delegate John McGuire Colonial Heights City Council John Wood Colonial Heights City Council Dr. Laura Poe Amelia County Sheriff Ricky Walker Arizona Senator Sonny Borrelli Pennsylvania Senator and Republican Nominee for Governor Doug Mastriano Former Chesterfield Board of Supervisors Don Sowder Former Chesterfield Commonwealth's Attorney Billy Davenport Former Chesterfield Commissioner of Revenue Joe Horbal John Frederick, The John Frederick Radio Network Dick Heller, D.C. vs. Heller, Supreme Court Gun Freedom Case | President Donald J Trump | == | "You're doing a great job... I'm going to be with YOU on your next campaign. Just let me know when you're ready." \- President Donald J Trump | Congressman Bob Good | | "Today, I'm announcing my official endorsement of Virginia State Senator Amanda Chase as she seeks re-election to the Virginia State Senate. | "Amanda is an unapologetic conservative who isn't afraid to take on the tough issues that are most important to the people. She's a solid vote that conservatives can count on and a trusted ally of the people she represents. She's a champion and a leader on so many issues here in Virginia and nationally to include election integrity, protecting our constitutional rights, like the Second Amendment, pushing back against mask and vaccine mandates and voting against all tax increases. We need to send our known fighter and firebrand back to the Virginia Senate so she can continue to make a difference in the lives of every Virginian." | Former Congressman Dave Brat | | "Today, I'm announcing my endorsement of Virginia State Senator Amanda Chase as she seeks re-election to the Virginia State Senate. Senator Chase supported me before it was cool to be Pro Faith, Pro Constitution, Pro Free Markets and Pro American. She has courage. I ran on and supported the Republican Creed of Virginia. | "Many say they support this platform, but not everyone votes like it or messages constantly on it like Senator Chase. • Free enterprise system - No special interests • All individuals are entitled to equal rights, justice, opportunities • Fiscal responsibility and budgetary restraint at all levels • Observing Constitutional limitations • Peace is best preserved through a strong national defense • Faith in God, as recognized by our Founding Fathers, is essential to the moral fiber of the Nation "We the People" are tired of politicians who do not see the dangers right in front of us; from out of control schools to election integrity. We want people that can clearly articulate what these issues are and boldly lead the people to action. If we elect leaders that hold fast to the Virginia Republican Creed, there is no way we can end up with runaway spending, crime in the streets, crushing regulations and an economy that favors the Big and Powerful over small business and our great citizens. "We the People" overwhelmingly love God, Country and our fellow citizens. But love does not mean that anything goes. We the People demand that politicians are accountable to us. They work for us. Senator Amanda Chase will listen to the vast majority who want truth and sanity back in Government. Unfortunately, that will take a fight, and we have someone who will fight the good fight to ensure that the City on a Hill remains bright for us and a light for generations to come." | Former Congressman Virgil Goode | | | " "I'm honored to support Senator Amanda Chase for re-election to the Virginia Senate. " | Delegate John McGuire | | "I'm proud to endorse Senator Amanda Chase for re-election to the Virginia Senate in district 12. Everyone knows Amanda is a fighter who stands strong and doesn't waiver on our conservative issues. " | "She has a lifelong 7 year voting record you can trust. 100 percent rating with the Family Foundation, 100 percent rating with the Virginia Citizens Defense League and an 'A' rating with the NRA. She's also been one of the top rated conservative Senators, if not the most conservative in most years, at CPAC by the American Conservative Union. As Chairwoman of the National Election Integrity Caucus she has led the efforts in Virginia to put the guardrails back on our elections and even introduced a bill calling for a full forensic audit of Virginia. It was an honor to work with her and successfully pass legislation that Governor Youngkin asked us to both carry to exempt retired military benefits for our veterans up to $40,000. This was a bill she originally introduced in the Senate in 2021 and I was proud to work with her and see this bill finally pass under a Republican Governor. " | Former Delegate Brenda Pogge | | "I endorse Senator Amanda Chase for re-election to the Virginia Senate in Distict 12. As a former delegate, I have served together with Amanda in the General Assembly and also on a commission. She is a strong reliable conservative voice and vote, and a woman of strong faith in God and the founding of our country on Judeo-Christian values. She not only votes to protect the unborn, she introduces legislation to defend life and clearly articulates why it's never the government's role to fund abortions with taxpayer dollars." | "Amanda is not a typical politician, she's a mom of 4 who deeply cares for the people in her community. Education and school choice is a top priority. She homeschooled her children when they were young and truly understands the importance of parents having input in their children's education and fully supports parental rights and choice in education over government mandates. She not only supports school choice, she lived it. As a senator, Amanda Chase has an impeccable 7 year conservative voting record. Whether you're talking about pro-life, gun rights, defending our Constitution and individual rights, fighting for real election integrity, voting for limited government, voting against all tax increases and fully funding our law enforcement, Senator Chase checks all the boxes. I stand with Senator Amanda Chase and I encourage you to do so too." | Bishop E.W. Jackson | | "I have known Senator Amanda Chase personally and professionally for over 15 years. It is my pleasure and honor to endorse her for re-election to the Virginia Senate in District 12. Senator Chase is a courageous Christian voice for faith, family, and freedom. | "Amanda is a bold champion for our conservative values and has an impeccable 7-year voting record to prove it. She is pro-God, pro-life, pro-2A, pro-family, pro-election integrity, pro-business, and pro-law and order. She is a pro-life leader for legislation in the Virginia Senate such as the pain capable and heart beat bills, and she has a 100 percent lifetime rating with the Family Foundation. Amanda exposed and spoke against the so-called Equal Rights Amendment that would enshrine abortion as well as gender identity politics into the Virginia Constitution. Senator Chase is not just a Republican placeholder; she's a conservative firebrand who is not afraid to speak truth to power. I stand with Amanda because she's a true conservative who stands with us." | Pennsylvania Senator Doug Mastriano | | | "I'm honored to endorse Amanda Chase for re-election to the Virginia Senate. As the founder of the National Election Integrity she's a champion for election integrity both nationally and in Virginia. She's a pleasure to work with and knows how to get the job done." Pennsylvania State Senator and Republican nominee Doug Mastriano | Arizona Senator Sonny Borelli | | "Senator Amanda Chase is the only Virginia legislator who actually came out to Arizona to watch our full forensic audit, and again when our full report was released to the Senate. She has my full support as she seeks re-election to the Virginia State Senate." | "It makes no sense that anyone claiming to be a Republican and who truly cares about election integrity would challenge her given everything she's done for election integrity, not just in Virginia but nationally. She's been actively engaged in getting answers to what happened in 2020, implementing those solutions in legislation for Virginia, to include a full forensic audit, and founding the National Election Integrity Caucus to support other legislators across the country. While we welcome anyone who wants to expose the lies and deception that took place in 2020, Amanda has been the leading work horse for election integrity in Virginia , not a show horse like her opponents who have recently taken an interest in putting the guardrails back on Virginia elections. If you truly support real election integrity I highly recommend you support Senator Amanda Chase for re-election to the Virginia Senate." | Colonial Heights City Councilman John Wood | | | "I am honored to support Senator Amanda Chase for re-election to the Virginia Senate." | Colonial Heights City Councilman Dr. Laura Poe | | "As a small business owner, professor, and a member of the Colonial Heights City Council, I'm proud to stand with and endorse Senator Chase in her run for re-election to the Virginia Senate in Senate District 12." | Senator Chase has represented my district since her election in 2016 and continues to push legislation to protect our individual freedoms and rights, such as overreaching COVID mandates, voting against tax increases, and preservation of the election process. She stands firm in her faith and positions amidst controversy and challenges. Her voting record is consistent and matches the promises she makes to her constituents. I support her continued service for District 12 as our Senator and provide her with my full endorsement." | Amelia County Sheriff Ricky Walker | | "I endorse Senator Amanda Chase as she seeks re-election to the Virginia Senate in district 12. Senator Chase has represented Amelia County for the past 7 years and I've had the pleasure to work with her on a number of issues." | "She's present in the community, an active listener who cares about public safety and keeping our community safe. She's an effective legislator who fully supports public safety, our sheriffs and law enforcement. Her 7 year voting record shows she supports the tools that help our sheriffs and law enforcement effectively do what they were trained to do to keep our communities safe. She's co-patroned pay raises for our sheriffs, voted to support qualified immunity, protected our law enforcement from personal financial devastation and spoken on the Senate floor about the importance of fully funding our law enforcement and against defunding the police. I stand with Senator Amanda Chase because she has a 7 year voting record of supporting our law enforcement." | Former Chesterfield Board of Supervisors Don Sowder | | | "I endorse Amanda Chase for a continuation of her successful results in putting the needs of her constituents ahead of going with the flow. We need Virginia Senators who put partisan politics aside and focus on people rather than politics. Amanda is just that person. She is courageously ahead of the curve in introducing and shepherding into law issues that meet peoples needs rather than seeking out easy and non-controversial issues. We need Amanda for another term in the Virginia Senate." | Former Chesterfield Commonwealth Attorney Billy Davenport | | "I have had the pleasure of knowing Senator Amanda Chase for the past fifteen years. She is a Christian lady who lives her life by "Founding Father Values", the values that made our Country great." | "She stands firm on our Constitutional Rights and amid much adversity she never wavers on the First and Second Amendments which give us the free exercise of religion, freedom of speech, the press, and the right to peacefully assemble to and petition the government for a redress of grievances, and the right to keep and bear arms. Without the first two amendments all the other amendments would have much less effect. She will not be silenced as she forcefully and effectively represents the people of her district. She is a true Statesman who will not violate her oath of office and the trust of her constituents." | Former Chesterfield Commissioner of Revenue Joe Horbal | | "I endorse Virginia State Senator Amanda Chase as she seeks re-election to the Senate of Virginia in Senate District 12. I've known Amanda both professionally and personally for over 15 years and know her to be a person of good character and integrity. " | "Even before she was in the state senate she consistently stood up for what was right and wasn't afraid to challenge the status quo. That said, she knows how to get things done and is a reliable and consistent vote for the people. She stands strongly for the Constitution and doing right by the people she represents. Amanda has been an effective Virginia State Senator who has consistently represented us well and without influence by special interest groups. She has accomplished much since she was first elected in 2015. She works tirelessly for the people to represent their needs and we need to re-elect her to the Virginia Senate to be our voice." | Dick Heller, D.C. vs. Heller, Supreme Court Gun Freedom Case | | | "I know of no harder working person in Virginia so capable and willing to fight for freedom and our foundational God-given natural rights through self-preservation through our United States Constitutional Second Amendment than Senator Amanda Chase." | You are invited to Join Team Chase | | Now that session is over, I can fully focus on running for re-election. If you're interested in scheduling a meet and greet please email Debbie at mailto:debbie@chaseforva.com. Also, if you'd like to help out, we're looking for people to collect signatures so that I can get my name on the ballot. I need 250 signatures. If you're interested, please reach out to Mike at mailto:mike@chaseforva.com. We hope to see you soon! For God & Country, | | SAVE THE DATE | GIVE TODAY | | | | == | MARCH 6 | Legislative Update for the 2023 Session | Please join us for an overview of the 2023 General Assembly Session. What happened during the legislative session? How does the legislation passed effect you? Things you need to know. Any legislator who would like to speak should reach out to Debbie at debbie@chaseforva.com to RSVP. | | MARCH 16 | Senate District 12 Candidate Debate | | MARCH 20 AT NOON | | In order to get my name on the ballot we must get at least 250 registered voters who live in == to sign my petition. This is something I have to do every time I've run for re-election. Thanks to all who have already signed and asked to collect signatures for us. If you'd like to sign my petition, you can stop by my senate office, see me at church on Sunday in the foyer in between services or attend one of our upcoming events like our Tea Party meetings, held on the first of each month. We can also email you the form. You can ask family members to sign the petition and mail the form back to us, but please remember to get the form notarized at your bank before you mail it back to us. We must turn in our signatures before Monday, March 20 at noon sharp to the GOP District Chair. You will want to turn in your notarized forms well before this date, as this is the date we must turn all forms into the chair. Please reach out to Mike at Mike@chaseforva.com if you have questions or call our campaign cell at 804 380 0009. | MARCH 31 | | APRIL 12 RECONVENE | | APRIL 27 Meet & Greet at Summerlake in Chesterfield County | | "Summerlake Meet and Greet" Chesterfield County Clubhouse at Summer Lake 17040 Lake Summer Drive Moseley, VA 23120 5:30 to 6pm VIP Reception 6pm to 7:30pm Mark your calendar Stay tuned for details | MAY 11 Meet & Greet at Chesdin Landing in Chesterfield County | | | | | | | Meet and Greet at Chesdin Landing in Chesterfield County Lake Chesdin Golf Club 21801 Lake Chesdin Parkway Chesterfield, VA 23838 5:30 to 6pm VIP Reception 6pm to 7:30pm Mark your calendar Stay tuned for details | JUNE 20 | | | | | | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | SESSION NEWSLETTERS | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | HOW DO I VOTE? | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | Authorized and Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase | | Friends of Amanda Chase | P.O. Box 5811, Midlothian, VA 23112 | | Sent by mailto:amanda@chaseforva.com powered by

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Nevada was, sadly, the only state where an incumbent Democratic governor lost in 2022, and Sen. Cortez Masto hung onto her seat by a thread. Our national fortunes could depend on supporting our great, Democratic Senator, Jacky Rosen, in her 2024 reelection bid.
body:
Nevada Senate
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta7955109-0c99-43ed-9e7f-1759d5375a36/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **We cannot let Republicans take Nevada in 2024, or we likely lose the presidency** _This is what we're facing after the Silver State was one of the closest in the country in 2020, with Sen. Cortez Masto barely hanging on by .8% after a-several-day recount. It was one of the closest states for President Biden in 2020, and, sadly, the only state where an incumbent Democratic governor lost in 2022._ **_We must protect our great Democratic Senator, Jacky Rosen, in 2024, as hers is one of the most vulnerable seats. Yet, if we can provide her with resources she needs, not only do we stand a great chance of holding her seat but it'll help turn out our voters for President Biden--preventing the nightmare scenario of a President Trump or DeSantis._** [**_Can you join us in giving Senator Jacky Rosen $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to create momentum for this race, ultimately keeping Nevada blue in 2024 for both the Senate and President!_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T79b2fc02-d840-445c-92e5-1d6e5048f237/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5b052b0a-2061-433f-846c-48a61a6be3bb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| _From Sen. Rosen:_ _There's no question that Mitch McConnell and his special interest allies will pour millions of dollars into Nevada to try to buy this seat. He's done it before and nearly succeeded._ **_That's why I'm relying on grassroots supporters like you to step up right here, right now – today._** _Because it's not just your $10. It's your $10 combined with $10 from your neighbor, friend, a waitress in Las Vegas, a nurse in Reno, and a small-business owner in Carson City. Together, we're building a powerful grassroots movement to keep this must-win seat blue._ **_Senate control could all come down to what happens in Nevada – so please, we need all hands on deck:_** _Tonight is the end of the month deadline, which shapes press coverage, influences the actions of larger donors and, in general, gives or takes momentum from candidates in an important race such as this._ [**_Can you join us in giving Senator Jacky Rosen $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to create momentum for this race, ultimately keeping Nevada blue in 2024 for both the Senate and President!_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te2ba5129-8349-4359-b403-7e99ebd210ae/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **Thank you for your dedication to your democracy,** **Cliff**
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcb253e56-9416-402e-b404-d50c83863363/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | |
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---
| **Blue Amp Strategies**
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/jackyrosenfornevada3-n_copy1?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1582c147-6f2b-4f2e-8050-74535d260ae5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| | [Unsubscribe](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=ccbdb3ea-cd7f-4c60-a703-b3b25a4db80d&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) or [Manage Your Preferences](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=ccbdb3ea-cd7f-4c60-a703-b3b25a4db80d&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: Three years in prison for a flag
body:
Crooked Joe Biden just released a top 9-11 TERRORIST from prison in Guantanamo Bay, Cuba. | | | | | [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62398051:6YIu4JGNP:m:1:3331421248:A89FB2F7127747B4861C342F40C77D91:r)
---
| |
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62398051:6YIu4JGNP:m:1:3331421248:A89FB2F7127747B4861C342F40C77D91:r)Dear Peter,

[ **Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical, class action lawsuits to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PEACEFUL PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE!** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62398051:6YIu4JGNP:m:1:3331421248:A89FB2F7127747B4861C342F40C77D91:r)

January 6 Peaceful Protester Kevin Seefried has been sentenced to three years in federal prison.

Did he attack the U.S. Capitol Police? No

Did he break windows? No.

**Kevin was sentenced to three years in prison because he carried a Confederate flag through the U.S. Capitol building on Jan. 6, 2021.**

The NBC News headline says it all:

"Man who carried a Confederate flag in the Capitol on Jan. 6 is sentenced to 3 years."

You'll notice there isn't one word there about the crimes he allegedly committed ... just the flag.

U.S. District Judge Trevor McFadden blasted Ken's carrying of the flag as "shocking" and "outrageous."

Kevin carried the flag only as a symbol of protest, not to support racism or slavery.

But that didn't save him ... neither did his forced public apology.

What's worse, the federal prosecutor wanted Kevin to serve 70 months - 5 years and 10 months - in prison for his "crimes!"

**Meanwhile, foaming at the mouth radicals in Black Lives Matter and Antifa who've rioted, burned down buildings and businesses, beaten, and terrorized everyday Americans haven't even been ARRESTED!**

This is outrageous!

That's why I ask you to stand with me before it's too late.

**I'm Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.**

I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 45 years.

You've seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I'm proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.**

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN!**

And now I'm pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Peaceful Protesters and take on Joe Biden's rotten criminal regime in court.

[ **Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62398051:6YIu4JGNP:m:1:3331421248:A89FB2F7127747B4861C342F40C77D91:r)

Your best gift today will help me fight for these jailed patriots, bring them justice, and fight for the future of our Great Nation.

You're the key to making these pivotal fights as effective as possible.

[**So please give what you can right away.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62398051:6YIu4JGNP:m:1:3331421248:A89FB2F7127747B4861C342F40C77D91:r)

Thank you so much!

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder, Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Chairman and General Counsel, Freedom Watch, Inc.

clean_body: Crooked Joe Biden just released a top 9-11 TERRORIST from prison in Guantanamo Bay, Cuba. | | | | | | | Peter, January 6 Peaceful Protester Kevin Seefried has been sentenced to three years in federal prison. Did he attack the U.S. Capitol Police? No Did he break windows? No. Kevin was sentenced to three years in prison because he carried a Confederate flag through the U.S. Capitol building on Jan. 6, 2021. The NBC News headline says it all: "Man who carried a Confederate flag in the Capitol on Jan. 6 is sentenced to 3 years." You'll notice there isn't one word there about the crimes he allegedly committed ... just the flag. U.S. District Judge Trevor McFadden blasted Ken's carrying of the flag as "shocking" and "outrageous." Kevin carried the flag only as a symbol of protest, not to support racism or slavery. But that didn't save him ... neither did his forced public apology. What's worse, the federal prosecutor wanted Kevin to serve 70 months - 5 years and 10 months - in prison for his "crimes!" Meanwhile, foaming at the mouth radicals in Black Lives Matter and Antifa who've rioted, burned down buildings and businesses, beaten, and terrorized everyday Americans haven't even been ARRESTED! This is outrageous! That's why I ask you to stand with me before it's too late. I'm Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch. I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 45 years. You've seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows. I'm proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton. I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton. And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others. I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN! And now I'm pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Peaceful Protesters and take on Joe Biden's rotten criminal regime in court. Your best gift today will help me fight for these jailed patriots, bring them justice, and fight for the future of our Great Nation. You're the key to making these pivotal fights as effective as possible. Thank you so much! Sincerely, Larry Klayman Founder, Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch Chairman and General Counsel, Freedom Watch, Inc.
