name: Lindsey Graham
subject: These 3 should be Republicans
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Team Graham, Inc
body:
it's time for Red States to have Republican senators. | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61566985:s6V7kKDON:m:1:877327319:ABBFF10B109FC9FBAFBAA8952026D62A:r)
---

Fellow American,

We need to flip Senate seats in Ohio, West Virginia, and Montana next year. If we do, Republicans will win back control of the U.S. Senate.

Fellow American, it's time for Red States to have Republican senators. It's time to stop the disastrous Biden-Harris agenda and get America back on track. It's time to **Secure the Senate!**

Even the mainstream media understands the importance of these seats. Take a look at what POLITICO recently said:

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61566985:s6V7kKDON:m:1:877327319:ABBFF10B109FC9FBAFBAA8952026D62A:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61566985:s6V7kKDON:m:1:877327319:ABBFF10B109FC9FBAFBAA8952026D62A:r)
President Trump won these three states in 2020 because they are solidly red. They should be represented by Republican senators with conservative values. [**If you'll help early so our candidates don't get massively outraised again, we can win these seats!**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61566985:s6V7kKDON:m:1:877327319:ABBFF10B109FC9FBAFBAA8952026D62A:r)

| [** Secure the Senate -> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61566985:s6V7kKDON:m:1:877327319:ABBFF10B109FC9FBAFBAA8952026D62A:r)
---

My goal is to send early and sustained support to the Republicans fighting in Ohio, West Virginia, and Montana so they can boldly stand up to the Democrats' disastrous agenda. The Left significantly outraised our Senate candidates in 2022, but I'm determined not to let that happen again in 2024\.

[**Fellow American, will you help consider making a contribution of $10, $25, or $50 that will go directly to the campaigns of our Republican nominees in Ohio, West Virginia, and Montana?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61566985:s6V7kKDON:m:1:877327319:ABBFF10B109FC9FBAFBAA8952026D62A:r)

We can't **Secure the Senate** , grow our House majority, or take back the White House without you, Fellow American.

My Republican colleagues and I are working to block as much of the dangerous Biden-Harris agenda, but we need more support in the Capitol. [**Will you help us flip these red seats?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61566985:s6V7kKDON:m:1:877327319:ABBFF10B109FC9FBAFBAA8952026D62A:r)

Thanks,

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61566985:s6V7kKDON:m:1:877327319:ABBFF10B109FC9FBAFBAA8952026D62A:r)
Lindsey Graham

| VOTING RECORDS MATTER
---
| My Conservative Pro-Family Voting Record
---
| |
---
| Senator Amanda Chase
---
Senator Chase has represented Chesterfield, Colonial Heights and Amelia Counties in the Senate since first elected in 2015, almost 8 years. Amanda and her husband Mike have been married over 30 years and have 4 grown children. Amanda and Mike both grew up in Bon Air and have lived most of their lives in Chesterfield County, since 1979.
Amanda has been rated as one of the most conservative Senators in Virginia by the American Conservative Union and has a lifetime score of 100% with the Family Foundation, VCDL and A with the NRA.
She is also a champion in the General Assembly for pushing back against vaccine and mask mandates, calling for a full investigation into the 2020 Presidential Election, parental rights in education, medical freedom, protecting innocent life, protecting gun rights and help for our veterans.
---
| | |
---
|
---

American Conservative Union Chairman, Matt Schlapp, presents Senator Amanda Chase a Conservative Achievement Award in 2019

---

---
|
Congratulations to Senator Amanda Chase!

7th Year in a Row Conservative Achievement Award!

CPAC's American Conservative Union Scorecards for 2022 are in!
---
| My 8 Year Conservative Voting Record ON PRO-FAMILY ISSUES 100% pro-life
---
| Dear Friends and Supporters, Years before I ever ran for public office, I volunteered for the pro-life family organization, The Family Foundation. Protecting innocent life was and still is one of the top issues for me as a pro-life mother of 4. When I ran for the Virginia Senate for the first time in 2015, protecting innocent life was top on my list and front and center as one of my platforms. 8 years later, protecting innocent life is still one of my top platforms.
In 2022, when SCOTUS overturned Roe versus Wade, I stood strong and committed to protecting innocent life, even when some Republican legislators chose not to do so.
Some shirked the very responsibility SCOTUS delegated to states and wouldn't allow pro-life bills to come to a vote. Some Republicans tried to avoid the topic altogether, listening to political consultants instead of defending the innocent and unborn.
Some ran away from the topic and even condemned me for carrying the Life Begins at Conception Act, telling me "there would be consequences". I believe doing the right thing is always the right thing to do, no matter what the consequences. I'm able to defend my position and will go toe-to-toe with anyone who wants to defend killing babies. Infanticide should never be protected.
I'm unapologetically pro-life and pro-family. Period. I believe life begins at conception and all innocent life must be protected. Despite serving in a Democrat-controlled Senate, I continued to introduce the Life Begins and Conception Act in 2023 and The Pain Capable Unborn Child Protection Act in both 2020 and 2022.
I also voted against the so called Equal Rights Amendment that was sponsored by my current Republican opponent and former seatmate Glen Sturtevant, who is challenging me for the opportunity to continue to represent Chesterfield and Colonial Heights in Senate District 12.
What exactly is the ERA or Equal Rights Amendment?
This failed amendment seeks to enshrine abortion in the US Constitution and promotes gender fluidity. Conservative women worked hard for decades at the state and federal level to keep this amendment from becoming a reality. I know many of them and have worked with them for over a decade.
The first female state senator in Virginia, the late Senator Eva Mae Scott fought against this amendment. In fact, she was redistricted out of her seat because of her fight against the ERA. She knew what the liberals were up to and didn't buy their lies and deception. Well intentioned Senator Glen Sturtevant thought he knew better and fell for the lies of the left, who are ushering in abortion on demand, late term abortion and gender fluidity.
Glen both sponsored and voted for this atrocity and didn't reverse course when other Republican legislators and conservative stakeholders tried to reason with him to rescind his efforts and reverse course. He wouldn't listen.
---

| Former Senator Glen Sturtevant in his own words defended the "so called" ERA
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001RULgMBHpqmiCjSTHInM99IFMnQIvI9QJDf6DAtBX_6PHAIUqOh8C2NN2P88mchNZvKvTdUtrSiALz5Dv0YAQ8RnAsueNXcMiNkDIL6pc98l0Ixg_jbJVJIwyD6SQdGFmAdvxZHYt2Q2p1BwDofiDJA==&c=hyfHnhrN4XfVzBYYb_UK8CQpxRMQky8mT1Z8TM1kD4oDMRqczhiHYg==&ch=wOpXWR6Pt-gm6JgpUvPRrHxj1QH0NpvsZzJoPu2tUEHvlA_SEg5KAw==)
---
| Former State Senator Glen Sturtevant doesn't want you to remember his voting record but here he is in his own words trying to defend his position on the ERA.
As his former seatmate, I remember his voting record quite well. I tried to convince him to abandon supporting the "so called" ERA. Now he is challenging me, his seatmate who tried to help him do the right thing.
He ran as a pro-life Catholic. Yet he sponsored and voted for abortion and gender fluidity. He didn't just vote for the "so-called" Equal Rights Amendment, he sponsored it. He was advised by many conservative stakeholders to abandon his position but he didn't listen.
He lost in 2019. Why? Because he lost pro-life voters who he abandoned.
You can trust me, not just by my words but by my actions.
Now Sturtevant wants your support, so does Tina Ramirez who also claims to be pro-life, but has no voting record. Why would you support anyone else when I have a solid, conservative voting record you can trust? Why risk it?
My 8 year voting record supports my statements. When I ran for re-election to the Virginia Senate in 2019, I was endorsed by the National Right to Life Committee and the Virginia Society for Human Life and I look forward to receiving their endorsement again in 2023. Now is not the time for naivete or inexperience.
In addition to supporting life, I support parental rights to include school choice and a parent's rights to be involved in their child's education. Parents, who love their children, are the ultimate authority regarding their child's education, not government.
As a former homeschool mom who homeschooled our 4 children for 8 years, I support school choice. The money should follow the child. And a child's education should never be limited by their zip code.
Parents not government know what is best for their children, which is why in 2022 I co-sponsored and passed [SB739 Public elementary and secondary schools, etc.; provision of in-person instruction](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001RULgMBHpqmiCjSTHInM99IFMnQIvI9QJDf6DAtBX_6PHAIUqOh8C2NN2P88mchNZCGfd_J-4E2rNQzCvhRW9gKN92MyTSCQNJh_DN2RhS7mJUJexjC19iOxkGglqIEa9XVuOwvNLr4LFrOEyes3X64hUBWtbECphDGWOLXiDdr5r4KfbsSef-ursC_NYnsguPkyFSUcnebs=&c=hyfHnhrN4XfVzBYYb_UK8CQpxRMQky8mT1Z8TM1kD4oDMRqczhiHYg==&ch=wOpXWR6Pt-gm6JgpUvPRrHxj1QH0NpvsZzJoPu2tUEHvlA_SEg5KAw==), to end the mask mandate for our public school students and give parents the option as to whether or not their child had to wear a mask to public school or not and to require 5 full days of learning each week, both in school and in person.
In 2023, I introduced [SB823 Parental Choice Education Savings Accounts](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001RULgMBHpqmiCjSTHInM99IFMnQIvI9QJDf6DAtBX_6PHAIUqOh8C2NN2P88mchNZoOWFsxLxDeR66sOLtmkSaETNj4gELa_MKFsW98tG4QdAD758R7gOBO2a3YmALOZkLUq2PD-9M0x1DBaZfI25wMvobNC80PEtGJon2GPyoUMoQPWVACoXmILU5fYmp5c6a5YqYm_AakQ=&c=hyfHnhrN4XfVzBYYb_UK8CQpxRMQky8mT1Z8TM1kD4oDMRqczhiHYg==&ch=wOpXWR6Pt-gm6JgpUvPRrHxj1QH0NpvsZzJoPu2tUEHvlA_SEg5KAw==). The bill permits the parent to use the moneys in such account for certain education-related expenses of the student, including tuition, deposits, fees, and required textbooks at a private, sectarian or nonsectarian elementary or secondary school or preschool.
I also introduced [SB832 Parental Rights to Educational Transparency](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001RULgMBHpqmiCjSTHInM99IFMnQIvI9QJDf6DAtBX_6PHAIUqOh8C2C1bIccQmY7WIECp1WAs91exLpGbJ5mn4xIDGiqFy8Me56HdaD4mEMwwJV_zxXKW9cMjovkTn5iLb5hmwocijPsHr7jmRFLX9iHQwArJy--vJ0_5EqqVIKovk8vdDLpazDOLFVSy1IhOPRRMSPL5FaQ=&c=hyfHnhrN4XfVzBYYb_UK8CQpxRMQky8mT1Z8TM1kD4oDMRqczhiHYg==&ch=wOpXWR6Pt-gm6JgpUvPRrHxj1QH0NpvsZzJoPu2tUEHvlA_SEg5KAw==), which declares that the parent of any student enrolled in a public elementary or secondary school in the Commonwealth has the right to: (i) access a list of any printed or audiovisual instructional material; (ii) participate in the textbook review and approval process; (iii) receive notice of and give informed consent to any counseling or guidance program offered to his child by the school; (iv) access his child's education records; (v) receive advance, written notice of any school-sponsored field trip, activity, assembly, presentation, or other event at which his child's attendance is invited, including a clear opt-out provision; (vi) receive advance notice of any questionnaire or survey to be administered to his child; (vii) receive notice of and attend any public meeting of the school board in the local school division in which his child is enrolled; (viii) review the annual school division budget and expenditures; and (ix) petition the circuit court with jurisdiction over such child's local school division to review an action of the school board if the parent is aggrieved by such action.
The bill also requires the Department of Education to develop and make available to each school board model policies and procedures to ensure compliance with the parental right to review and exempt his child from any printed or audiovisual instructional materials used as a part of the curriculum in any class or course in which such parent's child is enrolled. The bill also revises existing policies and duties of each local school board in accordance with the parental rights to transparency in education.
I sponsored [SB1463 Requiring Parental Advisory Warnings for Sexually Explicit Materials in Public School Libraries](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001RULgMBHpqmiCjSTHInM99IFMnQIvI9QJDf6DAtBX_6PHAIUqOh8C2NN2P88mchNZLkb-6H6ErC5jlND0Luw6bYO6ohRKMR9zSHfoqpzil8IjuOrSkOoZmU5t2gUUXOWgugbKd2xFUOBNut28csgryZAC0OW7w-5dUalU-n6DDw4IFRvvF96kK7gZBDGAL0wiJcs-07I0qyw=&c=hyfHnhrN4XfVzBYYb_UK8CQpxRMQky8mT1Z8TM1kD4oDMRqczhiHYg==&ch=wOpXWR6Pt-gm6JgpUvPRrHxj1QH0NpvsZzJoPu2tUEHvlA_SEg5KAw==), which requires a parental advisory label to be affixed to the front of any book that contains sexually explicit content, and that is made available to minors in any public elementary or secondary school library,
In 2022, I sponsored [SB635 Public Charter Schools](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001RULgMBHpqmiCjSTHInM99IFMnQIvI9QJDf6DAtBX_6PHAIUqOh8C2ONcutKJrnn-1F2FZcIrb2QdbYq0q9lo7MuyDVlhQun_Mk3ZskVxBugYpnf5JJOobDvnS-uDt5TW7SyN6XvaN_1CZloelSXEgJtZRdNFOcU5C3Gh9XdhoFKDGuuXXZzXizWo8JFNsIWbVwVhyTMOScg=&c=hyfHnhrN4XfVzBYYb_UK8CQpxRMQky8mT1Z8TM1kD4oDMRqczhiHYg==&ch=wOpXWR6Pt-gm6JgpUvPRrHxj1QH0NpvsZzJoPu2tUEHvlA_SEg5KAw==) at the request of the Governor to give our students more options instead of a one size fits all cookie cutter approach to education.
All of these educational choice bills were killed by the Senate Health and Education Committee, which is stacked 9 Democrats to 6 Republicans.
You can also count on me to vote for HB511 the [Tebow Bill](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001RULgMBHpqmiCjSTHInM99IFMnQIvI9QJDf6DAtBX_6PHAIUqOh8C2NN2P88mchNZJTfImVfL_lhVW2esi4b-rtfOWKp4Xc4pHfV3eP7RiquOpEGPkvCBT0-7s3yXaGxP4nFAvYOl5O39qS9v1V0F9W0FTfgUM5BxIiJcDYRa4-f53pqxJyuSAdsLT5J1dHA5hiKh9R-qMtr9whZPkEbOdw==&c=hyfHnhrN4XfVzBYYb_UK8CQpxRMQky8mT1Z8TM1kD4oDMRqczhiHYg==&ch=wOpXWR6Pt-gm6JgpUvPRrHxj1QH0NpvsZzJoPu2tUEHvlA_SEg5KAw==), which was sponsored by Delegate Marie March and would have given homeschool students access to public school sports, but it died in the House because Republican Delegate Carrie Coyner voted against it. She was not only the deciding vote that killed the bill but the only Republican to vote against HB511. ALL 50 Republicans in the House voted for the Tebow Bill. If Coyner had voted for the Tebow Bill, the bill would have passed the House.
Someone told me, I will vote for anyone as long as they have an R by their name. While any R is better than a D, not all Republicans are the same and in a Republican Primary, it's important to know if you've voting for a Mitt Romney Republican or a Lauren Boebert Republican. You KNOW where I stand.
President Ronald Reagan said to, "Trust but Verify." I agree with that statement. Like many of you, I'm skeptical of anyone running for office.
Will they stay true to the promises they made on the campaign trail? Will they change their loyalty once elected and become more peer dependent and go along to get along or will they stay true to the people?
If I have a choice between voting for a candidate with a proven conservative voting record and one who has nothing but rhetoric, I'm supporting the candidate with a proven conservative voting record.
Prove to me that you're a conservative by your actions.
Too many times, once these candidates get elected they abandon campaign promises and become part of the political ruling class, putting personal ambition and wanting to fit in with their legislative colleagues, who didn't vote them into office. They go "soft" on issues that are important to you and got them elected.
I'm the only proven conservative running in Senate District 12 that you can trust. In fact, I've got a solid 8 year voting record to show that I walk the talk.
The Family Foundation 100%, lifetime Virginia Citizen's Defense League 100%, lifetime NRA A rating, lifetime American Conservative Union, conservative achievement award, lifetime
You know that I will stand strong on our conservative values and won't back down or give in to peer pressure to go against concerns and issues that are important to you. I'm tried, tested and proven and don't falter under pressure.
I'm proven, tested, tried and true. You can trust me.
In this edition, we've listed the Family Foundation scorecards so that you can see for yourself who shares your conservative values. Trust but verify. We've included the links so that you can verify for yourself.

This is something I have to do every time I've run for re-election.
Senate District 12 includes most of Chesterfield and all of Colonial Heights. Do you live in Bon Air, North Chesterfield, Woodlake, Summerlake or Smoketree? You live in SD12. For a complete map of the district please click the link above.
You must actually sign a physical petition. This is not something that can be done online.
You can sign in person at our next event or we can email the form to you. If we mail you the form, you can ask family members to sign the petition and mail the form back to us, but please remember to get the form notarized at your bank before you mail it back to us. Here's our address:
Friends of Amanda Chase Attention: Petition PO Box 5811 Midlothian, VA 23112
If you'd like to sign my petition, you can stop by my senate office, see me at church on Sunday in the foyer in between services or attend one of our upcoming events like our Tea Party meetings, held on the first of each month. Thanks to all who have already signed and asked to collect signatures for us.
We must turn in our signatures before Monday, March 20 at noon sharp to the GOP District Chair.
Please reach out to Mike at Mike@chaseforva.com.

clean_body: Voting Records Matter | | | | | | == | CUT TO THE CHASE WITH SENATOR CHASE Weekly Campaign Newsletter PROVEN, TESTED, TRUSTED 3 1/2 months left until Election Day Tuesday, June 20 | | | | | | VOTING RECORDS MATTER | My Conservative Pro-Family Voting Record | | | Senator Amanda Chase Senator Chase has represented Chesterfield, Colonial Heights and Amelia Counties in the Senate since first elected in 2015, almost 8 years. Amanda and her husband Mike have been married over 30 years and have 4 grown children. Amanda and Mike both grew up in Bon Air and have lived most of their lives in Chesterfield County, since 1979. Amanda has been rated as one of the most conservative Senators in Virginia by the American Conservative Union and has a lifetime score of 100% with the Family Foundation, VCDL and A with the NRA. She is also a champion in the General Assembly for pushing back against vaccine and mask mandates, calling for a full investigation into the 2020 Presidential Election, parental rights in education, medical freedom, protecting innocent life, protecting gun rights and help for our veterans. | | | | American Conservative Union Chairman, Matt Schlapp, presents Senator Amanda Chase a Conservative Achievement Award in 2019 | | == | Congratulations to Senator Amanda Chase! 7th Year in a Row Conservative Achievement Award! CPAC's American Conservative Union Scorecards for 2022 are in! | My 8 Year Conservative Voting Record ON PRO-FAMILY ISSUES 100% pro-life | Dear Friends and Supporters, Years before I ever ran for public office, I volunteered for the pro-life family organization, The Family Foundation. Protecting innocent life was and still is one of the top issues for me as a pro-life mother of 4. When I ran for the Virginia Senate for the first time in 2015, protecting innocent life was top on my list and front and center as one of my platforms. 8 years later, protecting innocent life is still one of my top platforms. In 2022, when SCOTUS overturned Roe versus Wade, I stood strong and committed to protecting innocent life, even when some Republican legislators chose not to do so. Some shirked the very responsibility SCOTUS delegated to states and wouldn't allow pro-life bills to come to a vote. Some Republicans tried to avoid the topic altogether, listening to political consultants instead of defending the innocent and unborn. Some ran away from the topic and even condemned me for carrying the Life Begins at Conception Act, telling me "there would be consequences". I believe doing the right thing is always the right thing to do, no matter what the consequences. I'm able to defend my position and will go toe-to-toe with anyone who wants to defend killing babies. Infanticide should never be protected. I'm unapologetically pro-life and pro-family. Period. I believe life begins at conception and all innocent life must be protected. Despite serving in a Democrat-controlled Senate, I continued to introduce the Life Begins and Conception Act in 2023 and The Pain Capable Unborn Child Protection Act in both 2020 and 2022. I also voted against the so called Equal Rights Amendment that was sponsored by my current Republican opponent and former seatmate Glen Sturtevant, who is challenging me for the opportunity to continue to represent Chesterfield and Colonial Heights in Senate District 12. What exactly is the ERA or Equal Rights Amendment? This failed amendment seeks to enshrine abortion in the US Constitution and promotes gender fluidity. Conservative women worked hard for decades at the state and federal level to keep this amendment from becoming a reality. I know many of them and have worked with them for over a decade. The first female state senator in Virginia, the late Senator Eva Mae Scott fought against this amendment. In fact, she was redistricted out of her seat because of her fight against the ERA. She knew what the liberals were up to and didn't buy their lies and deception. Well intentioned Senator Glen Sturtevant thought he knew better and fell for the lies of the left, who are ushering in abortion on demand, late term abortion and gender fluidity. Glen both sponsored and voted for this atrocity and didn't reverse course when other Republican legislators and conservative stakeholders tried to reason with him to rescind his efforts and reverse course. He wouldn't listen. | | | == | | | == | | | == | Former State Senator Glen Sturtevant rode around the state with Democrat legislators Delegate Jennifer Carroll Foy and Delegate Jennifer McClellan rallying for the "so-called" Equal Rights Amendment. | | Glen Sturtevant sponsored the "so called" Equal Rights Amendment | | Glen Sturtevant voted for the "so called" Equal Rights Amendment | | Former Senator Glen Sturtevant in his own words defended the "so called" ERA | == | Former State Senator Glen Sturtevant doesn't want you to remember his voting record but here he is in his own words trying to defend his position on the ERA. As his former seatmate, I remember his voting record quite well. I tried to convince him to abandon supporting the "so called" ERA. Now he is challenging me, his seatmate who tried to help him do the right thing. He ran as a pro-life Catholic. Yet he sponsored and voted for abortion and gender fluidity. He didn't just vote for the "so-called" Equal Rights Amendment, he sponsored it. He was advised by many conservative stakeholders to abandon his position but he didn't listen. He lost in 2019. Why? Because he lost pro-life voters who he abandoned. You can trust me, not just by my words but by my actions. Now Sturtevant wants your support, so does Tina Ramirez who also claims to be pro-life, but has no voting record. Why would you support anyone else when I have a solid, conservative voting record you can trust? Why risk it? My 8 year voting record supports my statements. When I ran for re-election to the Virginia Senate in 2019, I was endorsed by the National Right to Life Committee and the Virginia Society for Human Life and I look forward to receiving their endorsement again in 2023. Now is not the time for naivete or inexperience. In addition to supporting life, I support parental rights to include school choice and a parent's rights to be involved in their child's education. Parents, who love their children, are the ultimate authority regarding their child's education, not government. As a former homeschool mom who homeschooled our 4 children for 8 years, I support school choice. The money should follow the child. And a child's education should never be limited by their zip code. Parents not government know what is best for their children, which is why in 2022 I co-sponsored and passed ==, to end the mask mandate for our public school students and give parents the option as to whether or not their child had to wear a mask to public school or not and to require 5 full days of learning each week, both in school and in person. In 2023, I introduced ==. The bill permits the parent to use the moneys in such account for certain education-related expenses of the student, including tuition, deposits, fees, and required textbooks at a private, sectarian or nonsectarian elementary or secondary school or preschool. I also introduced ==, which declares that the parent of any student enrolled in a public elementary or secondary school in the Commonwealth has the right to: (i) access a list of any printed or audiovisual instructional material; (ii) participate in the textbook review and approval process; (iii) receive notice of and give informed consent to any counseling or guidance program offered to his child by the school; (iv) access his child's education records; (v) receive advance, written notice of any school-sponsored field trip, activity, assembly, presentation, or other event at which his child's attendance is invited, including a clear opt-out provision; (vi) receive advance notice of any questionnaire or survey to be administered to his child; (vii) receive notice of and attend any public meeting of the school board in the local school division in which his child is enrolled; (viii) review the annual school division budget and expenditures; and (ix) petition the circuit court with jurisdiction over such child's local school division to review an action of the school board if the parent is aggrieved by such action. The bill also requires the Department of Education to develop and make available to each school board model policies and procedures to ensure compliance with the parental right to review and exempt his child from any printed or audiovisual instructional materials used as a part of the curriculum in any class or course in which such parent's child is enrolled. The bill also revises existing policies and duties of each local school board in accordance with the parental rights to transparency in education. I sponsored ==, which requires a parental advisory label to be affixed to the front of any book that contains sexually explicit content, and that is made available to minors in any public elementary or secondary school library, In 2022, I sponsored == at the request of the Governor to give our students more options instead of a one size fits all cookie cutter approach to education. All of these educational choice bills were killed by the Senate Health and Education Committee, which is stacked 9 Democrats to 6 Republicans. You can also count on me to vote for HB511 the ==, which was sponsored by Delegate Marie March and would have given homeschool students access to public school sports, but it died in the House because Republican Delegate Carrie Coyner voted against it. She was not only the deciding vote that killed the bill but the only Republican to vote against HB511. ALL 50 Republicans in the House voted for the Tebow Bill. If Coyner had voted for the Tebow Bill, the bill would have passed the House. Someone told me, I will vote for anyone as long as they have an R by their name. While any R is better than a D, not all Republicans are the same and in a Republican Primary, it's important to know if you've voting for a Mitt Romney Republican or a Lauren Boebert Republican. You KNOW where I stand. President Ronald Reagan said to, "Trust but Verify." I agree with that statement. Like many of you, I'm skeptical of anyone running for office. Will they stay true to the promises they made on the campaign trail? Will they change their loyalty once elected and become more peer dependent and go along to get along or will they stay true to the people? If I have a choice between voting for a candidate with a proven conservative voting record and one who has nothing but rhetoric, I'm supporting the candidate with a proven conservative voting record. Prove to me that you're a conservative by your actions. Too many times, once these candidates get elected they abandon campaign promises and become part of the political ruling class, putting personal ambition and wanting to fit in with their legislative colleagues, who didn't vote them into office. They go "soft" on issues that are important to you and got them elected. I'm the only proven conservative running in Senate District 12 that you can trust. In fact, I've got a solid 8 year voting record to show that I walk the talk. The Family Foundation 100%, lifetime Virginia Citizen's Defense League 100%, lifetime NRA A rating, lifetime American Conservative Union, conservative achievement award, lifetime You know that I will stand strong on our conservative values and won't back down or give in to peer pressure to go against concerns and issues that are important to you. I'm tried, tested and proven and don't falter under pressure. I'm proven, tested, tried and true. You can trust me. In this edition, we've listed the Family Foundation scorecards so that you can see for yourself who shares your conservative values. Trust but verify. We've included the links so that you can verify for yourself. | MY LEGISLATIVE VOTING RECORD | THE FAMILY FOUNDATION SCORECARD | The Family Foundation Action General Assembly Report Card is designed to disclose important legislator votes and present an opportunity for citizens to compare their state legislators' voting records. With this analysis, citizens can make informed decisions at the polls and be well prepared to lobby and work with elected officials. Covering a wide range of issues, this publication helps citizens hold representatives accountable--illustrating their worldview as it pertains to values issues. | CHASE 100% STURTEVANT 88% | 2016-2017 100% CHASE 88% STURTEVANT no record RAMIREZ | | | | == | CHASE 100% STURTEVANT 76% | 2018-2019 100% CHASE 76% STURTEVANT no record RAMIREZ | | | | == | CHASE 100% STURTEVANT N/A | 2020-2021 100% CHASE voted out STURTEVANT no record RAMIREZ | | | | == | Senator Amanda Chase GOING ON THE RECORD FOR LIFE | CNN INTERVIEW | == | Senate Floor Speech on the Anniversary of Roe versus Wade 2022 | == | CHANNEL 3 INTERVIEW | == | Life Begins at Conception Video Press Release | == | Senator Chase presents SR87 Life Begins at Conception Bill before the Senate Rules Committee | My pro-life Senate bill was the last pro-life Senate bill to be killed in the Senate, escaping Senator Louise Lucas's Senate Health and Education Committee. Even though I knew the Democrat-controlled 13 to 4 Senate Rules Committee would kill or "pass by indefinitely," I wanted to put the Democrats on the record for "not supporting the science." This was a simple bill that simply says that "life begins at fertilization", which is supported as fact by 85% of scientists. Listen to the extreme and irrational comments by Planned Parenthood who clearly didn't read the bill. | == | How can I help Amanda? | Is there anything you can do today to help us win this June 20 Primary? | | | == | How much do you value your freedom? Most candidates are bought for and paid for by political action committees and lobbyists. Not me. I rely on the generous donations from you. So please chip in today. Anyone can donate and you don't have to live in the district to give. You may not be able to vote for me, but I can still vote for you. Successful campaigns are expensive unfortunately. Many people are surprised to find out that we have to raise our own money to run for public office. I've heard people express that they didn't know about a campaign and I know it was because the candidate didn't raise enough money to get the word out. Signs, mailers, radio, tv and social media ads let people know there's an election coming and to get out and vote. In order to communicate to voters it costs money. If 5,000 people gave $100 we would be able to fully fund my campaign. Would you please donate $100 today or more if you are able? | | | == | Want to Walk your Neighborhood with Amanda? Please help us collect signatures to get my name on the ballot, drop off some campaign literature along with an invitation to our upcoming community event. Our goal is to reach a different neighborhood every week. Beginning Saturday, March 11 and every Saturday going forward we will go door to door from 10am to 5pm in 2 shifts. For the first shift please arrive at 9:30am for instructions and we will begin walking at 10am. This first shift is from 10am until 1pm. For the second shift please arrive at 1:30pm for instructions and we will begin walking at 2pm. The second shift is from 2pm to 5pm. We will meet at the Arby's on Hull Street parking lot located at: 6541 Bayside Ln, Midlothian, VA 23112 If you are able to walk your neighborhood during the week, please reach out to Chris and mailto:chris@chaseforva.com. | | | == | What is a "Meet and Greet"? A "meet and "greet" is simply inviting your friends and neighbors over for dessert and coffee so that I can meet them and answer their questions. This is an opportunity for voters to interview the candidate. I look forward to meeting your friends and neighbors and personally asking for their vote. Would you be willing to open your home, business or neighborhood clubhouse so that I can meet your friends and neighbors? Know that we will help you with invitations and getting the word out about your meet and greet. We encourage hosts to keep it simple. Dessert and coffee are perfect and the event should only last about an hour and a half. We've found that Tuesday and Thursday evenings or Sunday late afternoons work best. If this interests you please reach out to Debbie at mailto:debbie@chaseforva.com to schedule a date. | | Can I vote for Amanda? | Do you live in SD12 in Chesterfield? Yes | Do you live in Colonial Heights? Yes | If you live in Chesterfield, you will either live in Senate District 12 or Senate District 15. Please review the map below. The purple area is Senate District 12. The orange area represents Senate District 15. If you live in Senate District 12, you can vote for me. All of Colonial Heights can vote for me. | | | | == | WHERE IS THE 12th SENATE DISTRICT? | The 12th Senatorial District includes most of Chesterfield and all of Colonial Heights. Anyone who is registered to vote in Colonial Heights can vote for me on Tuesday, June 20 at their regular polling location between the hours of 6am and 7pm. In the 12th Senatorial District, there are 51 voting precincts in Chesterfield and 5 voting precincts in Colonial Heights. Click on the link below to see a map of each Chesterfield precinct within SD 12. | | | == | List of 51 Chesterfield Precincts in SD12 | == at Carver College and Career Academy at 12400 Branders Bridge Rd == at Gates Elementary at 10001 Courthouse Road == at Ironbridge Baptist Church at 10900 Iron Bridge Rd VSU Multipurpose Center at 20809 Second Ave == at Cloverhill Library Matoaca Middle School == at Chesdin Landing Golf == at Second Branch Baptist Church == at Bethia United Methodist Church == at Cosby High School == at Manchester High School == at Mt Herman Baptist Church == at Cosby High School == at Matoaca High School == at Bailey Bridge Middle School == at Alberta Smith Elementary == at Spring Run Elementary == at Second Branch Baptist == at Chesterfield Baptist Church == at Swift Creek Baptist Church == at Brandermill Church Swift Creek Elementary Gordon Elementary == at Monacan High School == at Reams Elementary School == at Central Chesterfield Ruritan Swift Creek Middle == at Cloverhill High School == at Shenandoah Community Evergreen Elementary == at Tomahawk Middle School == at Tomahawk Middle School Woolridge Elementary School == == at Cloverhill Elementary == at Brighton Green Pool Crestwood Elementary School == at Midlothian High School == at Robious Elementary School St Michael's School == at Greenfield Elementary School Church of the Redeemer == at Robious Middle School == at Community of Grace == at Midlothian Middle School == at Salisbury Presbyterian Watkins Elementary School == == the Islamic Center == | List of Colonial Heights Precincts in SD12 | Colonial Heights Precinct 1 at Community Building 157 Roanoke Ave. Colonial Heights Precinct 2 at Colonial Heights Middle School 500 Conduit Rd. Colonial Heights Precinct 3 at Lakeview Elementary School 401 Taswell Ave. Colonial Heights Precinct 4 at Colonial Heights High School Technical Center 3451 Conduit Rd. Colonial Heights Precinct 5 at Tussing Elementary School 5501 Conduit Rd. | | | == | Still not sure? Click below | | | | == | | How can I help Amanda? | | | ---|--- | Please Sign The Petition to Get My Name on the Ballot | In order to get my name on the ballot we must get at least 250 registered voters who live in == to sign my petition. This is something I have to do every time I've run for re-election. Senate District 12 includes most of Chesterfield and all of Colonial Heights. Do you live in Bon Air, North Chesterfield, Woodlake, Summerlake or Smoketree? You live in SD12. For a complete map of the district please click the link above. You must actually sign a physical petition. This is not something that can be done online. You can sign in person at our next event or we can email the form to you. If we mail you the form, you can ask family members to sign the petition and mail the form back to us, but please remember to get the form notarized at your bank before you mail it back to us. Here's our address: Friends of Amanda Chase Attention: Petition PO Box 5811 Midlothian, VA 23112 If you'd like to sign my petition, you can stop by my senate office, see me at church on Sunday in the foyer in between services or attend one of our upcoming events like our Tea Party meetings, held on the first of each month. Thanks to all who have already signed and asked to collect signatures for us. We must turn in our signatures before Monday, March 20 at noon sharp to the GOP District Chair. Please reach out to Mike at Mike@chaseforva.com. | DO YOU HAVE A GOOD SIGN LOCATION? | | Mike and I are putting up 4 by 8s across Senate District 12 which includes Chesterfield and Colonial Heights and will continue until all of our 4 by 8s have been placed. Please reach out to Mike if you have a good 4 by 8 location on a main road or want to help put up 4 by 8s at mike@chaseforva.com. Please remember to include the contact information of the property owner. We respect property rights and only put up signs where we have permission from the home or business owner. Thanks to all who've already provided such great locations on main thoroughfares throughout Chesterfield and Colonial Heights. The primary is Tuesday, June 20. If you'd like to add your business as a pick up location, please reach out to Mike at mike@chaseforva.com | | | ---|--- | Want a Yard Sign for your Yard? | Yard signs are also available for pick up at these location during their business hours: Bob Moate's Sports Shop 10418 Hull Street Road Midlothian, VA 23112 Hours: Monday-Thursday 8:30-6pm Friday 9-7pm Saturday 8-5pm Sunday 8-4pm Dance's Sporting Goods 570 Southpark Blvd Colonial Heights, VA 23834 Hours: Weekdays 8am to 6pm Saturday 10-4pm Sunday 12-4pm Or click here to request a sign: mailto:mike@chaseforva.com | ENDORSEMENTS | I'm super thankful for these elected officials who have already endorsed my re-election campaign, and if you'd like to add your name to the list, please reach out to Chris@chaseforva.com. That said, the most important endorsement I could ask for is yours. Today, I humbly ask for your support as I seek re-election to the Virginia Senate. | President Donald J Trump Congressman Bob Good Former Congressman Dave Brat Former Congressman Virgil Goode Bishop EW Jackson Delegate John McGuire Colonial Heights City Council John Wood Colonial Heights City Council Dr. Laura Poe Amelia County Sheriff Ricky Walker Arizona Senator Sonny Borrelli Pennsylvania Senator and Republican Nominee for Governor Doug Mastriano Former Chesterfield Board of Supervisors Don Sowder Former Chesterfield Commonwealth's Attorney Billy Davenport Former Chesterfield Commissioner of Revenue Joe Horbal John Frederick, The John Frederick Radio Network Dick Heller, D.C. vs. Heller, Supreme Court Gun Freedom Case | President Donald J Trump | == | "You're doing a great job... I'm going to be with YOU on your next campaign. Just let me know when you're ready." \- President Donald J Trump | Congressman Bob Good | | "Today, I'm announcing my official endorsement of Virginia State Senator Amanda Chase as she seeks re-election to the Virginia State Senate. | "Amanda is an unapologetic conservative who isn't afraid to take on the tough issues that are most important to the people. She's a solid vote that conservatives can count on and a trusted ally of the people she represents. She's a champion and a leader on so many issues here in Virginia and nationally to include election integrity, protecting our constitutional rights, like the Second Amendment, pushing back against mask and vaccine mandates and voting against all tax increases. We need to send our known fighter and firebrand back to the Virginia Senate so she can continue to make a difference in the lives of every Virginian." | Former Congressman Dave Brat | | "Today, I'm announcing my endorsement of Virginia State Senator Amanda Chase as she seeks re-election to the Virginia State Senate. Senator Chase supported me before it was cool to be Pro Faith, Pro Constitution, Pro Free Markets and Pro American. She has courage. I ran on and supported the Republican Creed of Virginia. | "Many say they support this platform, but not everyone votes like it or messages constantly on it like Senator Chase. • Free enterprise system - No special interests • All individuals are entitled to equal rights, justice, opportunities • Fiscal responsibility and budgetary restraint at all levels • Observing Constitutional limitations • Peace is best preserved through a strong national defense • Faith in God, as recognized by our Founding Fathers, is essential to the moral fiber of the Nation "We the People" are tired of politicians who do not see the dangers right in front of us; from out of control schools to election integrity. We want people that can clearly articulate what these issues are and boldly lead the people to action. If we elect leaders that hold fast to the Virginia Republican Creed, there is no way we can end up with runaway spending, crime in the streets, crushing regulations and an economy that favors the Big and Powerful over small business and our great citizens. "We the People" overwhelmingly love God, Country and our fellow citizens. But love does not mean that anything goes. We the People demand that politicians are accountable to us. They work for us. Senator Amanda Chase will listen to the vast majority who want truth and sanity back in Government. Unfortunately, that will take a fight, and we have someone who will fight the good fight to ensure that the City on a Hill remains bright for us and a light for generations to come." | Former Congressman Virgil Goode | | | " "I'm honored to support Senator Amanda Chase for re-election to the Virginia Senate. " | Delegate John McGuire | | "I'm proud to endorse Senator Amanda Chase for re-election to the Virginia Senate in district 12. Everyone knows Amanda is a fighter who stands strong and doesn't waiver on our conservative issues. " | "She has a lifelong 7 year voting record you can trust. 100 percent rating with the Family Foundation, 100 percent rating with the Virginia Citizens Defense League and an 'A' rating with the NRA. She's also been one of the top rated conservative Senators, if not the most conservative in most years, at CPAC by the American Conservative Union. As Chairwoman of the National Election Integrity Caucus she has led the efforts in Virginia to put the guardrails back on our elections and even introduced a bill calling for a full forensic audit of Virginia. It was an honor to work with her and successfully pass legislation that Governor Youngkin asked us to both carry to exempt retired military benefits for our veterans up to $40,000. This was a bill she originally introduced in the Senate in 2021 and I was proud to work with her and see this bill finally pass under a Republican Governor. " | Former Delegate Brenda Pogge | | "I endorse Senator Amanda Chase for re-election to the Virginia Senate in Distict 12. As a former delegate, I have served together with Amanda in the General Assembly and also on a commission. She is a strong reliable conservative voice and vote, and a woman of strong faith in God and the founding of our country on Judeo-Christian values. She not only votes to protect the unborn, she introduces legislation to defend life and clearly articulates why it's never the government's role to fund abortions with taxpayer dollars." | "Amanda is not a typical politician, she's a mom of 4 who deeply cares for the people in her community. Education and school choice is a top priority. She homeschooled her children when they were young and truly understands the importance of parents having input in their children's education and fully supports parental rights and choice in education over government mandates. She not only supports school choice, she lived it. As a senator, Amanda Chase has an impeccable 7 year conservative voting record. Whether you're talking about pro-life, gun rights, defending our Constitution and individual rights, fighting for real election integrity, voting for limited government, voting against all tax increases and fully funding our law enforcement, Senator Chase checks all the boxes. I stand with Senator Amanda Chase and I encourage you to do so too." | Bishop E.W. Jackson | | "I have known Senator Amanda Chase personally and professionally for over 15 years. It is my pleasure and honor to endorse her for re-election to the Virginia Senate in District 12. Senator Chase is a courageous Christian voice for faith, family, and freedom. | "Amanda is a bold champion for our conservative values and has an impeccable 7-year voting record to prove it. She is pro-God, pro-life, pro-2A, pro-family, pro-election integrity, pro-business, and pro-law and order. She is a pro-life leader for legislation in the Virginia Senate such as the pain capable and heart beat bills, and she has a 100 percent lifetime rating with the Family Foundation. Amanda exposed and spoke against the so-called Equal Rights Amendment that would enshrine abortion as well as gender identity politics into the Virginia Constitution. Senator Chase is not just a Republican placeholder; she's a conservative firebrand who is not afraid to speak truth to power. I stand with Amanda because she's a true conservative who stands with us." | Pennsylvania Senator Doug Mastriano | | | "I'm honored to endorse Amanda Chase for re-election to the Virginia Senate. As the founder of the National Election Integrity she's a champion for election integrity both nationally and in Virginia. She's a pleasure to work with and knows how to get the job done." Pennsylvania State Senator and Republican nominee Doug Mastriano | Arizona Senator Sonny Borelli | | "Senator Amanda Chase is the only Virginia legislator who actually came out to Arizona to watch our full forensic audit, and again when our full report was released to the Senate. She has my full support as she seeks re-election to the Virginia State Senate." | "It makes no sense that anyone claiming to be a Republican and who truly cares about election integrity would challenge her given everything she's done for election integrity, not just in Virginia but nationally. She's been actively engaged in getting answers to what happened in 2020, implementing those solutions in legislation for Virginia, to include a full forensic audit, and founding the National Election Integrity Caucus to support other legislators across the country. While we welcome anyone who wants to expose the lies and deception that took place in 2020, Amanda has been the leading work horse for election integrity in Virginia , not a show horse like her opponents who have recently taken an interest in putting the guardrails back on Virginia elections. If you truly support real election integrity I highly recommend you support Senator Amanda Chase for re-election to the Virginia Senate." | Colonial Heights City Councilman John Wood | | | "I am honored to support Senator Amanda Chase for re-election to the Virginia Senate." | Colonial Heights City Councilman Dr. Laura Poe | | "As a small business owner, professor, and a member of the Colonial Heights City Council, I'm proud to stand with and endorse Senator Chase in her run for re-election to the Virginia Senate in Senate District 12." | Senator Chase has represented my district since her election in 2016 and continues to push legislation to protect our individual freedoms and rights, such as overreaching COVID mandates, voting against tax increases, and preservation of the election process. She stands firm in her faith and positions amidst controversy and challenges. Her voting record is consistent and matches the promises she makes to her constituents. I support her continued service for District 12 as our Senator and provide her with my full endorsement." | Amelia County Sheriff Ricky Walker | | "I endorse Senator Amanda Chase as she seeks re-election to the Virginia Senate in district 12. Senator Chase has represented Amelia County for the past 7 years and I've had the pleasure to work with her on a number of issues." | "She's present in the community, an active listener who cares about public safety and keeping our community safe. She's an effective legislator who fully supports public safety, our sheriffs and law enforcement. Her 7 year voting record shows she supports the tools that help our sheriffs and law enforcement effectively do what they were trained to do to keep our communities safe. She's co-patroned pay raises for our sheriffs, voted to support qualified immunity, protected our law enforcement from personal financial devastation and spoken on the Senate floor about the importance of fully funding our law enforcement and against defunding the police. I stand with Senator Amanda Chase because she has a 7 year voting record of supporting our law enforcement." | Former Chesterfield Board of Supervisors Don Sowder | | | "I endorse Amanda Chase for a continuation of her successful results in putting the needs of her constituents ahead of going with the flow. We need Virginia Senators who put partisan politics aside and focus on people rather than politics. Amanda is just that person. She is courageously ahead of the curve in introducing and shepherding into law issues that meet peoples needs rather than seeking out easy and non-controversial issues. We need Amanda for another term in the Virginia Senate." | Former Chesterfield Commonwealth Attorney Billy Davenport | | "I have had the pleasure of knowing Senator Amanda Chase for the past fifteen years. She is a Christian lady who lives her life by "Founding Father Values", the values that made our Country great." | "She stands firm on our Constitutional Rights and amid much adversity she never wavers on the First and Second Amendments which give us the free exercise of religion, freedom of speech, the press, and the right to peacefully assemble to and petition the government for a redress of grievances, and the right to keep and bear arms. Without the first two amendments all the other amendments would have much less effect. She will not be silenced as she forcefully and effectively represents the people of her district. She is a true Statesman who will not violate her oath of office and the trust of her constituents." | Former Chesterfield Commissioner of Revenue Joe Horbal | | "I endorse Virginia State Senator Amanda Chase as she seeks re-election to the Senate of Virginia in Senate District 12. I've known Amanda both professionally and personally for over 15 years and know her to be a person of good character and integrity. " | "Even before she was in the state senate she consistently stood up for what was right and wasn't afraid to challenge the status quo. That said, she knows how to get things done and is a reliable and consistent vote for the people. She stands strongly for the Constitution and doing right by the people she represents. Amanda has been an effective Virginia State Senator who has consistently represented us well and without influence by special interest groups. She has accomplished much since she was first elected in 2015. She works tirelessly for the people to represent their needs and we need to re-elect her to the Virginia Senate to be our voice." | Dick Heller, D.C. vs. Heller, Supreme Court Gun Freedom Case | | | "I know of no harder working person in Virginia so capable and willing to fight for freedom and our foundational God-given natural rights through self-preservation through our United States Constitutional Second Amendment than Senator Amanda Chase." | You are invited to Join Team Chase | | Now that session is over, I can fully focus on running for re-election. If you're interested in scheduling a meet and greet please email Debbie at mailto:debbie@chaseforva.com. Also, if you'd like to help out, we're looking for people to collect signatures so that I can get my name on the ballot. I need 250 signatures. If you're interested, please reach out to Mike at mailto:mike@chaseforva.com. We hope to see you soon! For God & Country, | | SAVE THE DATE | GIVE TODAY | | | | == | MARCH 6 | Legislative Update for the 2023 Session | Please join us for an overview of the 2023 General Assembly Session. What happened during the legislative session? How does the legislation passed effect you? Things you need to know. Any legislator who would like to speak should reach out to Debbie at debbie@chaseforva.com to RSVP. | | MARCH 16 | Senate District 12 Candidate Debate | | MARCH 20 AT NOON | | In order to get my name on the ballot we must get at least 250 registered voters who live in == to sign my petition. This is something I have to do every time I've run for re-election. Thanks to all who have already signed and asked to collect signatures for us. If you'd like to sign my petition, you can stop by my senate office, see me at church on Sunday in the foyer in between services or attend one of our upcoming events like our Tea Party meetings, held on the first of each month. We can also email you the form. You can ask family members to sign the petition and mail the form back to us, but please remember to get the form notarized at your bank before you mail it back to us. We must turn in our signatures before Monday, March 20 at noon sharp to the GOP District Chair. You will want to turn in your notarized forms well before this date, as this is the date we must turn all forms into the chair. Please reach out to Mike at Mike@chaseforva.com if you have questions or call our campaign cell at 804 380 0009. | MARCH 31 | | APRIL 12 RECONVENE | | APRIL 27 Meet & Greet at Summerlake in Chesterfield County | | "Summerlake Meet and Greet" Chesterfield County Clubhouse at Summer Lake 17040 Lake Summer Drive Moseley, VA 23120 5:30 to 6pm VIP Reception 6pm to 7:30pm Mark your calendar Stay tuned for details | MAY 11 Meet & Greet at Chesdin Landing in Chesterfield County | | | | | | | Meet and Greet at Chesdin Landing in Chesterfield County Lake Chesdin Golf Club 21801 Lake Chesdin Parkway Chesterfield, VA 23838 5:30 to 6pm VIP Reception 6pm to 7:30pm Mark your calendar Stay tuned for details | JUNE 20 | | | | | | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | SESSION NEWSLETTERS | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | HOW DO I VOTE? | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | Authorized and Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase | | Friends of Amanda Chase | P.O. name: Lisa Blunt Rochester
subject: memory lane
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lisa Blunt Rochester for CongressLisa Blunt Rochester for Congress
body:
Counting on you.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr-em-mar2023?refcode=EM_FR_20230306_bday_logo [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr-em-mar2023?refcode=EM_FR_20230306_bday_logo] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr-em-mar2023?refcode=EM_FR_20230306_bday_logo [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr-em-mar2023?refcode=EM_FR_20230306_bday_logo]Hi there,
I recently celebrated my birthday and as I do every year, I took a trip down memory lane. To know where you're going you should remember where you've been, right?
As a little girl, one of the people I looked up to was my grandmother – my mother’s mother. She worked at a ball-bearing plant as a steelworker at a time when there were very few women in that position. She went on to become a union leader and an activist, and was a leader in the fight to end drugs and gun violence in her community. Her leadership and fearlessness is something I think about often.
As a young person, I was lucky that my first bosses – the ones that really took me under their wings – were very strong women who guided me and pushed me. They reinforced the values that my family instilled in me: to work hard, create a level playing field, and extend a hand to those who need it. Those values guided my work as Delaware’s Secretary of Labor, and as the state’s first African-American Deputy Secretary of Health and Social Services. Now, I take those values with me every day in Congress.
For me, birthdays are a time to reflect on growth and goals. If there is one thing I'm taking with me this year, it's how far we've come and how much work there is still left to do.
As Beyoncé said, “...if you don’t take the time to think about or analyze your life you’ll never realize all the dots that are all connected.” I’m so grateful that our dots are connected and that you're with me for another trip around the sun.
Your help laying the groundwork for the year ahead would mean the world. Could you chip in $10 or whatever feels right to you so that I can continue fighting for hard working families like yours? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr-em-mar2023?refcode=EM_FR_20230306_bday]
Cheers to what the future holds,
Lisa
Congresswoman Lisa Blunt Rochester is a Democrat representing the First State, Delaware. She served as the National Co-Chair of the Biden-Harris campaign and Co-Chair of the DCCC ‘Red to Blue’ program. Lisa is running for reelection to continue fighting for our health care, leading the charge toward environmental justice, and advocating for working families like hers.
DONATE MONTHLY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr-em-mar2023?refcode=EM_FR_20230306_bday_bio&refcode2=biobox&recurring=1]
Paid for by Lisa Blunt Rochester for CongressLisa Blunt Rochester for Congress
PO BOX 9767
Wilmington, DE 19810
United States

name: Kristina Zahorik
subject: IDCCA Party Builder Awards Reception - Important Event Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Illinois Democratic County Chairs' Association
body:
We are rescheduling our Party Builder Awards Reception.

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/cU2UO-QPXXoOC3p36OWqKI4hRBZ618aVRLw9Ja1AP3c=/y2lPgw7YLBDBWKsbMKKyKl5ic9zcBY13arMGtt2cMHk=?refcode=EM_EV_230306PBReschedule_KZ_90DO_6_NG_N_Logo)
Dear Friends:

We regret to inform you we are rescheduling our Party Builder Awards Reception, originally set for tonight, Monday, March 6th in Chicago.

The IDCCA stands with our brothers and sisters in Organized Labor. Due to ongoing contract negotiations at the venue, we must postpone the event.

We look forward to celebrating our Labor Leader honorees, Deborah Cosey-Lane and Mike Macellaio, and seeing friends from across the state at a future date.

We will update you as soon as possible and look forward to celebrating with you then. We will be in touch once we have a new date, time, and location for the Party Builder Awards. All tickets and pledges will be honored at our rescheduled event.

If you have any questions, please don't hesitate to reach out.

Thank you for your loyal support and understanding.

Best wishes,

Kristina Zahorik
IDCCA President

clean_body: We are rescheduling our Party Builder Awards Reception. Dear Friends: We regret to inform you we are rescheduling our Party Builder Awards Reception, originally set for tonight, Monday, March 6th in Chicago. The IDCCA stands with our brothers and sisters in Organized Labor. Due to ongoing contract negotiations at the venue, we must postpone the event. We look forward to celebrating our Labor Leader honorees, Deborah Cosey-Lane and Mike Macellaio, and seeing friends from across the state at a future date. We will update you as soon as possible and look forward to celebrating with you then. We will be in touch once we have a new date, time, and location for the Party Builder Awards. All tickets and pledges will be honored at our rescheduled event. If you have any questions, please don't hesitate to reach out. Thank you for your loyal support and understanding. Dear Friends, It hasn't been long since I was sworn into office, and yet House Republicans are already preparing to target this district in 2024.

They recently flocked to the Ritz Carlton in Key Biscayne for their winter retreat. At that gathering, they passed out these:
---
---
This district was the closest congressional race in Florida last year and one of the closest in the nation. House Republicans think that makes me an easy target to defeat in 2024.

I'm focused on governing and doing what's best for the people of Broward and Palm Beach counties. Everyday I try to find ways to pass bipartisan policies. The Republican majority hasn’t passed a single substantive bill this year in Congress and for some reason have no agenda to help the American people. Still, they vacationed at the Ritz Carlton to figure out how to convince people in Florida District 23 that they deserve more members to do nothing. **[But I must be honest - I will need help countering the wave of lies this group of MAGA Republicans is already plotting. name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: We don’t know if Kyrsten Sinema is going to run for reelection to the Senate, but we have to raise resources in the expectation she will. On the other side is democracy-attacking fascist, Kari Lake, who has expressed interest in the race for Arizona’s Senate seat even though she has yet to admit she lost the governor’s race. Meanwhile, a great Democrat, Ruben Gallego is running and he’s asking for support.
body:
Turning Arizona blue
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5e0b1142-85b2-4bcb-a131-eea0d552adc4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **As the nature of the 2024 races start to clear up a bit, one thing has become even more crystal clear: We must elect Ruben Gallego to the U.S. Senate seat in Arizona.** _We do not yet know if turncoat Kyrsten Sinema is going to run, but we have to raise resources in the expectation she will. And on the other side is democracy-attacking fascist, Kari Lake, who has expressed interest in this race even though she has yet to admit she lost the last one._ [**Can you please join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to this "Marine, Latino...with a record of standing up for working people." He's what we always wish our Senators would be.** ](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb7577c7c-2013-4076-9e44-86bd5d91616b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _I can tell you why Ruben Gallego is great, as I've done before_ , but I'll let him tell you about himself. This is from a recent email of his: _Impulsive, emotional decisions are out of character for me.

I am the guy who had a four-year plan to get into Harvard even though my family was dirt poor. So I thought long and hard about the decision to run for the United States Senate.

I prepared for it long before the possibility of Senator Sinema’s party switch. I came to the conclusion that as a Marine, a Latino, and someone with a record of standing up for working people, we can build a coalition that can win a 2-way race, 3-way race, 27-way race...doesn’t matter.

The only open question was whether the grassroots support would be there. And I thought it would be. So far, I’ve been right._
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T68a4cc0e-8afa-41c8-b779-95f4d28a42d8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| **_We have an exceptional candidate who's progressive as hell in a swing state, Arizona, turning blue. If Gallego does great in 2024, so will President Biden. | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Power back in the people’s hands
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
I’m looking for founding members of our new cultural movement to revive the American Dream.

| [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zh5s7atdg71reskhg48c6gj1t5t0muu1e7b2fon8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0shh62p73cph2bs)
Fellow American,

I am sending you a different type of political email - _mostly because I am not building your typical political campaign._

When I launched my campaign for President, I knew that for us to win on November 5, 2024, we needed to change the way conservatives reach Americans–that's why I am looking to recruit founding members of our new cultural movement to revive the American Dream.

[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z00q7va3vnqngp6g4ci2bhv93gbi88kv3rgv87u0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0shh62p73cph2bs)
I am running for President to restore the voices of everyday citizens. It's time to stand up to the ruling aristocracy. They try to divide and conquer, **but that won't work if we stay united.**

How do we start? Bottom-up, grassroots support. **[A $1 donation will help us take back the Oval Office from politicians and put it back in the people's hands.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z790hgip58j2seodkqaq49v4h9bmk93l6iptgpn8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0shh62p73cph2bs)**

Change starts today. Thanks for joining this movement.

For The American Dream,

[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zf2mdoulr4raul61iiefav4ttntbierkodad3000_rp22sh2s8i66pr0shh62p73cph2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

P.S. To build this new movement, I need people just like you to sign on to be a founding member. **[That means a little bit of money (as little as $1) from as many people who are looking for a change. Join Team Vivek today to become a founding member!](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zk0bcluimekgstc5fuqru89fe4qaars1ooe75n9g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0shh62p73cph2bs)**

| [** BECOME A
FOUNDING MEMBER ->**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zjfsuon0sluq8asmsmhp35jabjbglmotnb8pva60_rp22sh2s8i66pr0shh62p73cph2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zidgbchoelnnacupqbsuleecasuqalffkfdtom5g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0shh62p73cph2bs)

---

| [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zha95gi9m1refqtltbdmo5s4udltc4oo4e2qvaqo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0shh62p73cph2bs)| [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zcb9vcud9e442lrs1m7rf45sdgt3jctcp6msjgqg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0shh62p73cph2bs)| [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zjpjpe0fk4vjd3jit7s0qd7nnc14ici7r69vguso_rp22sh2s8i66pr0shh62p73cph2bs)
---|---|---

| Paid for by Vivek 2024
---

Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. name: ELECTION INTEGRITY EMERGENCY (From House Republicans)
subject: It’s official: illegal immigrants can now VOTE in U.S. elections
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
We can’t believe this is happening in America.

Foreign agents too...
|
---
| | | **It’s official: non-citizens and foreign agents can now VOTE in U.S. elections.**

Thanks to a bunch of Radical Democrats on the DC City Council, a new law allows practically ANYONE who lives in our nation’s capital to vote in U.S. elections.

_That means illegal immigrants and Chinese diplomats may now choose _our_ elected leaders._

This is not hyperbole. This is not fake news. This is an election integrity emergency!

_**[This new law JUST went into effect so we need your gut reaction as soon as possible.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c651168%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2b%2f1s4Hdbh5tsUP1XlbkSpw&sysid=1 "This new law JUST went
into effect so we need your gut reaction as soon as possible.")**_ So we launched an official poll to collect honest and unfiltered feedback from the American People. Whether you live in DC or not, this development impacts ALL AMERICANS - so we need to hear from you right here and right now:
**PLEASE RESPOND IMMEDIATELY: Should illegal immigrants and foreign agents be allowed to vote in U.S. elections?**** **

---
| | | [SUBMIT YOUR RESPONSE HERE](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c651169%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=pB3WEIW1zEzSRN%2f%2b0%2bX9Mg&sysid=1 "button")
---

We can’t believe this is happening in America.

These Radical Democrats are exploiting every ounce of power to plunge our country into chaos and greenlight their anti-American agenda. _Just imagine the ambassador of Communist China casting a ballot to choose _our_ elected representatives! _

If this was happening in your city, what would you do?

This is your chance to help shape the future of election integrity in America. _**[Submit your response to our official poll- your answer will be immediately transmitted to Republican HQ and PERSONALLY REVIEWED by House Majority Leader Steve Scalise and his team.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c651160%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zfoRZuD46zG69ouSS4fr1g&sysid=1 "Submit your response to
our official poll – your answer will be immediately transmitted to
Republican HQ and PERSONALLY REVIEWED by House Majority Leader Steve Scalise and
his team. ")**_

Thanks for all you’ve done for your country.

Onward,

House Republicans

---
|
---

body:

---
| |

| |
## **What if California were to be the first state to re-establish free and fair elections?! You might think that's highly unlikely, but there are hopeful things in the works!**

Tuesday March 7th @ 7:00 AM, PST I will be interviewing Linda Paine, the co-founder of The Election Integrity Project-California. She's going to give us an update on their lawsuit against the state of California for their implementation of unconstitutional election laws. Tune in to The Rachel Hamm Show on Rumble only to hear the latest news!

Then, on Friday March 10th @ 7:00 AM, PST I will be interviewing some ladies who have some powerful personal stories to share with you. They also have very important information for you about what the CURRENT hospital Covid protocols are. You need to hear their stories so you're equipped to navigate any potential hospital stays for you or your loved ones.

## All shows may be viewed on my Rumble Channel. If you are not already subscribed to The Rachel Hamm Show, head over to Rumble and hit "subscribe" here: Rumble: [https://rumble.com/user/TheRachelHammShow](https://RachelHamm.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b2a4361c438b0f1b15ed7ec95&id=d55c6ba096&e=5fa0631807 "The Rachel Hamm Show on Rumble")

subject: My bank just TERMINATED our account with ZERO explanation

body:
This is UNBELIEVABLE

|
---
| | | Friend, this is UNBELIEVABLE!

**My bank just TERMINATED our account with ZERO explanation.**

I think you can guess the real reason they closed down our account... _**[These woke corporations will never stop censoring Conservatives unless WE STOP THEM!](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zq1bu08lc9pkk4uf2l02ahibcjaoqc2fhj4lvfvg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0shh6aor0cjh2bs "These woke corporations will never stop censoring Conservatives unless WE STOP THEM!")**_

The backlash from Conservatives across the country has been overwhelming to say the least. If you're as mad as I am about these woke corporations trying to cancel us for what we believe in, I'm personally asking you to join me right here and right now. | | | [STAND WITH DONALD TRUMP JR.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zom3t5666apmlju60vg8vbeqrblb0hda6vrc3bdg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0shh6aor0cjh2bs "button")
---

Just imagine if you ran a business and a woke bank quietly closed down your account without cause, then told you to call a generic support line if you wanted to be helped... _What would you do?_

**We - as proud Conservatives - must come together to stop these woke corporations from censoring us before it's too late.**

_**[Are you with me on this? I hope so.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zge45n26sopr5q1mu35auicckkj7k5m24su27pb8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0shh6aor0cjh2bs "Are you with me on this? I hope so.")**_

Thank you,
Donald Trump Jr.
