name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Power back in the people’s hands
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
I’m looking for founding members of our new cultural movement to revive the American Dream.

| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z0c02a45u5gcfmsu3628fah4gsgctqg7peg76g08_rp22sh2s8i66pr0shh6aor2c5h2bs)
Fellow American,

I am sending you a different type of political email - _mostly because I am not building your typical political campaign._

When I launched my campaign for President, I knew that for us to win on November 5, 2024, we needed to change the way conservatives reach Americans–that's why I am looking to recruit founding members of our new cultural movement to revive the American Dream.

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zggg65a561ebalcqmlit0k36otghqb3r8kogctq8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0shh6aor2c5h2bs)
I am running for President to restore the voices of everyday citizens. It's time to stand up to the ruling aristocracy. They try to divide and conquer, **but that won't work if we stay united.**

How do we start? Bottom-up, grassroots support. **[A $1 donation will help us take back the Oval Office from politicians and put it back in the people's hands.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zg48eis1da2u4uhc38rplf2k2m2mqtq2l2n3asdo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0shh6aor2c5h2bs)**

Change starts today. Thanks for joining this movement.

For The American Dream,

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z05oblv894lkbenvjf6m4t8bq8ae4ef78flmik6o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0shh6aor2c5h2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

P.S. To build this new movement, I need people just like you to sign on to be a founding member. **[That means a little bit of money (as little as $1) from as many people who are looking for a change. Join Team Vivek today to become a founding member!](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z67hg2tb1fkr8hs5v5lbm3ttjieuf3qeqdkh054g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0shh6aor2c5h2bs)**

| [** BECOME A
FOUNDING MEMBER ->**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zjo9hta1p4n6ve8gmio2k6ibk73renufc2iuf6i8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0shh6aor2c5h2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zhromh36tnppuk0dk8slov7ntupprmu472pptuqg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0shh6aor2c5h2bs)

---

| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zg24jim8ih6pmau07lck94uchpc6cs5prbqsgn8g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0shh6aor2c5h2bs)| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zr26rsmgvj9cd6jaqikemk5bkik4u5fu9al86bng_rp22sh2s8i66pr0shh6aor2c5h2bs)| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z1qaip268s7g5ufg2bt8eg2ma6mk131h1go9bu7o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0shh6aor2c5h2bs)
---|---|---

| Paid for by Vivek 2024
---

Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. subject: Humbly asking for your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59736516/394954746/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZjRjNzc2MC0xZmJjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=84J-LRXZE-Xjq2tdSMsF0NLOcBmM62dZ-3RUlcpLciM=&emci=e7dc9bb3-e0b9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=bf4c7760-1fbc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=43566853)

| | We aren’t going to lie to you, Peter, stopping Marjorie Taylor Greene won’t be easy.

**_But it’s necessary._**

If you’re like us, you’ve been watching with horror as she spews hatred, antisemitic and racist conspiracy theories, election denial, and COVID-19 lies, and you’ve been terrified as she grows in power to become not just the face of Trump’s MAGA alliance but the entire GOP.

name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: My worst fears have been confirmed:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
| |
---
| | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62399930:6Y7MQaGnN:m:1:3331421248:7530CB7BC202B73F4F2FBEDD7ED406FA:r)
---

I need 30 seconds of your time to go over some numbers.

The FEC has raised the maximum contribution limit for campaigns by 14%. Democrats have always held a fundraising advantage. Especially in the last 15 years, the Silicon Valley and Wall Street Crowd have cozied up to Pelosi, Biden, Hilary and the Obamas. That ultra wealthy donor base is what helped Pelosi raise $1 BILLION for Democrats during her time in House Leadership.

Now let's imagine what kind of impact 14% can have when you have that kind of money in your corner.

You can see it already- Democrats are outraging Republicans TWO TO ONE.

They have in their coffers, DOUBLE, what we have in ours.

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62399930:6Y7MQaGnN:m:1:3331421248:7530CB7BC202B73F4F2FBEDD7ED406FA:r)
---

Democrats' fundraising capability is greater today than it has EVER been and they will use it to promote and support the most contentious issues facing Americans today.

We are looking Armageddon in the face.

I'm reaching out to EVERY donor in the Republican Party. With our new found disadvantage, the ONLY way to fight back is if EVERY Conservative patriot steps up and does their part. Without YOU, we lose.

Can I ask you to chip in whatever you can give to help us fight the liberal elite and stand up for America?

---
| | [RUSH EMERGENCY SUPPORT](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62399930:6Y7MQaGnN:m:1:3331421248:7530CB7BC202B73F4F2FBEDD7ED406FA:r)
---

Thank you,
Speaker Kevin McCarthy

---
| |
* * *
---

| Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
---

Bakersfield, CA 93389

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: CTA March 6: End Joe Biden’s Executive Overreach
body:
| | |
---
This week, use our Align Act campaigns to put a stop to Joe Biden’s rule by phone and pen. Join our millions of Tea Party Patriots in action to stop Joe Biden’s end-around the Senate for a backdoor pandemic powers treaty, block Biden’s Big Labor nominee, and IMPEACH two of the worst disappearing acts in the Swamp–Pete Buttigieg and Alejandro Mayorkas!
---
| | |
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
---
Biden is stocking our federal agencies with hundreds of radical leftists. The next ideological activist nominated by Joe Biden is Julie Su to lead the Department of Labor. In her time as a top official in the California state government, she oversaw billions in taxpayer losses to fraud and supported the Big Labor initiative to cripple services like Uber and Doordash. Julie Su’s record makes it clear: She is the wrong person to serve as the Secretary of Labor! [**Sign the petition**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)**to urge your Senators to BLOCK this Big Labor nomination!**
---
[TAKE ACTION](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-XOuT3vVvoYh-Q)
---
|
---
| | Major American corporations are[ ](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-7_9S3Q)[expanding](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) their business in communist China, despite the nation’s long standing[ ](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ2MzY2JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/bYyd3iOuz2goYtzZfwqPYA)[hostility towards American interests.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ2MzY2JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/qNQWXWTyu_shT_7x-fKaZw) McDonald’s, Starbucks, Tyson Foods and Ralph Lauren are just a few of the corporations planning to expand in China. One of the lessons gained in the failure to deter Russia from invading Ukraine is to avoid giving an authoritarian regime[ “coercive power” over your economy](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-oPigg), former National Security Adviser HR McMaster told the first House Select Committee on China hearing last Tuesday. Nevertheless, McDonald’s plans to open 900 stores in China this year, more than twice as many stores in China as it plans to open in the United States. Starbucks, in particular, is counting on rapid growth in the Chinese market to open 3,000 new stores by 2025. Gen. McMaster warned in his testimony that the United States is in a "difficult position," in terms of deterring the Chinese Communist Party (CCP) from attacking Taiwan, which American military commanders have said[ could take place by 2027](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._-5jTC0e8R5o_rsE9KQ) or[ even as soon as 2025.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._-mGpQ)
---
| | |
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
---
The Constitution protects America from a reckless president in many ways, including requiring Senate approval for war powers and treaties. Joe Biden is attempting to circumvent the Constitution by committing the United States to a new World Health Organization treaty (WHO CA+) that would create a new super-organization with the power to shut down the world economy during a pandemic. **If you believe America should maintain our sovereignty, DEMAND A VOTE in the Senate on the WHO CA+ treaty – and then**[**urge your senators to VOTE NO**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._eNxTegubThV5ecnSqnAjQ)**!**
---
[TAKE ACTION](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
---
|
---
| | American taxpayers are[ footing the bill](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ2MzY2JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/iSaGnUC_JK2JnpqWuFJoBQ) to keep illegal aliens in their communities. An investigation conducted by the Immigration Reform Law Institute reveals that communities are being charged more than $66 million by the Vera Institute of Justice to help illegal aliens fight their deportations from the United States. To accomplish this task, Vera uses a simple strategy whereby it lobbies left-leaning cities and counties to pay for lawyers to represent foreigners in deportation proceedings. Other localities are then encouraged to join an association of governments who spend those public funds on lawyers to represent non-citizens contesting deportation orders. Vera is tied to “Dark Money” billionaire George Soros and leftwing organizations like the Tides Foundation, the Rockefeller Family Fund and the Carnegie Corporation of New York. The Biden administration[ ](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ2MzY2JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/YvbDBuLnJDLS9BAcEOR3Jw)[gave](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ2MzY2JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/3R56SRo0X0vjMMOPBVjhyQ) the Vera Institute of Justice[ ](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-us0Kw)[more than](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) $200 million in federal contracts in 2022 alone to fund legal representation for illegal aliens.
---
| | |
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._57Q)
---
What is it with Joe Biden and choosing the weakest officials for America’s biggest problems? He made Kamala Harris the czar of the border and she laughed it off. Now he’s standing by Transportation Secretary Pete Buttigieg, who ignored a chemical spill and train derailment in Ohio and failed to take action during the supply chain crisis. America deserves leaders who take action! [**Sign the petition to urge your Member of Congress to impeach Pete Buttigieg**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-9nlqpnQ)**!**
---
[TAKE ACTION](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
---
|
---
| | The Left's most prominent billionaire megadonors [are financially benefiting](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-s6uMfP-TCw) from Joe Biden's taxpayer-funded push to build a "clean energy economy." The Biden administration’s Department of Energy recently announced nearly $3 billion in taxpayer-guaranteed loans to two electric battery companies,[ Redwood Materials](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) and[ Ioneer](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.), which are backed by seed funding from Bill Gates, Laurene Powell Jobs and other left-wing billionaires. The left-leaning tycoons now stand to reap an enormous return, a _Washington Free Beacon_ analysis finds. Ioneer’s stock price skyrocketed by 33%, for example, after the announcement of its $700 million DOE loan. DOE’s green energy funds are flowing to groups bankrolled by the same people who financed dark money organizations that helped get Biden elected. Redwood[ raised](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) $700 million from a "carefully selected group of strategic investors," including Gates and Powell Jobs, who participated in the fundraising round through their investment firms. Ioneer, meanwhile, boasts Texas billionaire John Arnold as a major shareholder, according to an October[ SEC filing](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._cDV557gaQ). In 2020, Gates donated[ $127 million to the leftist Arabella Advisors dark money network](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ2MzY2JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/To__bPnSU6MhwKIEd7ACUQ), while Powell Jobs[ donated more than $2 million](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) to left-leaning candidates and political groups.
---
| | |
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
---
Homeland Security Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas swore an oath to defend and secure the United States of America, and to uphold the Constitution of the United States. Instead, he has presided over a reckless abandonment of border security and immigration enforcement, at the expense of the Constitution and the security of the United States. [**Sign the petition**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)**to urge your Members of Congress to impeach and remove Mayorkas!**
---
[TAKE ACTION](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
---
|
---
| | [CONTRIBUTE](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._uk5biQ)
---
|
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMwNjUtMWJlODA1YTA2MzhjNGI2MGIwZGZkMjMxYTE2MzRlNjEiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMzIiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3d3dy50ZWFwYXJ0eXBhdHJpb3RzLm9yZy8_bWlkPTQ2MzY2JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/-7jY8aJUQb6RtD35zYiOGg)
---
| | Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc. operates as a social welfare organization under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. Contributions to Tea Party Patriots Action are not deductible as charitable contributions for income tax purposes.
---
| | © 2023 [Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-yyqp-TJwcE7SJq6v3cp3A)2295 Towne Lake Pkwy Ste 116-314, Woodstock, GA 30189 **[View This Email in a Browser](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/m/1/49109489/02-b23065-1be805a0638c4b60b0dfd231a1634e61/54/505/fcde7627-e7ea-4528-bdc0-26c0116bf91b)** | **[Manage Subscriptions or Unsubscribe](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)**
---

In 2020, Gates donated, while Powell Jobs to left-leaning candidates and political groups. | | | Homeland Security Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas swore an oath to defend and secure the United States of America, and to uphold the Constitution of the United States. name: 2023 Membership Services
subject: We need you to STAY on our team. Renew your 2023 Membership today!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Your 3 year membership streak is at risk.

|
---
| | | |
Hey, we haven't heard from you. Are you letting your 3 year Republican Membership streak disappear or did you miss our email?
---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zs55uk1lg2itid7ctp79mr7tirr336v4aravt110_rp22sh2s8i66pr0shh6eob2c3h2bs "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---

The 2022 Midterm Elections were one of the toughest battles we've seen**, but the worst has yet to come. **

**The Democrats are prepared to pull out all the stops to attempt to stop us from implementing sound Conservative policies, and worse yet, they 're going to try to stop us from taking back the White House. **

**Now more than ever before, we need you to STAY on our team,_[but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zu0s6mf88mn503a7dn2lso3tcrmraqclgb7ra3l0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0shh6eob2c3h2bs "but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership.")_**

---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z9gt4mbf5f5j15l73esa2mpd04t69lj2nionpjvg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0shh6eob2c3h2bs "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---
You've fought with us for three consecutive years, and we need you to stick by our side as we go into battle this year.

We can't DEFEND OUR MAJORITY without you. **_[Renew your membership before it's too late >>>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2ze3qnair9r5ui6f8grnl440fl35t9dpo0q1t06oo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0shh6eob2c3h2bs "Renew your membership before it’s too late")_**

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Mark, 2023 Membership Services
Date: Tues, Dec 20, 2022 at 11:32 AM
Subject: We hate to see you go.

Friend, for the last **3 years** , you have stood by House Republicans' side. You've supported the Conservative fight furiously and consistently through every battle we've seen,**but we have bad news for you. **

**It pains me to tell you that for the first time ever, you 've failed to renew your Republican Membership and have lost your support streak.**

There's good news though, Friend. I spoke with leadership about this exceptional circumstance, and they have allowed us to extend our Membership renewal period to **_[11:59 PM TONIGHT.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zkqici8u0jtv12enkm9bsb55cfo1sl4up16eo8o8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0shh6eob2c3h2bs "11:59 PM TONIGHT.")_**

**_[Are you going to renew your House Majority Membership and become a sustained Republican Member for 4 consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left, and you are going to let your streak fade away?](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zhu4r14ndjlprptejpnme3ukvr7tcnnjn2ms5qf8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0shh6eob2c3h2bs "Are you going to renew your House Majority Membership and become a sustained Republican Member for 4 consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left, and you are going to let your streak fade away?")_**
---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zqnt56vl35vl967tseffl3cmumbg2nhrqao7vm40_rp22sh2s8i66pr0shh6eob2c3h2bs "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---
| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z7ahh7f4frh9entk7r3a4fb7u1uska1sius2tdr0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0shh6eob2c3h2bs "ORDER NOW")
---

We just finished the biggest battle of our lives. The 2022 Midterm Elections took everything we had, and the fight still isn't over. More than ever, we need our strongest grassroots supporters on our side.

You only have until **_[11:59 PM](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z3c6mkq72v1tfv50ios30vb60us6cd6dlgj69hso_rp22sh2s8i66pr0shh6eob2c3h2bs "11:59 PM")_** to let us know if you plan to stand against the Left and their radical socialist agenda for a 3rd year in a row. **_[Renew before it's too late.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zrn24a0fa1m5nok84kk6h567usj01sejbfbdah2g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0shh6eob2c3h2bs "Renew before it’s too late")_**

Americans across the country are counting on you. Don't let them down.

Thank you,

Mark, National Republican Membership Office
---
| | | | |
* * *
---
| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z9u69altr01i6gisucrr2c14lon3r7prughrbjm0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0shh6eob2c3h2bs "Membership Footer")
---

Join the conservative team working tirelessly to rebuild America! Retaking the Majority was just the first step. Now the next step towards saving our country is underway, and House Republicans need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. **[Step up and claim your 2023 House Majority Membership today!](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z8uilk5v7ti5sk35486fmec1pa5i0nfcf5v7pl4o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0shh6eob2c3h2bs "Step up and claim your 2023 House Majority Membership today!")**
---
| | | [DONATE](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z8br78prj86b2okk73oqhaq1uimo52f0ra07nf40_rp22sh2s8i66pr0shh6eob2c3h2bs "DONATE")
---
| | Thank you for your continued support and thank you for being a dedicated member of our team.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Catherine=20Engelbrecht=20|=20True=20the=20Vote?=
subject: True the Vote Wins Emergency Motion...this and more tonight on Locals
body:
Victory Means LA County Evidence Will Not Be Destroyed. | | | | | |
---
| | On Friday, February 25th, this was our headline....
**FILED: Emergency Motion Reveals Worldwide Conspiracy in Konnech Case**
On Friday, March 3rd.... our motion was granted! So, here’s the new headline!!
**ORDERED: Federal Court Orders Konnech to Preserve Electronic Devices**
---
What does this mean? As our filing attests, we’re extremely concerned about the preservation of evidence in a case that has already seen so much destruction. [**Our filing tells the tale.**](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=bc322e4c94&e=ad8cba7e98)
The Plaintiff, Konnech, sued us for defamation, accused us of committing a crime, supported the Court in sending Gregg Phillips and I to prison, all the while working overtime to cover its own tracks. This Federal Court Order assures that the evidence being held in Los Angeles County, if returned to Konnech, cannot be destroyed.
There are now three lawsuits involving Konnech:
1. Konnech, Inc. v. True the Vote, Catherine Engelbrecht, and Gregg Phillips
2. County of Los Angeles v. Eugene Yu (Konnech’s CEO)
3. Grant Bradley v. Konnech, Inc. and Eugene Yu (Grant Bradley is a former Konnechemployee)

I suspect there will be more before it’s all said and done.
At least 32 counties use Konnech software to manage their election processes, including some of the largest counties in the country. Here’s information attained through open records showing[**Konnech’s list of past and present customers**](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=5e6e7714e1&e=ad8cba7e98). As our affidavits attest, Konnech software is being developed in, run from, and monitored by, China. This must be stopped.
Early in 2021 we notified the FBI about Konnech. We worked to support the Bureau’s advancement of this case for the next 16 months. After that situation imploded, we were advised by a Special Agent to go public. We did ... and that set in motion a series of events that no one could have imagined.
Friday’s victory was very important. But the fight is far from over.
There are many other projects we’re working on (and many other lawsuits we’re involved in).
True the Vote has attracted many, many enemies. And it’s no secret, we’re the group the media loves to hate. Let them say and do what they will.
[](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=939f0c97f3&e=ad8cba7e98)
We’ll talk more about all this and much on Monday, March 6th, at 7p et, on Locals. It’s an hourish long live podcast where I talk about the latest news and take questions from participants. We’d love to have you join us if you can. [**You can click here to connect.**](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=686e7fd6c8&e=ad8cba7e98)****
The battle is for our elections. The war is for the Republic. We will not quit.
Ever onward -
[](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=6bd302124d&e=ad8cba7e98)
| |

---
| | |
---
_Copyright © 2023 True the Vote, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in for updates via the True the Vote website.

**Our mailing address is:**
True the VotePO Box 3109# 19128Houston, TX 77253-3109
[Add us to your address book](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/vcard?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=10c8087c36)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/profile?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=10c8087c36&e=ad8cba7e98&c=f4986f379b) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=10c8087c36&e=ad8cba7e98&c=f4986f379b).
|
---

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Impulsive decisions are out of character for me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
Friends –
Impulsive, emotional decisions are out of character for me.
I am the guy who had a four-year plan to get into Harvard even though my family was dirt poor.
So I thought long and hard about the decision to run for the United States Senate.
I prepared for it long before the possibility of Senator Sinema’s party switch.
I came to the conclusion that as a Marine, a Latino, and someone with a record of standing up for working people, we can build a coalition that can win a 2-way race, 3-way race, 27-way race... doesn’t matter.
The only open question was whether the grassroots support would be there. And I thought it would be. So far, I’ve been right.
So I am asking:
Can you please use this link to split $5, $10 or whatever you can afford between Serve America and my campaign? The amount isn’t as important as the donation, because it all adds up when we’re all chipping in. So please. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-gallego]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-gallego]
Thank you, and adiós,
Ruben

name: Col. Mike Waltz
subject: Watch your back
body:
| | | Peter,
---
They’re buying our farmland. They’re spying on our citizens. They’re surveilling our military.

**The Chinese Communist Party is EVERYWHERE, and every day, their influence on America is growing.**

_And as the enemy gets closer, what is Joe Biden doing?_ _Absolutely nothing._

**But even if the President of the United States refuses to act to keep America safe, I will.**

**We’re launching a STOP THE CCP Fund to support our mission to STOP Communist China, and we need to raise $1,000 in the next 24 HOURS to get it off the ground.**

clean_body: | | | Peter, They’re buying our farmland. They’re spying on our citizens. They’re surveilling our military. The Chinese Communist Party is EVERYWHERE, and every day, their influence on America is growing. And as the enemy gets closer, what is Joe Biden doing? Absolutely nothing. But even if the President of the United States refuses to act to keep America safe, I will. We’re launching a STOP THE CCP Fund to support our mission to STOP Communist China, and we need to raise $1,000 in the next 24 HOURS to get it off the ground. Peter, I know that sounds like a lot of money, but if every patriot pitches in just a little, we can meet our goal. This isn’t just about partisan politics, this is about keeping America safe. The Chinese Communist Party is determined to take us down and become the world’s dominant superpower. And if they succeed, it will have DIRE consequences for every single American. As a member of Congress, I’ve never lost sight of my mission to protect and defend America and our great Constitution, and now, I want YOU in the thick of it alongside me. In Service, Col. name: Jamal Raad, Co-founder Evergreen Action
subject: Our new executive director
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
Is someone you already know
| | [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/339?t=2&akid=13295%2E53494%2El2oGQu)
---
Friend, I'm beyond honored and excited to share the news with you today that Evergreen will continue its great work under the brilliant guidance of a new executive director, our current chief of staff, and my friend, Lena Moffitt.
You will hear directly from Lena tomorrow, but I wanted you to be among the first to learn about this transition from me.
**First, I want to say that I could not be more proud of Evergreen and all that we have accomplished together in the last three years.**
In 2020, we set out to prioritize the climate crisis in the Presidential election—and not only did we do that, but we went on to influence President Biden to adopt significant pieces of our Evergreen Climate Action Plan in what became the strongest climate platform of any administration. We then went on to successfully work with champions in Congress to pass the biggest investment in climate action in U.S. history. As part of a growing and powerful movement, you and the Evergreen team have been essential to this historic progress. And we're just getting started. **Throughout all of this, Evergreen has continued to grow as an organization and to find[ _new_](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4438?t=3&akid=13295%2E53494%2El2oGQu) and [_creative_](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4410?t=4&akid=13295%2E53494%2El2oGQu) [_ways_](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4439?t=5&akid=13295%2E53494%2El2oGQu) to make a [_big impact._](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4430?t=6&akid=13295%2E53494%2El2oGQu)**
It has been one of the greatest honors of my life to lead this team of people whom I deeply admire, and to help build this amazing community of followers and supporters.
Unfortunately, you are not getting rid of me. While I'm stepping out of day-to-day management of the organization, I will continue to serve Evergreen as a co-founder and senior advisor (alongside my friend and co-founder Sam Ricketts), helping fundraise, guiding our communications and digital work, and thinking about how we win on climate in 2024 and beyond.
When I co-founded Evergreen three years ago, I could only dream we would someday see our hard work succeed in all the ways it has. I know Evergreen's next stage of growth will have an executive director who will thoughtfully shepherd and help build coalitions across the climate movement—a leader, in other words, like Lena Moffitt. And I can't wait to see what we accomplish next.
Sincerely,
Jamal Raad
Co-founder and Senior Advisor, Evergreen
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](https://act.evergreenaction.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=13295%2E53494%2El2oGQu). Contributions or gifts to EVERGREEN ACTION are not tax deductible. | PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION

name: Pro Life Update
subject: Don’t miss this
body:
Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy.

| | | This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zqnklc316qhofsshbgjv81lbmi5pkpi09drote7o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0shh69oj4cjh2bs) Dear Fellow American, [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zsqd7kepitop8apk5lqcdh5gv6ihq4gd5beaop0o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0shh69oj4cjh2bs) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College’s world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zpac23ahts81v9f70icne2segcdbshi8gjqdhfh8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0shh69oj4cjh2bs) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth—Defending Liberty since 1844
---
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Change starts today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
I’m looking for founding members of our new cultural movement to revive the American Dream.

| [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c09021%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6EAxMd0d2eZrUAKYlGw1hA&sysid=1)
Fellow American,

I am sending you a different type of political email - _mostly because I am not building your typical political campaign._

When I launched my campaign for President, I knew that for us to win on November 5, 2024, we needed to change the way conservatives reach Americans-that's why I am looking to recruit founding members of our new cultural movement to revive the American Dream.

[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c09021%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6EAxMd0d2eZrUAKYlGw1hA&sysid=1)
I am running for President to restore the voices of everyday citizens. It's time to stand up to the ruling aristocracy. They try to divide and conquer, **but that won't work if we stay united.**

How do we start? Bottom-up, grassroots support. **[A $1 donation will help us take back the Oval Office from politicians and put it back in the people's hands.](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c09022%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=aJu%2bgfbnUzX%2fkL8h6D%2bkAA&sysid=1)**

Change starts today. Thanks for joining this movement.

For The American Dream,

[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c09021%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6EAxMd0d2eZrUAKYlGw1hA&sysid=1)
Vivek Ramaswamy

P.S. To build this new movement, I need people just like you to sign on to be a founding member. **[That means a little bit of money (as little as $1) from as many people who are looking for a change. Join Team Vivek today to become a founding member!](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c09023%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fY1bMX7H7b9wOzciXe9NaQ&sysid=1)**

| [** BECOME A
FOUNDING MEMBER →**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c09021%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6EAxMd0d2eZrUAKYlGw1hA&sysid=1)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c09024%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jwWPXIm8Hg4b4WCI4wohrQ&sysid=1)

---

| [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c09035%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zbvLJi8xH6WkL%2bcYYEyqug&sysid=1) | [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c09036%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=B46J4JIL1yp0ZxXw2a1%2baQ&sysid=1) | [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c09037%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gV6N4FtNl0%2fz1u4B%2fRcPeg&sysid=1)
---|---|---

| Paid for by Vivek 2024
---

Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes.

Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_ _[Unsubscribe](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7126%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=5RWO31Q7I4KgiNNKUHvSAg&sysid=1)_

|
[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7126%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=5RWO31Q7I4KgiNNKUHvSAg&sysid=1)

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Impulsive decisions are out of character for me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18890?t=1001&akid=2996%2E346206%2EG6t6Rs ][IMG]
Peter,

Impulsive, emotional decisions are out of character for me.

I am the guy who had a four-year plan to get into Harvard even though my
family was dirt poor.

So I thought long and hard about the decision to run for the United States
Senate.

I prepared for it long before the possibility of Senator Sinema’s party
switch.

I came to the conclusion that as a Marine, a Latino, and someone with a
record of standing up for working people, we can build a coalition that
can win a 2-way race, 3-way race, 27-way race... doesn’t matter.

The only open question was whether the grassroots support would be there.
And I thought it would be. So far, I’ve been right.

So I am asking:

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18890?t=1002&akid=2996%2E346206%2EG6t6Rs ]Can you please use this link to split $5, $10 or whatever you can
afford between Charles Booker and my campaign? The amount isn’t as
important as the donation, because it all adds up when we’re all chipping
in. So please.

CHIP IN →

Thank you, and adiós,

Ruben

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230306-2996-footer&t=1003&refcode2=2996_346206_G6t6Rs&akid=2996%2E346206%2EG6t6Rs

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=2996%2E346206%2EG6t6Rs

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

Biden just renewed his push for mass amnesty of millions of illegal immigrants - including the more than 5 MILLION he's ushered in under his administration.

As Speaker of the House, I need to know. Where do you stand on Biden's Mass-Amnesty plan?

name: Ruben Gallego for Senate
subject: Ruben ran to serve, not to spend all day on the phones and at fundraisers. But he’s only able to do that because of the response to emails like this.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Who wants their elected officials taking huge sums of money from payday lenders, hedge fund managers and drug company executives?
#

Peter -
Ruben Gallego ran for Congress to serve, not to spend all day on the phones asking for money and all night at high-dollar fundraisers.
Who wants their elected officials taking huge sums of money from payday lenders, hedge fund managers and drug company executives?
No one wants that.
But the only reason he is able to fund his campaigns without raising money like Senator Sinema is because of the response to emails like this one. They are the single greatest source of donations.
Now if everyone reading this email contributed even $10 to Ruben today, we’d reach our FEC fundraising goals and wouldn’t have to ask for money for months.
But not everyone gives. That’s why we’re counting on people who understand how important it is to have more Senators who will put service ahead of big-donors.
If that seems worth it, we’re asking:
[**Can Ruben count on you to contribute $10 or whatever feels right for you to donate today to his U.S. Senate campaign. name: Senator Rick Scott (R-FL)
subject: Electricity
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Peter,
---

body:
🚨🚨🚨🚨🚨🚨🚨🚨🚨🚨 |
---
| | The socialist House Bill 24 is up for a committee vote on Tuesday...

I'm on the committee (Commerce & Human Resources) and I am a HARD NO on this bill. It came from the Governor, it's controlled by the Governor, and the Governor even called legislators (not me) into his office and whipped votes on this to try and get his way.

Here are the results:

This is **NOT** conservative.

This is **NOT** good for Idaho.

And we have **NO BUSINESS** creating a free college-for-jobs program like this.

It's called, "central planning" and it's literally what socialist countries like North Korea, Cuba, and the former USSR do.

Not to mention the gigantic price-tag (which will only go up).

The sad part?

_We have Republicans pushing this, not Democrats. _

Because carrying water for the Governor is appealing to some... but not me.

So, please...

[**EMAIL THE COMMERCE & HUMAN RESOURCES COMMITTEE**](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=139fc0f9cd&e=dea908e0fe "click here to tell them, just one click and one email") and tell them how you feel.

Cheers,

Brian

**p.s.**

You know we have a state Republican platform that directly opposes this type of thing?

_It says_ :
* We believe free enterprise and encouraging individual initiative have brought this Nation opportunity, economic growth and prosperity.
* We believe government must practice fiscal responsibility, and that taxpayers shall allow the government only the money necessary to provide appropriate functions.
* We believe the unnecessary growth of government has a negative impact on both the conduct of business and our individual lives. We endorse the review of all government programs and encourage their assumption by private enterprise or local government where appropriate and workable. Programs which are not cost effective or have outlived their usefulness should be terminated.

So, how does giving adults $8,500 for college (that YOU AND I PAY FOR) to funnel them into pre-determined jobs that the Governor-controlled workforce council chooses align with our state Republican values?

Answer _: it doesn't. _

clean_body: 🚨🚨🚨🚨🚨🚨🚨🚨🚨🚨 | | | The socialist House Bill 24 is up for a committee vote on Tuesday... I'm on the committee (Commerce & Human Resources) and I am a HARD NO on this bill. It came from the Governor, it's controlled by the Governor, and the Governor even called legislators (not me) into his office and whipped votes on this to try and get his way. Here are the results: This is NOT conservative. This is NOT good for Idaho. And we have NO BUSINESS creating a free college-for-jobs program like this. It's called, "central planning" and it's literally what socialist countries like North Korea, Cuba, and the former USSR do. Not to mention the gigantic price-tag (which will only go up). The sad part? We have Republicans pushing this, not Democrats. Because carrying water for the Governor is appealing to some... but not me. So, please... "click here to tell them, just one click and one email" and tell them how you feel. Cheers, Brian p.s. You know we have a state Republican platform that directly opposes this type of thing? It says : We believe free enterprise and encouraging individual initiative have brought this Nation opportunity, economic growth and prosperity. We believe government must practice fiscal responsibility, and that taxpayers shall allow the government only the money necessary to provide appropriate functions. We believe the unnecessary growth of government has a negative impact on both the conduct of business and our individual lives. We endorse the review of all government programs and encourage their assumption by private enterprise or local government where appropriate and workable. Programs which are not cost effective or have outlived their usefulness should be terminated. So, how does giving adults $8,500 for college (that YOU AND I PAY FOR) to funnel them into pre-determined jobs that the Governor-controlled workforce council chooses align with our state Republican values? Answer : it doesn't. \--- 1) To make sure you keep getting these emails, please add mailto:blforidaho@gmail.com to your address book or whitelist me. 2) Want to get off this list? . 3) My postal address: PO Box 3753, Nampa, ID 83653-3753 4) Want to support the cause? "get in the fight". | | | | | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | | Copyright © 2023 Brian Lenney for Idaho, All rights reserved.

| | Our number one priority is Education. If you're a member of an organization like the rotary, chamber of commerce or home owners association you may be interested in our Train with a Parliamentarian workshop which reviews Roberts Rule of Order for effective meetings. Anyone who has a career in governance or is a member of a non-profit can benefit greatly from this program. Our next class starts 21 March 2023. We have also started our monthly Conversational Spanish and English meet-ups for serious learners. Our next meeting is 19 March, 5 PM - 7 PM, 106 Waterstone Way, Goose Creek, SC. We are working on a Summer Camp 19-23 June for Penmanship and Cursive Writing and looking forward in helping children who have lost this skillset. If you would like to volunteer, please reach out to us ASAP. Many thanks,Ingrid Centurion[info@generationsforamerica.com](https://www.generationsforamerica.com/so/9aOQoejqt/c?w=t1VrnwFvCeI9IOqIrVPua-_tyQh7JxgbosSuznTgfRg.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9pbmZvQGdlbmVyYXRpb25zZm9yYW1lcmljYS5jb20iLCJyIjoiOGY5NzI3NjktZjUwZC00N2M5LTQ3MDItNDBlMTY2MjVhMmJjIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMDM3MmIzMTktYzNhZi00ZTE1LWEyMTYtNDkwMWNhNWFkNTNkIn0)[www.generationsforamerica.com](https://www.generationsforamerica.com/so/9aOQoejqt/c?w=CPgfyWUUoJDy3EGxNj3Wdupr6nroheRKT883gp2KTCI.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZ2VuZXJhdGlvbnNmb3JhbWVyaWNhLmNvbS8iLCJyIjoiOGY5NzI3NjktZjUwZC00N2M5LTQ3MDItNDBlMTY2MjVhMmJjIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMDM3MmIzMTktYzNhZi00ZTE1LWEyMTYtNDkwMWNhNWFkNTNkIn0)

name: Giffords PAC
subject: No exaggeration
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Your donation truly has the power to save lives
#

Friend -
When we tell you that every single dollar we raise here at Giffords PAC goes towards our work to end gun violence, we mean it.
No exaggeration.
Your contribution—whether it’s $5, $10, $50, or more—goes directly towards our ability to help fight for gun safety legislation like universal background checks and to help elect candidates who will have the courage to act.
Your donation truly has the power to save lives.
Again, no exaggeration.
And so many of our contributions come from people like you making donations to emails like these.
[**So this is where we ask: Will you please make a contribution of $3 to Giffords PAC today?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-mar23.q3bw9s&refcode=em230306-1-15&t=1&akid=4369%2E3935704%2EEkXA5p)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17016?c0=giffords-em-mar23.bWo1sU&refcode=em230306-1-15&t=20&akid=4369%2E3935704%2EEkXA5p)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://go.giffords.org/go/17017?c0=giffords-em-mar23.rDG5iQ&refcode=em230306-1-15&t=21&akid=4369%2E3935704%2EEkXA5p)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://go.giffords.org/go/17010?c0=giffords-em-mar23.Va9Ph9&refcode=em230306-1-15&t=22&akid=4369%2E3935704%2EEkXA5p)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://go.giffords.org/go/17011?c0=giffords-em-mar23.wWLaGB&refcode=em230306-1-15&t=23&akid=4369%2E3935704%2EEkXA5p)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://go.giffords.org/go/17012?c0=giffords-em-mar23.nODn2F&refcode=em230306-1-15&t=24&akid=4369%2E3935704%2EEkXA5p)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-mar23.x28Ypi&refcode=em230306-1-15&t=25&akid=4369%2E3935704%2EEkXA5p)**

****
Thank you so much for your continued support,
The team at Giffords

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=4369%2E3935704%2EEkXA5p) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Josh Harder
subject: My thoughts on Trump’s CPAC
body:
Republicans annual CPAC conference was this weekend - and boy was in insane. MAGA extremists, right-wing personalities and conspiracy theorists were out in full force. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59776801/395041457/657127102?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjQwNTliNDYtNWNiYy1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=1eJrGkaSJ0Hqams85axvumUKY49Y6FzPMiocR0-7q3o=) | Peter, Republicans annual CPAC conference was this weekend - and boy was in insane. MAGA extremists, right-wing personalities and conspiracy theorists were out in full force. If you were tuning the whole thing out, I don’t blame you. But we as Democrats have to understand what we’re up against, so here is what you missed:
* Marjorie Taylor Greene used her speech to attack President Zelensky of Ukraine
* Matt Gaetz received cheers when he called to the abolish the FBI, DOJ and CDC
* Nikki Haley couldn’t walk anywhere without people chanting “Trump! Trump! Trump!”
* And Trump himself gave a speech calling for “retribution” and won the straw poll with over 62% of the vote - solidifying his position as the GOP frontrunner

**If we learned anything from CPAC, it’s that we need to take Trump’s 2024 campaign seriously and we can’t rely on establishment Republicans to save us. It’s up to us to stop Trump.** [**And if we don’t win my seat, Trump could have total control of the White House and Congress next year. clean_body: Republicans annual CPAC conference was this weekend - and boy was in insane. MAGA extremists, right-wing personalities and conspiracy theorists were out in full force. | = | Peter, Republicans annual CPAC conference was this weekend - and boy was in insane. MAGA extremists, right-wing personalities and conspiracy theorists were out in full force. If you were tuning the whole thing out, I don’t blame you. But we as Democrats have to understand what we’re up against, so here is what you missed: Marjorie Taylor Greene used her speech to attack President Zelensky of Ukraine Matt Gaetz received cheers when he called to the abolish the FBI, DOJ and CDC Nikki Haley couldn’t walk anywhere without people chanting “Trump! Trump! Trump!” And Trump himself gave a speech calling for “retribution” and won the straw poll with over 62% of the vote - solidifying his position as the GOP frontrunner If we learned anything from CPAC, it’s that we need to take Trump’s 2024 campaign seriously and we can’t rely on establishment Republicans to save us. It’s up to us to stop Trump. = If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- As I expected, Trump used his speech to show his dominance among the pro-MAGA crowd by spouting a bunch of lies and conspiracy theories (including his favorite lie about winning in 2020) while attacking the justice system and claiming he’s a victim of the “woke” left and the media. Who knew it was considered “woke” to defend our democracy? But I digress... = 2024 will be here before we know it! \- Josh *

body:
A recap of my speech at CPAC.

---
| | | | | | | | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvhbr580m5kol527v3favmcc35pu3b9uppp6s6go_rp22sh2s8i66pr0shj6cpj4sjh2bs)
---
| Friend,
---
| When I accepted the Republican nomination in 2016, I declared, "I am your voice."
---
| During my speech at CPAC, I added that _**" I am your warrior. I am your justice. And for those who have been wronged and betrayed, I am your RETRIBUTION."**_
---
| 2024 is the final battle for America.
---
| Either they win, or we win. And I promise you this: if you put me back in the White House, their reign will be OVER, and America will be a FREE NATION once again.
---
| _**[Please make a contribution to SAVE AMERICA in what truly is the FINAL BATTLE for our country- for an incredible 1,500% impact.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z57ad3ut5q5af4eou57c1u4l8kang8hh3q7a4lfo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0shj6cpj4sjh2bs "Please make a contribution before the FEC end-of-month deadline to help us crush our goal for our NEW Ballot Harvesting Fund – for 1,300% impact.")**_

---
---
[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT >>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1vdvcpq9c21q56g8anpl6j18ib6fuho6glucal0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0shj6cpj4sjh2bs)
---

| I also went through some of our big plans that I will do as the 47th President of the United States.
---
| At the top of my list will be stopping the slide into costly and never-ending wars.
---
| **As you know, I was the only president in DECADES who didn 't start a war.**
---
| But I also _COMPLETED_ wars that had already started, including defeating 100% of the ISIS caliphate - which everyone said was impossible to do.
---
| In fact, a certain general said it could only be done in 3 years - if at all. _**I did it in 3 weeks.**_
---
| Before I even arrive at the Oval Office, I will have the disastrous war between Russia and Ukraine settled. I will get the problem solved - and get it solved quickly.
---
| **Instead of spending hundreds of billions of dollars to defend the borders of distant foreign countries, under my leadership, we will defend OUR borders.**
---
| Three years ago, we had the safest border in the history of our country. I built hundreds of miles of wall and completed that task as promised.
---
| When I am back in the White House, we will use all necessary state, local, federal, and military resources to carry out the **LARGEST DOMESTIC DEPORTATION** operation in American History.
---
| I will ask every state and federal agency to identify every known or suspected gang member in America, and every one of them that is here illegally, we will pick them up, and we will throw them out of our country - and there will be no questions asked.
---
| _I will also direct the Department of Justice to go after Marxist prosecutors ' offices to make them pay for their illegal, race-based enforcement of the law._
---
| _All of us have seen too many videos of 13-year-old carjackers and 14-year-old hoodlums viciously beating their victims._
---
| My administration will crack down on these out-of-control monsters, young though they may be, and impose tough consequences on juvenile criminals.
---
| I will also fight for PARENTS' RIGHTS, including universal school choice, and the direct election of school principals by the parents.
---
| I will revoke every Biden policy promoting the chemical castration and sexual mutilation of our youth -- and ask Congress to send me a bill prohibiting child sexual mutilation in all 50 states.
---
| And we will keep men out of women's sports!
---
| There's no other way to say it: _**our enemies are lunatics and maniacs.**_
---
| **_They cannot stand that they do not own me, they cannot steer me, they cannot shake me, and they will NEVER, EVER control me._**
---
| At the end of the day, ANYONE else could be intimidated, bought-off, blackmailed, or ripped to shreds.
---
| I alone will NEVER retreat.
---
| But that's why we must stand together...
---
| While the Soros Money Machine, Hollywood, and globalist billionaires - who have made a fortune off of selling out our country - try to defeat our America First movement, grassroots donors like YOU are our only hope of fighting back to save America.
---
| _**[So please, make a contribution to SAVE AMERICA in what truly is the FINAL BATTLE for our country- for an incredible 1,500% impact.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zfplal9iahaa80elft9k1f9drodi3cifob18p66g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0shj6cpj4sjh2bs "So please, make a contribution before the FEC end-of-month deadline to help us crush our goal for our NEW Ballot Harvesting Fund – for 1,300% impact.")**_
---
| Thank you,
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2za56bc4cf0a6o8sjnqfeghorsjqpqlcjr5g812qg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0shj6cpj4sjh2bs)
---
| Donald J. Trump
45th President of the United States

There is an important runoff election for the Phoenix City Council District 6 on March 14. Conservative Sal DiCiccio (R) is term limited and will be replaced by the winner of this race. The two candidates are Republican Sam Stone and Democrat Kevin Robinson. **If you live in District 6 (**[check here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/e697e9619fc2752f16f79d307c796b93/35693/6e6cacad3c6c7e9f/bb63e66d2675a62bc3d6b838967d376c/35693)**), you either received a mail-in ballot or you must vote in person (see below).

****This is a very important race that will determine the balance of power on the City Council.** Phoenix, like many large cities in conservative states, has tended blue with the consequences many cites suffer from with progressive governance. Have you noticed the growing homeless problem in our city?

**Conservative Sam Stone is the strong choice of The Prickly Pear** and we urge our readers in District 6 to mail your ballots in immediately and cast your vote for Sam Stone. [Learn about Sam Stone here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/e697e9619fc2752f16f79d307c796b93/35693/6e6cacad3c6c7e9f/c473c6e7cb2e06ccc3d6b838967d376c/35693).

name: Great America Update
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78190%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ArvxzTueynSt8s6DCCpQyw&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78191%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=eC7xH7rpBM47EIk%2bgrPPFQ&sysid=1) For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale’s American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78191%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=eC7xH7rpBM47EIk%2bgrPPFQ&sysid=1) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c7615%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=1TzJJLNU%2fQJqu94Ituzi7w&sysid=1)_

name: Wisconsin Update (via DLCC.org)
subject: Wisconsin’s Supreme Court race, and what it means for state Democrats >>
body:
In a moment, we’ll get you up to speed on what’s happening in Wisconsin and what it could mean for state Democrats | | |
---
| | **Here’s what you should know:**
1. _Hundreds_ of GOP state legislators and officials promoted the election fraud claims that led to Trump’s January 6th insurrection.
2. Trump’s election-denying crony Daniel Kelly just advanced in Wisconsin’s pivotal Supreme Court race that will have an important impact on abortion access and elections in the state.
3. The outcome of this Supreme Court race could give us the chance to un-gerrymander Wisconsin – giving Democrats their best chance in over a decade to pick up seats in the state's legislature.

State-level races are overlooked and underfunded – making them especially vulnerable to Republicans’ outsized spending. **That means we have to put in the work _now_ to make sure we're ready to elect Democrats who will defend our rights and fight back against Republican extremism in statehouses nationwide.** [Will you chip in $7, $25, or whatever fits your budget today to give state Democrats the resources they need to WIN in states like Wisconsin? clean_body: In a moment, we’ll get you up to speed on what’s happening in Wisconsin and what it could mean for state Democrats | | | | | Here’s what you should know: 1. Hundreds of GOP state legislators and officials promoted the election fraud claims that led to Trump’s January 6th insurrection. 2. Trump’s election-denying crony Daniel Kelly just advanced in Wisconsin’s pivotal Supreme Court race that will have an important impact on abortion access and elections in the state. 3. The outcome of this Supreme Court race could give us the chance to un-gerrymander Wisconsin – giving Democrats their best chance in over a decade to pick up seats in the state's legislature. State-level races are overlooked and underfunded – making them especially vulnerable to Republicans’ outsized spending. That means we have to put in the work now to make sure we're ready to elect Democrats who will defend our rights and fight back against Republican extremism in statehouses nationwide. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Wisconsin state Republicans have been at the forefront of passing backward, restrictive, and extreme laws that threaten our rights, freedoms, and democracy. As the only party committee dedicated to electing Democrats to state legislatures across the country, it’s up to us to stop Trump’s state Republican allies in their tracks – and we may not have a better opportunity than this. The funds we raise right now directly impact how many races we’re able to compete in – and if we fall short, we risk letting Wisconsin Republicans run away with the state's legislature. We’re counting on this grassroots team to step up today. – Team DLCC | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Chip in. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC. Bob Casey for Senate PO Box 58746 Philadelphia, PA 19102 United States

Get your best rodeo outfit and dancing boots ready!
You are invited to join Tara and Dan Crenshaw along with a whole lot of freedom loving Texans for the most patriotic birthday party of the year!
Plus a surprise guest appearance by a country music legend.
WHEN: Saturday, March 18th from 8:00pm to midnight
WHERE: The Sporting Club, 5102 Washington Ave, Houston, TX 77007
General Admission tickets are $10 per person. All sales go to support Dan Crenshaw's campaign.
A limited number of tables are also available for purchase. If you're interested in purchasing a table for your group, please reply to this email or call us at 281-888-4016 and one of our team members will be happy to assist you.
If you can't make it to the party but still want to support Dan Crenshaw's campaign, [click here to wish Dan a happy birthday and chip in $39 for 39 years.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015LYQlOuUM61keGuE6gsONSoLkQBdZJpNXXAvBBH6D5Rg07rHHFzrsSWWexRZeyzPdZCLdHhBAB2DvR7ayiCQXORqaY8wGitg-yEaHXNxx-K6kEKjmSkK7Qr7a-y4y4uX5ZbsK_BD-Evv0-vufDGkl9M5JUaKRDiMJXNyCDUct13JWPxgrzT2ZCmp5VRJGYpI-rvFHQkGlDr3wTy7owhacQdWxgdw_kbhgnZmY9vaDlnMDx7XAPBeNTSac0eBZ8FRs2B0qafkoS6_kI1XZsdqY9ITuIyDLMkOxIHSKQWHfX50TooTrYZQnCnRXWxK51OPCo8k7bJKKfxusF8XKEUoWHH-FtMvp1TEl3vsffcWfYqmu6qRM6ntbw==&c=41dTVa2TBTO8Edk6Qsjw3iPlyThUGI_9h-kNGAiZb9Q-XN47FpaVLQ==&ch=Xf18z4E8cXhfNmxWWeElPID2iyl_aLG-qb7bdjH13CcmBziMmLQapA==)

body:

---
| | | _[UPDATE: We've reached 60,000! Help us take it higher and put pressure on the cable companies.[Sign the petition](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2d948689-011b-458a-b8f4-6e85fcd29519/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9), or if you have already, forward this to spread the word!]_ **Did you know the average cable/satellite subscriber pays $20 a year for Fox News -- even if nobody in their household watches it?** [Add your name: Tell your cable company to stop making you pay for Fox News](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfff348b6-cf20-4dde-ba87-da45e2ff228e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) This comes from "carriage" fees paid to Fox by the companies, and passed on the their customers. **And it adds up to $1.8 billion a year for Fox.** Fox News is not a news company. They knowingly broadcast lies. And there is no reason that people smart enough to not watch it should still have to pay for it. [Add your name: Tell your cable company to stop making you pay for Fox News](https://default.salsalabs.org/T108dd275-a495-46b0-8b13-324140b9abe7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: United Rural Democrats
subject: ALERT: Santos lied again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United Rural Democrats](https://click
body:
This is not how a politician should behave | | | Hi, Peter – In case you haven't heard, news recently broke that U.S. Republican Representative George Santos lied about working for Goldman Sachs when testifying during a 2017 credit card fraud investigation into the actions of a "family friend." **This is the latest lie to come to light amidst countless other instances of Santos frauding the public that he is meant to represent.** Santos is under investigation by multiple agencies on everything from campaign finance violations to charity fraud. Now, the House Ethics Committee is officially investigating his history of fraud. We're an organization steeped in rural values. Our members and the candidates we support come from America's heartland, and we know we deserve better from our leaders. Now, Democrats and even his Republican colleagues are calling for Santos to step down. One representative has gone so far as to introduce a bill that would prohibit members of the House from profiting from attention received due to a guilty offense (a not-so-subtle reference to the latest allegations against Santos). United Rural Democrats is working to elect candidates with integrity, honor, humility, and respect for the office and their constituents. It's clear that George Santos does not fit that bill. He should resign. **_[Will you help us elect candidates who uphold rural values, and will truly represent the American people?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNG6r6b6yi4Uz9vCRXD2GcjJnO4KotLfD2Ncezp724f7fC7fxl0kEukVf3BxWIZi5hUkg10Huaz97_FROU17h7Vz9M3YwlxBJVicRcyH1Gz3woQpxybnvMYMEMZwHfeICdzf_XOtFmJAzkCfvmdNucK1xjQHmZ9805QNqmoTPsj5FLbYS2cb0be-CJI09JpUNjKT36G8MUk2NzpyJfo5EHX_ErgKM5B53HurNIrJ6Wy3Ew-WlfsILr72EOxW_slZ8egDlz-zXZue4Xh8nPP8zxkJR7Ijwgro_YIc_oXp1GjoLJVagwzutp0QgYBqrQNuzl08EvA_oPTo4wjx1IOFUz/3u9/egXXDsMjTUyuhJo4_2VncQ/h0/xSTnBDOcshDsYuFO5rZosplBMb7MgVwTrP07vnvGjvU) _** **[Chip in here](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNG6r6b6yi4Uz9vCRXD2GcjJnO4KotLfD2Ncezp724f7fC7fxl0kEukVf3BxWIZi6h5kcp5OhNim6bu7j06qtyka-qDWt09-7iUS0bWP9fg6QwVnxl8a6RAQIDMklfpkIhuo_odxvqjS1BCOcnruTAgV0wVIdJd8VyzMw-3QlUqDcb6i0b1coS-YfmzIMKaqvRkuUHdbnSTFfj_dNqyunruWx2ME7r74qGGvtz7nIYdyg8yMQiM-W4C4CkSYW1iy0jiBHZ6d_UG_iDDd8meoixlN1kmZgtzzzfjU-Tsc4sZirHzRCgTbr1tOo03VE1xZ6Wflvsp01gL9V3ykSRiLTW/3u9/egXXDsMjTUyuhJo4_2VncQ/h1/lofWeak7ew0vM-gWW5_wX0y9mkC_l7_AEEMAv-Celfc)** **[Make a recurring gift](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNG6r6b6yi4Uz9vCRXD2GclY3l1Sg3yIgAa7xFIV6TGDGMqJA5voODaPBUPlW9WsKsCxtVi9wa2o35aCxjOYAYabJKh74K_03gRZaKvBFq5-xjhXlZsJclVojvrSuOYVnbzgx-Mge6rvcu-YAguPSlJteoLlrgTCIjwvt3AgaUdJmLRzuSFip4cAKB9XLG22GQzHcXp5s42sSiBFcSvXdnlWU3zQ1GzMUf2a6K8VpHNziFp7-SVcP7Mk5FhBwRJJ3lVMaTNtygHlXsd8UEhaoNVI4zTV5dQgScY4_hpGCFVMRmH73audib1sCulfpDG2HRM24tJsfbYXxn-0IyeoQ4/3u9/egXXDsMjTUyuhJo4_2VncQ/h2/DVQP5HXLfggAArq1woCcohcrdMCqwKKp8rtfZ4OBKQQ)** Thank you, Peter, for your support. – United Rural Democrats

clean_body: This is not how a politician should behave | | | Hi, Peter – In case you haven't heard, news recently broke that U.S. Republican Representative George Santos lied about working for Goldman Sachs when testifying during a 2017 credit card fraud investigation into the actions of a "family friend." This is the latest lie to come to light amidst countless other instances of Santos frauding the public that he is meant to represent. Santos is under investigation by multiple agencies on everything from campaign finance violations to charity fraud. Now, the House Ethics Committee is officially investigating his history of fraud. We're an organization steeped in rural values. Our members and the candidates we support come from America's heartland, and we know we deserve better from our leaders. Now, Democrats and even his Republican colleagues are calling for Santos to step down. One representative has gone so far as to introduce a bill that would prohibit members of the House from profiting from attention received due to a guilty offense (a not-so-subtle reference to the latest allegations against Santos). United Rural Democrats is working to elect candidates with integrity, honor, humility, and respect for the office and their constituents. It's clear that George Santos does not fit that bill. He should resign. Thank you, Peter, for your support. – United Rural Democrats United Rural Democrats (URD) is leading the effort to rebuild the Democratic Party in rural America. If we're going to take back our country, we need a 50-state strategy to organize in every community across the country. Will you support our network of activists on the ground as we work to rebuild our party's infrastructure and flip these areas blue?

name: Secretary Pompeo
subject: [SUBJECT: Redacted]
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
| |
---
| | | |
---
This is 70th Secretary of State Mike Pompeo.

Have you bought a copy of my new book - "Never Give An Inch" \- yet? It's a New York Times bestseller and I will show you why.

Unlock _**exclusive**_ access to a never before told story that I detail in my new book.

---
**INTEL FROM 70TH SECRETARY OF STATE MIKE POMPEO:**
For all of us, March 2020 was a hectic time. The pandemic had just shut down the entire country and we were all looking for answers.

On March 26, President Trump held a call with Chinese President Xi Jinping, one day after I had told the President that China had repeatedly delayed sharing information about the virus and that they were engaged in a disinformation campaign.

On the call Xi told Trump that I was jeopardizing the "phase one" trade deal that the principals had just agreed to.

I couldn't believe it, Xi was trying to get Trump to fire me.

When the call was over, Trump turned to me and said:

"My Mike, that guy hates you!"

Hello,

**I am officially running again against Lauren Boebert!**

In 2022, we came just 546 votes short of kicking Boebert out of Congress. It was the closest race in the __entire__ country. Now, I’m running again to finish the job, but I need you with me from day one:

[**Please, will you make a donation now – split between my campaign and American Bridge PAC – and become a Founding Donor to my 2024 campaign to defeat Boebert?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59754501/394998422/-321553144?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2304-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImMzY2ZjNGE1LTM4YmMtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=DrMRS9W8ZWE9OeAUY4lWlls1DNefOW02-HhGnch75Hc=)
No one believed we could pull it off in 2022. All of the pundits said Colorado’s 3rd Congressional District was a “Safe Republican” seat. The national Democrats and the national Republicans wrote us off.

But we proved them all wrong.

With Lauren Boebert now on notice, this campaign is going to get even nastier. Her super PACs and supporters are going to spin lie after lie against me on TV. **I’m counting on you to be able to correct the record and hold Boebert accountable.**
**[No amount is too small: Click here now and make a donation to my campaign and American Bridge PAC of whatever you can afford today. It’s important that we have as strong of an early showing as possible.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59754502/394998423/-321553144?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2304-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImMzY2ZjNGE1LTM4YmMtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=DrMRS9W8ZWE9OeAUY4lWlls1DNefOW02-HhGnch75Hc=)**
