name: ICYMI News
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College’s National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zd5mdkt10l3ljj4aqovv4iuabtfm28bgal8cmfm0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0shj66ob5cdh2bs)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

In an interview published in _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s digest of liberty, Associate Justice of the Supreme Court Clarence Thomas explained what he sees as his role on the nation’s highest court: **“My job is to apply the Constitution.”**

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zud80rce19hrj19v4bn9hh006sqblhnh2sn4neqo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0shj66ob5cdh2bs) [NO](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zd0f41m4i6f647u9s2onmslr6gdascjj05he693g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0shj66ob5cdh2bs) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to “pack” the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: “To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats.”

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court’s role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zqoabm9bg6hlsm0grlihmhk5bha5ll3t8okkmsc8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0shj66ob5cdh2bs)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I’m sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That’s why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution” and “The U.S. Supreme Court.”

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty--featuring issues such as “Clarence Thomas and the Lost Constitution.”

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America’s great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z9bvb2pm7376nngdrhv6c0tkt1qhk5ame7am6iig_rp22sh2s8i66pr0shj66ob5cdh2bs)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

|
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for ICYMI News, [please use this preferences page](http://e.icyminews.com/prefs/9z2zcis0n5q894bb5tdrbu1cckjvb3mt7iajc1fdd10).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zc1djg1lfioa8ldmr9gtec0c896t077e2ps8l7ug_rp22sh2s8i66pr0shj66ob5cdh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

Peter – Time and again Kyrsten Sinema has cashed in on donations from private equity, Wall Street, and Big Pharma – and then did their political bidding in return despite the repercussions it might have for everyday Americans. For example: In 2021, Center Forward, a front group bankrolled by Pharma lobbyists, spent $1.2 million on ads to promote Sinema in Arizona. The ads thanked her for ‘fighting as an independent and effective voice for us.’ **If the “us” they meant was Big Pharma, they were spot on.** If there’s one thing we know for sure, it’s that Kyrsten Sinema puts herself first, her wealthy donors second, and everyone else last. name: Matthew Diemer
subject: Praying for East Palestine
body:
| |
---
Dear all, This month, my thoughts are with East Palestine, Ohio. It has been over a month since 20 train cars derailed, spilling harmful chemicals and polluting the town and surrounding areas. Unfortunately, the media, government agencies, and elected officials have yet to provide clear explanations and guidance. Fortunately, Senators Sherrod Brown and J.D. Vance are putting aside partisan differences to work together to create better policies that govern rail companies in Ohio. However, in the meantime, the people of East Palestine are still waiting for clarity while being shamefully caught in the political crossfire. Former state senator and congressional candidate Nina Turner recently spoke out about the situation on CNN. She rightly pointed out that it is abhorrent for anyone to suggest that the residents of East Palestine deserved this because they voted for President Trump. The truth is that this is about poverty. Low income and working-class people of all races and political affiliations deserve clean air, clean food, clean water, and relief both in the short term and the long term. Let us remember to prioritize **policy over politics** and reject hateful rhetoric that comes at the expense of our fellow Ohioans' and Americans' well-being. [You can watch the Breaking Points/Nina Turner clip on the situation here.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDOJPR4Z5lDybbWIPhQSOR8HDLo0ABKYwsc-lTDNZ1ilnly4QTaUTFTtc8SEZdrKn-gXAxYN4aQJ4y9ZuuVS687CBk8-eryk7_XO0h77mQyn0qUqLEy7Go-YGjcx6bD7tQbXDhLC7VkojxHUI6W1d-U5ArSEojP7-_nYMazZT-E4jzs8Km1beKoQUMcgQ7pFvmM4fEsj0R69r2AUgEQ86Y36omZ8LaMyn22dopLfX4mejzMqBJ0vKupKmjuDmWTYEWZMzPJksJSSIex8oNN8fN3c/3u9/AzgXaDGuRneG-y05MM4eZg/h0/ulJ9PBk2hA9Ij8rHV6E9ls12F6KtxE3tXLmEwvNTWD4) Also, if you are in NEO, please join us this coming Thursday in support of Law Director for the City of Rocky River, Michael O’Shea. He is a friend that continues to show up for the people of his community and all of North East Ohio.
---
|
---
Sincerely, Matthew Diemer
---
|
---
Diemer for Congress P.O. Box 16753 Rocky River, Ohio 44116 [Click here to unsubscribe.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl7NBjmTZL5F5oqdT0MFW4GHjDXYRtUm3kteQsEXLdcwXp8p1DaSQAGGc2RntD68HxNBZ77xZkk_5t9lA_ej1jcmFAbIGuQN5CeYuPP-fj_dXvbRS3DuEvfg_5Rs56uOxWFJwjceM9v9LFoXb_ssatBatXTuDP4Kq5UQArAVxmy9MorcSEOvBvoxlcHvGgKEveYoJe9REMOeFjEIFvCyhcsMUuxpHOK4NzWir2osp0Q35Jiv1OGGhJmBBOe9y1PM2YGULHilJFRxXFF5zQQZMX2DuonFlY0ljWxCGEyXOcCxs8Z8_t-74b2K6J-ftvrDXa2ZEWyj8Y8XlfOdjRSoB7Mj2jRxMHjbY4js9sAeJ3rfA/3u9/AzgXaDGuRneG-y05MM4eZg/h1/-LB2dWFlTLdYe8feOmZ9goXC7AtAKA0HR85zsCifWBs)

name: Your America
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College’s National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c09044%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=MXeFc%2b7V7dAph2PJdzzMoA&sysid=1)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

In an interview published in _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s digest of liberty, Associate Justice of the Supreme Court Clarence Thomas explained what he sees as his role on the nation’s highest court: **“My job is to apply the Constitution.”**

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c09155%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HJyg2nPhNL8AjpAslBuQjA&sysid=1) [NO](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c09156%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XwNoK2%2bm%2fDBh160QnQPKgQ&sysid=1) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to “pack” the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: “To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats.”

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court’s role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c09157%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TnQkcH6%2buAtuiZDS2SMfJg&sysid=1)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I’m sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That’s why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution” and “The U.S. Supreme Court.”

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty--featuring issues such as “Clarence Thomas and the Lost Constitution.”

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America’s great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c09158%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=sbcbCQ3mKTo7X7ry08ajog&sysid=1)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

|
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7129%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=F6QuKDbSodap0%2fdDUBk88w&sysid=1)_

name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: ICYMI: I have great news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
| |
---
| | | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62398015:J42GpaGrN:m:1:3365131770:81B3B14D19E89B1353DC3379C322B176:r)
---

**McCarthy says government must butt out of kids' education, pushes federal 'Parents Bill of Rights'**

_FOX NEWS_
It is with great pride I share with you House Republicans' latest and greatest push for the empowerment of parents and safety of our children from radical indoctrination: **the Parents Bill of Rights.**

This was a personal project of significant importance to me. I've been talking about it on the campaign trail for years now, and am thrilled to have made good on another flagship pillar of our Commitment to America.

Now that we have the majority in the House, we are delivering.

Parents get to decide what is best for their children - not government-funded teachers seeking to confuse and indoctrinate kids based on the teachers' union's woke, leftist ideology.

**School is for education, not indoctrination.** Parents deserve to be able to know what is being taught, to be heard at school board meetings, to have transparent school budgets, and to protect the privacy & safety of their children.

---
| | [PROTECT OUR CHILDREN](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62398016:J42GpaGrN:m:1:3365131770:81B3B14D19E89B1353DC3379C322B176:r)
---

clean_body: | | | | | | McCarthy says government must butt out of kids' education, pushes federal 'Parents Bill of Rights' FOX NEWS It is with great pride I share with you House Republicans' latest and greatest push for the empowerment of parents and safety of our children from radical indoctrination: the Parents Bill of Rights. This was a personal project of significant importance to me. I've been talking about it on the campaign trail for years now, and am thrilled to have made good on another flagship pillar of our Commitment to America. Now that we have the majority in the House, we are delivering. Parents get to decide what is best for their children - not government-funded teachers seeking to confuse and indoctrinate kids based on the teachers' union's woke, leftist ideology. School is for education, not indoctrination. Parents deserve to be able to know what is being taught, to be heard at school board meetings, to have transparent school budgets, and to protect the privacy & safety of their children. | | | | "If you support our efforts to empower parents and protect our children, please consider pitching in just $25 or $50 to support our efforts to deliver for YOU:" | | | | | | | | * | Paid for by McCarthy for Congress PO Box 12667 Bakersfield, CA 93389 This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system October 12, 2022. name: Nestor, United We Dream Action
subject: Welcome to United We Dream Action!
body:
The stars were aligned for you to be part of our team. | | | Hey Peter, Welcome to the team! We couldn’t be more excited to have you join our United We Dream Action (UWDA)__ community. **What is UWDA?** We are young people building the power we need to win protections for immigrant communities and people of color! We know we must become the leaders our communities need to create the future ourselves and our families deserve. We make our voices heard by keeping elected officials accountable at all levels of government and fight to elect immigrant champions! Young voters of color showed out at the polls in record breaking numbers to get Trump out of office in 2020. Right now, we’re focused on holding President Biden’s administration accountable to their campaign promises to protect undocumented people and deliver a pathway to citizenship. **We’ve been in this fight for the last 10 years, Peter, but I have to be honest with you — 2023 will be another HUGE year for us and we’re going to need all hands on deck. That’s why we’re so excited that you’ve joined us!** ********
**To stay updated on ways to get involved, don’t forget to follow us on ALL our social media accounts:** **[FOLLOW OUR FACEBOOK](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDPAZiEt8wwS6hp5wOIb3CiKxLFe__99TPHcZXIou5TzRAj--Bwh2hxVdshqgGyVRrpK3Ss4Iwi98ITIrPhpz4Sb44VXpjbiJFcuHoKfSUeQI6y_dNfppA5-DzOBZMRJ1KyjDOFztz1rJrKQgcgWf4Ap5Gg-hKGI92fPu1N59fL486BAmw7BJjuHUJuHJ1lRMnWpB4PphGH0i7Er_fj1v3OQcwuffF0vEFP4ud2eCxIZv-sHlKTJOSJv8DAMrCzLOT3O5VAzE0RfHUdvkzoP2z1I/3u9/jO_UOV_MQKebiPfdysBPoA/h0/nyU6njMO7Em0jeozffQMZHtG_gbaiesgy1ipTRyL_t0)** **[FOLLOW OUR TWITTER](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/dSCQfi9FLISmU3ZE3bfPhi0_MlCLCQRZ-K-KgQFIUzO-Gv---_JYLs--raGsSUczc2urttF72guO79IgU1tqP3SCP2340CW2OXdxqMB9EjwpqBHHarQ0NYat8xROpQPzCZVazo7amR90f1v5BXT1k6RJzgdsnR46hz3XPJO7ibm6r5bs515nqezXb7kZfoy8Q9-Pv1MWAngINNtPwWNvgEr8K4Hr2NrA7QpK02cMJF_5cjDBEp_1TZFcbY_izKegSuKlmQzOAuzWCTb8AEfKJOXYX5zyIGse2vAum_5BOCM/3u9/jO_UOV_MQKebiPfdysBPoA/h1/AwvONUduZpSp6PV32cm8NwBzZ08oS3KJRUDq4c-0oQY)** **[FOLLOW OUR INSTAGRAM](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDE-osrDsyUs4KS0eRiq-k7QPk8ChP9nGFcGt-f3CA-vtL9yUXWa4WaQKEo2cCPEMWTXBDl7nWmr4ngyWBzZipuzk3qa02yEJ-_xImy_-sGy3zGbZjDWONNB4Wl9jujBUVFje5bWkzIRJlKl1z9XYu9OhSjT-BXksVZX80hDp2Q4H8jSwEJcTuLdQ8Te77AY4Z6zyasrG6quGwS1T0MCQwi06-cWEDg1jxZxMHPj9B6lTkQiajW-sTDHeuMcOFEcqrLALw7tXoIai3aC9AB7vrZt41-I9fAAY-v9KEKBYk7oA/3u9/jO_UOV_MQKebiPfdysBPoA/h2/OokZeSbEu2pJaTO-4WBStPTFPigQc_zcftTEqX4-60A)** Let’s get to work. name: Bill Spadea
subject: It’s Time for Common Sense
body:
Let’s Start Winning Again
|
---
| Friends, Common sense: it sounds simple, but it’s been in short supply in Trenton for far too long. In its place, years of 'business as usual' in our State Capitol have beaten New Jerseyans down into a culture of accepting the mess the insiders, special interests and failed politicians have created.
---
|
---
| [](https://xtz223.keap-link019.com/v2/click/7af693b4ef8e678ab3041d41e68895c4/eJyNkE0LgkAQhv_LnCPbrRXxJiEiloeoc6w60VKuyzpKH_jf2z6oS0HXmed9hneuQKilprSCEE504XwKI7BYKqNQ07zRJMvHlosZm7IRHJU-JLbpDITXr-E3cB8L7iJ0NuiI9SqaZ2mebBdpnjnQSOtO_KWZ-R9NvIzSBQzDTy_WiuLeqVsIyXZ471Mp14k29uj4PZFpQ8_rVY3NuGxqL5gIHvhcBB4yVuyEL1nhRNIY1NXrBxmen7rhBig3YmE=)

---
|

name: Sarah Curmi, EMILYs List
subject: Janet needs our support *now* →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILYs List [www
body:
|
---
| | It's no wonder this race is gaining national attention, Peter ** **[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59755921/395003129/1176129059?sourceid=1048708&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjViNGQ0Yy0zY2JjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zSPMDXCDu0nY_pHyC9DWGjc_Ccra2fp-BrO0NTJasGY=&emci=6e5b4d4c-3cbc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=6f5b4d4c-3cbc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=5177934)** Peter,

Last month, EMILYs List proudly endorsed civil rights advocate and public servant Judge **Janet Protasiewicz** in her race for Wisconsin's state supreme court.

After decisively winning her primary last month, she's gearing up for one of the most consequential general elections since the overturning of _Roe v. Wade_ last summer. Her opponent is a proud anti-choice extremist who's endorsed by three anti-abortion groups in the state and couldn't be a greater threat to democracy or abortion access in Wisconsin. **[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59755924/395003141/1176129059?sourceid=1048708&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjViNGQ0Yy0zY2JjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zSPMDXCDu0nY_pHyC9DWGjc_Ccra2fp-BrO0NTJasGY=&emci=6e5b4d4c-3cbc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=6f5b4d4c-3cbc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=5177934)** **** As a former assistant district attorney, Janet's deep commitments to her community and impartiality have made her voice _critical_ to the progress of Wisconsin's justice system for over 35 years.

Here's the thing, Peter: The current makeup of Wisconsin's supreme court is _heavily_ weighted in favor of anti-democracy and anti-choice interests but Janet's race provides a unique opportunity to _flip_ the ideological balance of the court.

This year, the court is facing two hugely consequential cases: Republican efforts to undermine voting rights via redistricting _and_ the legality of an 1849 abortion ban. Needless to say, the results of both will affect _millions_. ******** ********We are proud to stand with candidates like Judge Janet, who are facing higher stakes than ever. Are you ready to step up? Donate now to support and help elect pro-choice, pro-democracy women to key offices across the country:**

**[https://emilyslist.org/go/Help-Elect-Women-This-March](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59755964/395003175/1176129059?sourceid=1048708&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjViNGQ0Yy0zY2JjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zSPMDXCDu0nY_pHyC9DWGjc_Ccra2fp-BrO0NTJasGY=&emci=6e5b4d4c-3cbc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=6f5b4d4c-3cbc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=5177934)******** ******** Thank you for stepping up when it counts,

Sarah Curmi (she/her/hers)
Vice President of State & Local Campaigns, EMILYs List ********
**** ** ** ******[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59755973/395003181/1176129059?sourceid=1048708&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjViNGQ0Yy0zY2JjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zSPMDXCDu0nY_pHyC9DWGjc_Ccra2fp-BrO0NTJasGY=&emci=6e5b4d4c-3cbc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=6f5b4d4c-3cbc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=5177934)****** ****** ** ******[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59755979/395003182/210412955?sourceid=1048708&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjViNGQ0Yy0zY2JjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zSPMDXCDu0nY_pHyC9DWGjc_Ccra2fp-BrO0NTJasGY=&emci=6e5b4d4c-3cbc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=6f5b4d4c-3cbc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=5177934)****** ************ **** ****

Needless to say, the results of both will affect millions. **** ****We are proud to stand with candidates like Judge Janet, who are facing higher stakes than ever. Are you ready to step up? Donate now to support and help elect pro-choice, pro-democracy women to key offices across the country: **** **** Thank you for stepping up when it counts, Sarah Curmi (she/her/hers) Vice President of State & Local Campaigns, EMILYs List **** **** ** ****** ******** ******** | ---|---|--- EMILYs List is a community of over five million members that helps elect Democratic pro-choice women to office. | Paid for by EMILYs List and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Donald J. Trump March 4th, 2023
** No Turning Back

**
** We Will Finish What We Started

**
President Trump had a triumphant return to CPAC on Saturday night where he put forward the case both for his nomination and general election. Speaking to an enthusiastic crowd of conservative grassroots leaders, President Trump recalled all that was accomplished for the movement when he was President, and he laid out his vision for America when he returns to the White House.

Declaring that “I alone will not retreat,” President Trump reminded the crowd that he is the “only president in history who has ever taken on the entire corrupt establishment in Washington” and asserted that “anyone else will be intimidated, bought-off, blackmailed, or ripped to shreds.”

President Trump also said that while he faces relentless attacks, he is not the real target. The real target are the people he is standing up for.

_ “Our enemies are desperate to stop us because they know that WE are the ONLY ONES who can stop THEM. They know that we CAN defeat them. They know that we WILL defeat them. But they’re not coming after me, they’re coming after YOU – and I’m just standing in their way.” _
_
_ _"In 2016, I declared, 'I am your voice.' Today I add: I am your warrior, I am your justice, and for those who have been wronged and betrayed, I am your retribution!"
_

In vivid language, President Trump signaled at the outset of his speech what his supporters will get with him in a second term:

_ “With you at my side, we will demolish the Deep State, we will expel the warmongers, we will drive out the globalists, we will cast out the Communists, we will throw off the political class that hates our country, we will beat the Democrats, we will rout the fake news media, we will expose and appropriately deal with the RINOS, we will evict Joe Biden from the White House, and we will liberate America from these villains and scoundrels ONCE AND FOR ALL.”

_
In a rousing battle cry, he then made clear the stakes in 2024:

_ “This is the final battle—they know it, I know it, YOU know it, everybody knows it. _ _ Either they win, or we win. And I promise you this: if you put me back in the White House, their reign will be OVER, and America will be a FREE NATION once again.”

_
President Trump also underscored how he and his political movement have transformed the Republican party and that today there is no going back:

_ “When we started on this journey, a journey like there has never been before, we had a Republican Party that was ruled by freaks, neo-cons, globalists, and open border zealots, and fools. But we are NEVER going back to the Party of Paul Ryan, Karl Rove, and Jeb Bush.....We are never going back to a country ruled by entrenched political dynasties in both parties, rotten special interests, China-loving politicians, and a militant left-wing news media that’s either frightened of telling the truth or is truly evil and bad—you never know which. We are not going back to this—Not now, not EVER.”

_
President Trump recounted many of his administration’s achievements and how they have been reversed by the Biden administration, including standing up strong to China, not starting any new wars thanks to a policy of peace through strength, shutting down the illegal foreign invasion on the southern border and establishing the most secure border in history, and defending our heroes against the thugs tearing down statues and pushing Critical Race Theory in our institutions.

He went on to describe in great detail what he will do in a second term:

**_ War and Peace _ ** . _“I am the only candidate who can make this promise: I will prevent World War Three.”_

**_ Border _ ** : _“Three years ago, we had the safest border in the history of our country—and I will quickly do that again.

_
_ “When I am back in the White House, the very first reconciliation bill I sign will be for a massive increase in border patrol, and a colossal increase in the number of ICE deportation officers.”

_
_ “Under my leadership, we will use all necessary state, local, federal, and military resources to carry out the largest domestic deportation operation in American History.”

_
_ “I will ask every state and federal agency to identify every known or suspected gang member in America, and every one of them that is here illegally, we will pick them up, and we will throw them out of our country, and there will be no questions asked.”

_
_ “To stop the flow of deadly drugs, it will be my policy to take down the cartels just as I took down the ISIS caliphate that everybody said was impossible to do.”

_
**_ Law and Order _ ** : _“In cities where there has been a complete breakdown of public safety, I will send in federal assets, including the National Guard, until law and order is restored.”

_
**_ Homelessness _ ** : _“I will end the scourge of homelessness taking over our cities and suburbs. We will take the homeless, drug addicted, and severely deranged, get them off our streets, and create Tent Cities, where we will get them the help they so clearly need.”

_
**_ Eradicating Marxism from the Government _ ** . _“On Day One, I will revoke Joe Biden’s crazy executive order installing Marxist Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion Czars in every federal agency, and I will immediately terminate all staffers hired to implement this agenda._ _ _ _ I will urge Congress to create a restitution fund for Americans who have been unjustly discriminated against by these Biden policies. And we will ban all racial discrimination by the government.”

_
**_ Champion of Parent’s Right _ ** . _“I will fight for PARENTS’ RIGHTS, including universal school choice, and the direct election of school principals by the parents. If any principal is not getting the job done, the parents should be able to vote to fire them and select someone who will.”

_
**_ Promoting Patriotic Education _ ** . _“Continuing the work of the 1776 Commission, we will teach OUR values and promote OUR history and OUR traditions to our children.”

_
**_ Protecting Our Youth _ ** . “I will revoke every Biden policy promoting the chemical castration and sexual mutilation of our youth—and ask Congress to send me a bill prohibiting child sexual mutilation in all 50 states.”

**_ Protecting Women's Sports _ ** . _“We will keep men out of women’s sports.”

_
**_ Smashing the Censorship Cartel _ ** . _“I will destroy the illegal censorship regime and bring back FREE SPEECH in America.”

_
**_ America First Trade Policy _ ** _ : “I will create a true national trade policy like the kind that made America the world’s economic powerhouse.”

_
**_ Total Independence from China _ ** . _“Because economic security is national security, I will revoke China’s Most Favored Nation trade status. I will implement a 4-year plan to phase out all Chinese imports of essential goods and gain total independence from China.

_
**_ China Accountability for Virus _ ** . _“And I will hold China financially accountable for unleashing the China Virus upon the world."

_
**_ Withdraw from W.H.O _ ** . _“I will again withdraw from the W.H.O.—which stands for “We Hide Outbreaks.”

_
**_ Energy Independence _ ** . _“Under my leadership, will regain energy independence, as we had three years ago.”

_
**_ Term Limits _ ** . _“I will fight for a Constitutional Amendment to impose term limits on members of Congress.

_
**_ Using All Lawful Tactics to Win Elections _ ** : _“I will move heaven and earth to fully and finally secure our elections. Our goal will be one-day voting with only paper ballots. But until that day comes, Republicans must compete using every lawful means to win. That means swamping the left with mail-in votes, early-votes, and Election Day votes. Where we can’t get rid of drop boxes, we need them in every church and veteran center. And until we can eliminate ballot harvesting, we will become MASTERS at ballot harvesting—beating the Democrats at their own game, except we will do it LEGALLY.

_
**_ Bringing Forth a Quantum Leap in American Standard of Living _ ** . _“It is not enough just to stop the forces tearing America DOWN—I want once again to build America UP. It is time to start talking about GREATNESS for our country again. Our objective will be a quantum leap in the American Standard of Living, especially for our young people.”

_
_ “We will hold a competition to build new Freedom Cities on the frontier to give countless Americans a new shot at home ownership and the American Dream.”

_
_ “I will challenge the governors of all 50 states to join me in a great beautification campaign. We will rename our schools and boulevards not after communists but after patriots. We will get rid of ugly buildings, and return to the magnificent classical style of Western Civilization."

_
_ “We will support Baby Bonuses for a new Baby Boom.” _

President Trump then concluded with an inspirational call to action for what he and his supporters will accomplish together:

_ “WE WILL FINISH WHAT WE STARTED. We will cross the finish line. We will dismantle the Deep State. We will demolish woke tyranny and we will restore the American Republic to all its radiant glory.” _

In vivid language, President Trump signaled at the outset of his speech what his supporters will get with him in a second term: “With you at my side, we will demolish the Deep State, we will expel the warmongers, we will drive out the globalists, we will cast out the Communists, we will throw off the political class that hates our country, we will beat the Democrats, we will rout the fake news media, we will expose and appropriately deal with the RINOS, we will evict Joe Biden from the White House, and we will liberate America from these villains and scoundrels ONCE AND FOR ALL.” In a rousing battle cry, he then made clear the stakes in 2024: “This is the final battle—they know it, I know it, YOU know it, everybody knows it. Either they win, or we win. And I promise you this: if you put me back in the White House, their reign will be OVER, and America will be a FREE NATION once again.” President Trump also underscored how he and his political movement have transformed the Republican party and that today there is no going back: “When we started on this journey, a journey like there has never been before, we had a Republican Party that was ruled by freaks, neo-cons, globalists, and open border zealots, and fools. But we are NEVER going back to the Party of Paul Ryan, Karl Rove, and Jeb Bush.....We are never going back to a country ruled by entrenched political dynasties in both parties, rotten special interests, China-loving politicians, and a militant left-wing news media that’s either frightened of telling the truth or is truly evil and bad—you never know which. We are not going back to this—Not now, not EVER.” President Trump recounted many of his administration’s achievements and how they have been reversed by the Biden administration, including standing up strong to China, not starting any new wars thanks to a policy of peace through strength, shutting down the illegal foreign invasion on the southern border and establishing the most secure border in history, and defending our heroes against the thugs tearing down statues and pushing Critical Race Theory in our institutions. He went on to describe in great detail what he will do in a second term: War and Peace . “I am the only candidate who can make this promise: I will prevent World War Three.” Border : “Three years ago, we had the safest border in the history of our country—and I will quickly do that again. “When I am back in the White House, the very first reconciliation bill I sign will be for a massive increase in border patrol, and a colossal increase in the number of ICE deportation officers.” “Under my leadership, we will use all necessary state, local, federal, and military resources to carry out the largest domestic deportation operation in American History.” “I will ask every state and federal agency to identify every known or suspected gang member in America, and every one of them that is here illegally, we will pick them up, and we will throw them out of our country, and there will be no questions asked.” “To stop the flow of deadly drugs, it will be my policy to take down the cartels just as I took down the ISIS caliphate that everybody said was impossible to do.” Law and Order : “In cities where there has been a complete breakdown of public safety, I will send in federal assets, including the National Guard, until law and order is restored.” Homelessness : “I will end the scourge of homelessness taking over our cities and suburbs. We will take the homeless, drug addicted, and severely deranged, get them off our streets, and create Tent Cities, where we will get them the help they so clearly need.” Eradicating Marxism from the Government . “On Day One, I will revoke Joe Biden’s crazy executive order installing Marxist Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion Czars in every federal agency, and I will immediately terminate all staffers hired to implement this agenda. I will urge Congress to create a restitution fund for Americans who have been unjustly discriminated against by these Biden policies. And we will ban all racial discrimination by the government.” Champion of Parent’s Right . “I will fight for PARENTS’ RIGHTS, including universal school choice, and the direct election of school principals by the parents. If any principal is not getting the job done, the parents should be able to vote to fire them and select someone who will.” Promoting Patriotic Education . “Continuing the work of the 1776 Commission, we will teach OUR values and promote OUR history and OUR traditions to our children.” Protecting Our Youth . “I will revoke every Biden policy promoting the chemical castration and sexual mutilation of our youth—and ask Congress to send me a bill prohibiting child sexual mutilation in all 50 states.” Protecting Women's Sports . “We will keep men out of women’s sports.” Smashing the Censorship Cartel . “I will destroy the illegal censorship regime and bring back FREE SPEECH in America.” America First Trade Policy : “I will create a true national trade policy like the kind that made America the world’s economic powerhouse.” Total Independence from China . “Because economic security is national security, I will revoke China’s Most Favored Nation trade status. I will implement a 4-year plan to phase out all Chinese imports of essential goods and gain total independence from China. China Accountability for Virus . “And I will hold China financially accountable for unleashing the China Virus upon the world." Withdraw from W.H.O . “I will again withdraw from the W.H.O.—which stands for “We Hide Outbreaks.” Energy Independence . “Under my leadership, will regain energy independence, as we had three years ago.” Term Limits . “I will fight for a Constitutional Amendment to impose term limits on members of Congress. Using All Lawful Tactics to Win Elections : “I will move heaven and earth to fully and finally secure our elections. Our goal will be one-day voting with only paper ballots. But until that day comes, Republicans must compete using every lawful means to win. That means swamping the left with mail-in votes, early-votes, and Election Day votes. Where we can’t get rid of drop boxes, we need them in every church and veteran center. And until we can eliminate ballot harvesting, we will become MASTERS at ballot harvesting—beating the Democrats at their own game, except we will do it LEGALLY. Bringing Forth a Quantum Leap in American Standard of Living . “It is not enough just to stop the forces tearing America DOWN—I want once again to build America UP. It is time to start talking about GREATNESS for our country again. Our objective will be a quantum leap in the American Standard of Living, especially for our young people.” “We will hold a competition to build new Freedom Cities on the frontier to give countless Americans a new shot at home ownership and the American Dream.” “I will challenge the governors of all 50 states to join me in a great beautification campaign. We will rename our schools and boulevards not after communists but after patriots. We will get rid of ugly buildings, and return to the magnificent classical style of Western Civilization." “We will support Baby Bonuses for a new Baby Boom.” President Trump then concluded with an inspirational call to action for what he and his supporters will accomplish together: “WE WILL FINISH WHAT WE STARTED. We will cross the finish line. We will dismantle the Deep State. We will demolish woke tyranny and we will restore the American Republic to all its radiant glory.” | ---|--- | | ---|---|--- We are up against the FAKE NEWS media, their Democrat Partners, and Big Tech who all want to see us FAIL. We need to do whatever it takes to get the TRUTH out. Thank you, Donald J Trump 45th President of the United States P.S. Text TRUMP to 88022 to receive direct updates from yours truly. I'll be sending a text soon, so don't wait. Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. Trump for President 2024 and Save America PAC. donaldjtrump.com |

name: Jon Tester
subject: Did you know?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
Not a single state bordering Montana has a Democratic Senator
#
Peter,
Did you know that not a single state bordering Montana has a Democratic Senator? In fact, I’m the only statewide-elected Democrat in Montana.
That’s why I spend every single day fighting so hard, not just for my own constituents, but for everyone who lives in a farm town like me — especially folks without any Democratic Senators looking out for them.
Because while Washington Republicans might choose wealthy corporations over dirt farmers, side with Big Pharma instead of teachers, or listen to their big donors and ignore the rest of us, **I will always work for you.**
When you make a donation to my campaign, you’re not just supporting me. You’re giving me the resources to fight back against Mitch McConnell’s disastrous policies and work to protect our progress — for all of us.
**[So, if you can, I’m personally asking you to split a $5 or more donation between Senator Durbin's campaign and my campaign to help us reach our critical fundraising goal. We’re slightly behind right now and anything you can give keeps me fighting for you in the Senate.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59758251/395012385/-688892445?refcode=dd_em_230306_1_t1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MmIyZGUyMS00M2JjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PD0GluJfyUbaTfr5hqmdXQ7pLD2qEv-FDTt1EEnZFqM=)**

name: Deroy Murdock
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College’s National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zq9ibb7toe0cnemb8vmjnt1qm4anhgjrnuk39ih0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0shgm0p72cph2bs)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

In an interview published in _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's digest of liberty, Associate Justice of the Supreme Court Clarence Thomas explained what he sees as his role on the nation's highest court: **" My job is to apply the Constitution."**

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z687tfb2dn0djujpbcgf70tpe7pqbevut3irnpso_rp22sh2s8i66pr0shgm0p72cph2bs) [NO](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zlm38qkeu637oiesbv3khoj4aq5sdrvtt63apcmo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0shgm0p72cph2bs) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats."

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court's role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zirbssjr7l7iuu58dde90k1gh52u88rlj2cqei18_rp22sh2s8i66pr0shgm0p72cph2bs)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America's schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I'm sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That's why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution" and "The U.S. Supreme Court."

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty--featuring issues such as "Clarence Thomas and the Lost Constitution."

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America's great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zk1vpqsmdoen47evcm08pu2c89hakoqg8i80l9lg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0shgm0p72cph2bs)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Deroy Murdock, [please use this preferences page](http://e.deroymurdock.com/prefs/9z2zi2jpbr0i51n6goovr9qu2e98rf7rsitvo5jogvo).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zguog25oeai5o3citra6hhgjeobc2oqarpc22j00_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or7c3i62o34s9j649fg)

---
| | Peter, I’ve got to be honest with you: we’re struggling to hold President Biden accountable due to the lack of conservatives in the U.S. Senate.**I** **know that the only way we’re going to break through the shields and barricades the mainstream media has erected around the president is by electing even more Republicans to the U.S Senate.** ** ** There is no doubt about it – Democrats overperformed last year, upending nearly every prediction and forecast made by political forecasters. **We should have seen the writing on the wall, but we didn’t.** ** ****I recorded a video asking for your help. Would you do me a favor and take 30 seconds to hear me out today?**
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=d75abca1a6c0492b9b07506ebc5302ff&_e=FVTYLnzVfO3Sb_3R_n8lXAlZw96uuMk7x5Gb99UkY8L3zHZvj_f4GNZKBncdudaCksAl_Ug2fWsEHPEhAAgbS64V6qA_ruSIHos-3x0CmowQVnPeFSuqDlT622k1YscK8NnHsEmVtqKTnxLEuXaEeLtLoqO7wzoJs4LJ6WfyJVQHegur5Irgt134xVNQpELGtjqZNfyBH3bfYfyImznz6QpI8LFZohT0hqSlOfTZlRz12uwPX9N0riOvlvRoDPJKho9ymqWpiBxj2utkmjmwbQUGdmi6em_dGXkMMNI0ochxi5X3xO7TKjniynm7A9pW-uytlEvVtU8youQ-GTYK0gEp4YnRw0XkgadkmovqxDISoHR4BxOQjiW0UXK4ziD9CqH5ajY9U4E6g3m6G7grdweeD8aSNPDZInuckOJ1JnSoApKjyj3bGw4-jUw26imhpUUWQPwfxXxTs31W7x4bsjIWglN7O97UtonVDoXo4aU%3D)
---
| | **I’m here to tell you today that we’re not going to make the same mistake twice.**** ** Republicans have the most favorable Senate map in nearly 8 years in the upcoming election. The built-in advantage we have with such a favorable map means we CANNOT blow our chance of flipping the Senate. If you’re wondering why my colleagues and I are reaching out and are raising money this early in the election cycle, that’s why. **Peter, please, help us early so that we can flip the Senate to stand up to President Biden.**** ** Thank you for all you do. Sen. Marsha Blackburn
---

name: Patrick Murphy
subject: Finding Value in a Changing World - March 11 in Austin, Texas
body:
This Saturday, March 11th, in Austin, Texas I will be hosting an event from 9:00 a.m. - 2:30 p.m. at The Eleanor. The event is entitled _Growth, Defense, Healthcare and Technology. Finding Value in a Changing World. _The event features speakers including Mike Parrish (Chief Acquisition Office at the VA), Lisa Jaster (First Female Army Ranger), Sue Gordon (Former Director of National Intelligence), Dakota Meyer (Medal of Honor Recipient), Tim Kennedy (Green Beret and MMA Fighter), and more. These speakers will discuss some of the most important issues our country faces in relation to healthcare, technology, and business in three separate panels: _Healthcare Innovation and Investment, Defense Innovation and Investment, and People, Culture and Technology_.
If you're going to be in Austin or the surrounding area this weekend, I would love to meet you there. I've attached a link to register for the event below.

SCHOOL BOARD RACE SPECIAL EDITION

Last night, our Editor-in-Chief Mark Vargas and Publisher Scott Kaspar interviewed school board candidates on "Mark My Words" on AM 560 The Answer.

These are shaping up to be some of the most important races, and no one else is covering them!

Watch these highlights and learn more about these candidates, who are investing more than just their time, talent, and treasure - they are being attacked by the radical left that is being funded by Gov. Pritzker!

body:

| Fight for Progress is dedicated to building a more progressive America and has raised over $300,000 for Democratic candidates. | Peter,

As we prepare for the upcoming election cycle, we want to hear from supporters like you. [_**Should President Biden run for re-election?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59760179/395018710/-212616903?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAzY2E0NTZiLTQ5YmMtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XbqCO6sUcBOlAvDYkib3ddXhod02oUIYnca8Xu-EP2I=&emci=fac9456b-49bc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=03ca456b-49bc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=22408598)
---
| [YES ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59760182/395018712/-212616903?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAzY2E0NTZiLTQ5YmMtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XbqCO6sUcBOlAvDYkib3ddXhod02oUIYnca8Xu-EP2I=&emci=fac9456b-49bc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=03ca456b-49bc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=22408598)
---
| [NO ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59760184/395018714/-212616903?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAzY2E0NTZiLTQ5YmMtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XbqCO6sUcBOlAvDYkib3ddXhod02oUIYnca8Xu-EP2I=&emci=fac9456b-49bc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=03ca456b-49bc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=22408598)

We’re dedicated to taking back the House and electing leaders who will deliver progress for us. Voters are an essential part of any election, so we’d appreciate your insight as we determine our strategies for 2024. [_**Should President Biden run for re-election?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59760186/395018716/-212616903?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAzY2E0NTZiLTQ5YmMtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XbqCO6sUcBOlAvDYkib3ddXhod02oUIYnca8Xu-EP2I=&emci=fac9456b-49bc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=03ca456b-49bc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=22408598)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Nick=20Melvoin?=
subject: On Friday night, I got a call…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nick Melvoin for Congress - FEC ID #C00831289PO Box 92320, Pasadena, CA 91109Additional information is available at fec
body:
| | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/brysongillette/its-been-a-month-322092?e=1012843e9c)
---
[](https://nickmelvoin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ecb3c4d83b7c99a9fd895cfd0&id=d8548e83f8&e=1012843e9c)
Dear Friend,
On Friday night, I got a call from the Los Angeles School Police Department Watch Commander’s Office that “a district student died as the result of a homicide off campus.” One call like this would be too many; I’ve gotten far too many in my time in office. Each time, I try to find new ways to protect our students from the epidemic of gun violence, but the School Board can’t legislate on gun control and that’s one of the reasons why I’m running for Congress.
But just because I’m not there yet doesn’t mean I’m not doing all that I can. Most recently, the Board unanimously approved [my resolution](https://nickmelvoin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ecb3c4d83b7c99a9fd895cfd0&id=03a5af236a&e=1012843e9c) advocating for state and federal legislation aimed at curtailing gun violence with new requirements and safety measures and reviewing district procurement and financial policies to discourage gun sales through divestment or other means.
I want to make sure the District is doing everything possible—including using our purchasing power—to fight back against this epidemic. But I can do even more as the next member of Congress.
[**Please help me get there by contributing $25, $50 or $100 today.**](https://nickmelvoin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ecb3c4d83b7c99a9fd895cfd0&id=a362985308&e=1012843e9c)
Thank you -- and onward,
|
---
| [Click Here to Donate](https://nickmelvoin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ecb3c4d83b7c99a9fd895cfd0&id=0581eb0361&e=1012843e9c)
---
If you’d like to mail a check, please make it payable to:
Nick Melvoin for CongressPO Box 92320, Pasadena, CA 91109

name: Dan Goldman
subject: The Kellyanne Conway Amendment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York**
body:
|
#
---
Good Monday afternoon, Peter, Last week, Republicans introduced H.R. 140, which would supposedly stop the federal government from censoring protected speech. Of course, most of us call that the First Amendment. **Instead of identifying real threats to our democracy, my Republican colleagues continue to peddle far-right conspiracies.** To date, they have provided no evidence in any way that protected speech has been prohibited by the government. This bill is a purported solution in search of a non-existent problem. In order to address real abuse of power by government officials, I offered up an amendment to their bill that adds some teeth to the _Hatch Act_ , which was willfully ignored by the Trump Administration. The _Hatch Act_ , which limits political activity of executive branch employees, was violated by 13 Trump Administration officials, including more than 60 times by Kellyanne Conway. After the independent investigative body for the _Hatch Act_ recommended that Conway be fired, she notoriously responded: _“If you’re trying to silence me through the Hatch Act, it’s not going to work. Let me know when the jail sentence starts.”_ **So I introduced the Kellyanne Conway Amendment to the Republican bill to do just that. It would make a knowing and intentional violation of the _Hatch Act_ a felony. Not surprisingly, the Republican majority voted down this amendment.** I also introduced another amendment that would provide an exception to their bill for foreign efforts to interfere in our election, as Russia did in 2016 through Facebook, Twitter, and other social media. **Once again, the Republicans voted it down, apparently still hoping to welcome foreign interference in our elections.** I expect to bring up this amendment again on the House floor this week to force all Republicans to declare where they stand on foreign interference in our elections. **[To show your support for my efforts to keep Russia, China, and other foreign countries out of our elections, please donate below.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59760853/395020735/160930933?refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230306_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTkzY2YxZi00YWJjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jdqfjp1Y7TqxMu_GzV7r1qSiMuMKVp7IZYqM9CDYqW0=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59760854/395020736/160930933?express_lane=true&amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230306_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTkzY2YxZi00YWJjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jdqfjp1Y7TqxMu_GzV7r1qSiMuMKVp7IZYqM9CDYqW0=)

* * *

It has been a busy couple of weeks in Washington and in our District. Here are some additional updates about what I’ve been doing to defend our families, our freedoms, and our future:
* As a result of my official complaint against George Santos calling for his investigation, **the House Ethics Committee opened a bipartisan inquiry into his congressional campaign for engaging in unlawful activity.** We’re one step closer to getting accountability for the voters that George Santos, Kevin McCarthy, and Elise Stefanik defrauded to gain power.

* **I called for an emergency meeting with the New York City Housing Authority after tenants at the Campos Plaza Community Center entered their ninth consecutive day of an unaddressed sewage backup.** This situation is absolutely unacceptable. Residents deserve dignity, respect, and safe housing.

* **I joined the House Pro-Choice Caucus,** and immediately cosponsored three pieces of legislation protecting abortion rights nationwide — including the _EACH Act_ , which would repeal the Hyde Amendment and guarantee abortion coverage regardless of one’s health insurance status.

* **On the day that would have been John Lewis’ 83rd birthday, I cosponsored two bills honoring his legacy:** a resolution commemorating his life and career, and the _John Lewis Civil Rights Fellowship Act_ — bipartisan, bicameral legislation to create a Fulbright scholarship for students who are studying nonviolent civil rights movements abroad.

* **I joined my fellow members of Congress in congratulating Julie Su’s nomination to be our nation’s next Secretary of Labor.** It is long overdue for President Biden to include an Asian-American in his Cabinet, and Deputy Secretary Su is an excellent pick.

* **I announced that I’m working together with Congresswoman Grace Meng and Congresswoman Nicole Malliotakis to secure a visa for the mother of YiJie Ye** , the victim who was tragically struck and killed by a U-Haul truck in Brooklyn last week. We’re going to do whatever it takes to ensure that his mother can come from her home in China to New York for her son’s funeral.

* * *

**Peter, there is no more important fight than the one to protect and defend our democracy. If you’d like to support my fight for accountability and to win real results for the American people, then please make a contribution today to support my work in Congress.**

clean_body: | Good Monday afternoon, Peter, Last week, Republicans introduced H.R. 140, which would supposedly stop the federal government from censoring protected speech. Of course, most of us call that the First Amendment. Instead of identifying real threats to our democracy, my Republican colleagues continue to peddle far-right conspiracies. To date, they have provided no evidence in any way that protected speech has been prohibited by the government. This bill is a purported solution in search of a non-existent problem. In order to address real abuse of power by government officials, I offered up an amendment to their bill that adds some teeth to the Hatch Act , which was willfully ignored by the Trump Administration. The Hatch Act , which limits political activity of executive branch employees, was violated by 13 Trump Administration officials, including more than 60 times by Kellyanne Conway. After the independent investigative body for the Hatch Act recommended that Conway be fired, she notoriously responded: “If you’re trying to silence me through the Hatch Act, it’s not going to work. Let me know when the jail sentence starts.” So I introduced the Kellyanne Conway Amendment to the Republican bill to do just that. It would make a knowing and intentional violation of the Hatch Act a felony. Not surprisingly, the Republican majority voted down this amendment. I also introduced another amendment that would provide an exception to their bill for foreign efforts to interfere in our election, as Russia did in 2016 through Facebook, Twitter, and other social media. Once again, the Republicans voted it down, apparently still hoping to welcome foreign interference in our elections. I expect to bring up this amendment again on the House floor this week to force all Republicans to declare where they stand on foreign interference in our elections. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = It has been a busy couple of weeks in Washington and in our District. Here are some additional updates about what I’ve been doing to defend our families, our freedoms, and our future: As a result of my official complaint against George Santos calling for his investigation, the House Ethics Committee opened a bipartisan inquiry into his congressional campaign for engaging in unlawful activity. We’re one step closer to getting accountability for the voters that George Santos, Kevin McCarthy, and Elise Stefanik defrauded to gain power. I called for an emergency meeting with the New York City Housing Authority after tenants at the Campos Plaza Community Center entered their ninth consecutive day of an unaddressed sewage backup. This situation is absolutely unacceptable. Residents deserve dignity, respect, and safe housing. I joined the House Pro-Choice Caucus, and immediately cosponsored three pieces of legislation protecting abortion rights nationwide — including the EACH Act , which would repeal the Hyde Amendment and guarantee abortion coverage regardless of one’s health insurance status. On the day that would have been John Lewis’ 83rd birthday, I cosponsored two bills honoring his legacy: a resolution commemorating his life and career, and the John Lewis Civil Rights Fellowship Act — bipartisan, bicameral legislation to create a Fulbright scholarship for students who are studying nonviolent civil rights movements abroad. I joined my fellow members of Congress in congratulating Julie Su’s nomination to be our nation’s next Secretary of Labor. It is long overdue for President Biden to include an Asian-American in his Cabinet, and Deputy Secretary Su is an excellent pick. I announced that I’m working together with Congresswoman Grace Meng and Congresswoman Nicole Malliotakis to secure a visa for the mother of YiJie Ye , the victim who was tragically struck and killed by a U-Haul truck in Brooklyn last week. We’re going to do whatever it takes to ensure that his mother can come from her home in China to New York for her son’s funeral. Peter, there is no more important fight than the one to protect and defend our democracy. If you’d like to support my fight for accountability and to win real results for the American people, then please make a contribution today to support my work in Congress. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = Thank you, and I’ll be in touch with more soon. Dan Dan Goldman for New York PO BOX 3306 New York, NY 10008 United States | mailto:info@dangoldmanforny.com | Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York

Subject: We hate to see you go.

Friend, for the last **3 years** , you have stood by House Republicans' side. You've supported the Conservative fight furiously and consistently through every battle we've seen,**but we have bad news for you. **

name: Mike Pompeo
subject: It’s time for change
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
| |
---
| | | |
---

I will never stop fighting for you.

Before I was Secretary of State and CIA Director, I ran a machine shop where I had about 200 people working for me - people that I cared about.

I saw how the back-breaking regulations of government bureaucrats hurt my business and my workers. So I decided to do something about it.

**First** , I ran for Congress. There, I held Obama accountable for his job-killing regulations and held Hillary Clinton's feet to the fire for her lies over Benghazi.

**Then** , I had the high honor of joining the Trump Administration. As President Trump's CIA Director and Secretary of State, I replaced the weak, America-last policies of the Democrats with America First policies that made America safer and stronger.

**Now** , I am working tirelessly to guide the Republican party in the right direction.

---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62398751:JCsZraGNM:m:1:3365131770:DFBB9592891507B79F160EE11A91A959:r)
---

2022 taught us that America desperately needs a strong, stable, and steady alternative to the woke, weak, and waffling 'leaders' in the White House.

I'll be working hard to provide America with that alternative, and I'm counting on you to join me. **[Will you please support me in this endeavor?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62398751:JCsZraGNM:m:1:3365131770:DFBB9592891507B79F160EE11A91A959:r "Will you please support me in this endeavor?")**

I'm tired of losing, and I am sure you are too. The Republican party MUST change course to win big in 2024.

If you agree, I need you to join me today to help us grow the conservative movement and bring strong, stable, and steady leadership back to America.

**[Will you stand with me to help successfully AND positively impact the future of our country?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62398751:JCsZraGNM:m:1:3365131770:DFBB9592891507B79F160EE11A91A959:r "Will you stand
with me to help successfully AND positively impact the future of our country?")**

Fighting For Our Future,
---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62398751:JCsZraGNM:m:1:3365131770:DFBB9592891507B79F160EE11A91A959:r)
---
Mike Pompeo
---
| |
---

Championing Our American Values")
---

_**A SPECIAL NOTE FROM MIKE POMPEO**_

Whether it's sending a spy balloon over our sensitive military installations, stealing our industrial secrets to undermine our economy, or making sure their surveillance and propaganda app is on every American's phone, the Chinese Communist Party is working day and night to make America weaker.

If you share my concerns about China's threat to America, make a donation to help support tough conservatives who will never give an inch to the CCP.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Congresswoman=20Lori=20Chavez=2DDeRemer?=
subject: The Largest Drug Bust In Oregon’s History
body:
Over a year ago today... | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/8ffbc513d530/lori-chavez-deremer-announces-candidacy-for-congress-8118851?e=c87c5d8d97)
---
| | [](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=7db4c06ab5&e=c87c5d8d97)
---
| Peter,

_**Just over a year ago, the largest drug bust in Oregon's history occurred in the 5th district, where law enforcement seized enough fentanyl to kill the entire population of Oregon.**_

This dangerous drug is being funneled across our borders in massive amounts, and it is causing harm to our communities and our families. We must take action to prevent fentanyl from entering our country and stop those who are distributing it.

_As we mark the anniversary of this event, I want to reaffirm my commitment to fighting against the spread of fentanyl in our communities._ I am working hard to push for important legislation that will secure our border and stop the flow of fentanyl and other dangerous drugs.

But I can’t do this without your support, Peter.

[_**Can you contribute $100, $50, or even $10 to help me continue the fight against this dangerous drug? >>>**_](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=8062eaa40d&e=c87c5d8d97)
---

clean_body: Over a year ago today... | | | | | | | Peter, Just over a year ago, the largest drug bust in Oregon's history occurred in the 5th district, where law enforcement seized enough fentanyl to kill the entire population of Oregon. This dangerous drug is being funneled across our borders in massive amounts, and it is causing harm to our communities and our families. We must take action to prevent fentanyl from entering our country and stop those who are distributing it. As we mark the anniversary of this event, I want to reaffirm my commitment to fighting against the spread of fentanyl in our communities. I am working hard to push for important legislation that will secure our border and stop the flow of fentanyl and other dangerous drugs. But I can’t do this without your support, Peter. | "CONTRIBUTE $100" | "CONTRIBUTE $50" | "CONTRIBUTE $10" | Together, we can protect our families from the dangers of fentanyl. Thank you, Lori Chavez-DeRemer Congresswoman OR-05 | "CONTRIBUTE" | | | | |

name: Team AOC
subject: Support Troop 6000 » 🍪
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
You can help support Troop 6000, the first Girl Scout troop founded by and for girls living in the New York City Shelter System.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20230306-3970-header&t=1&akid=3970%2E2526796%2E_LfWbV)
Six years ago, Alexandria’s district came together to establish **Troop 6000, the first Girl Scout troop founded by and for girls living in the New York City Shelter System.**
Each week, Girl Scouts meet in shelters across the city to take part in activities that help them make new friends, earn badges, and learn to see themselves as leaders. All fees, uniforms, trips, and program materials are provided at no cost.
For Troop 6000 members, not only does Girl Scouting mean fun, it means consistency and community – a network of supportive peers and adults who, even if they’ve never met before, have similar experiences and are part of the same club.
[**It’s Girl Scout cookies season! That means you have the opportunity to support this program for girls empowerment by buying delicious Girl Scout cookies — from Samoas and Tagalongs, to Thin Mints or your favorite flavor!**](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/10407?t=2&akid=3970%2E2526796%2E_LfWbV)
**[Support Troop 6000 — Order your cookies here »](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/10407?t=3&akid=3970%2E2526796%2E_LfWbV)**
Proceeds from every box sold help the hundreds of Girl Scouts in Troop 6000 go to Girl Scout camp, earn badges, and do so many other fun Girl Scout activities.
The New York City Shelter System provides temporary, emergency housing for families. The average stay for a family in a city shelter can be up to 18 months. Remaining connected to the community and opportunities introduced to them through Troop 6000 can help facilitate a successful transition for girls and young people.
Every girl deserves a chance to reach her full potential: to have her eyes opened to possibilities for college and careers, to make loving and supportive friends, to learn from caring mentors, and to chart her own course to achieve her goals. That’s what Troop 6000 is all about.
[**Help support Troop 6000’s mission by purchasing Girl Scout cookies today.**](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/10407?t=4&akid=3970%2E2526796%2E_LfWbV)
Thank you,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ocasio-campaign?refcode=em20230306-3970-P_OTH_CHA_MIS&t=5&refcode2=3970_2526796__LfWbV&akid=3970%2E2526796%2E_LfWbV)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20230306-3970-P_OTH_CHA_MIS&t=6&akid=3970%2E2526796%2E_LfWbV)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=7&akid=3970%2E2526796%2E_LfWbV) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=8&akid=3970%2E2526796%2E_LfWbV) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=9&akid=3970%2E2526796%2E_LfWbV)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

Campaigns across the board are struggling to reach their goals, but from what Wiley and the other team members have told me, our grassroots support is second to none. That said, I want to show up especially strong in my first month on the job. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **= | = ---|--- = | = = | = Not only is March my first full month on the job, but it is our last month of Q1. Bo Hines and anyone hoping to unseat Wiley will be able to see just how much support he has. We have no time to waste. Our report must reflect just how strong this team is. = I am so happy to be on this team, and I can’t wait to see all the incredible things we can accomplish together. Thank you, Peter. There's no question that Mitch McConnell and his special interest allies will pour millions of dollars into Nevada to try to buy this seat. He has done it before, and he nearly succeeded. **That's why I'm relying on grassroots supporters like you to step up right here, right now – today.**

Because it's not just _your_ $15. It's your $15 combined with $15 from your neighbor, your friend, a waitress in Las Vegas, a nurse in Reno, and a small-business owner in Carson City. Together, we're building a powerful grassroots movement to keep this must-win seat and the Senate blue.

**Senate control could _all_ come down to what happens in Nevada – so please, Peter, we need all hands on deck: [_Will you split $15 or more now between my campaign and the Democratic Party of Georgia to fuel our reelection campaign to victory and defend our Democratic Senate majority? Every dollar makes a crucial difference in these early days of the election cycle._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59776245/395038580/1716511289?refcode=20230306.2_JR_3L_ND&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTY0NzBlMy01OWJjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OM_U_CbiAGPiO04msf6YmZGToDHgnYvcSG5f4Ast2YI=)**

I can't tell you how grateful I am for your support. Thank you.

– Jacky
