name: =?utf-8?Q?Brady=20Batt=2C=20Executive=20Director?=
subject: 2023 Republican Action Conference
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
Introducing the RAC Panels: Come and learn aboout campaigning - Join us at the Republican Action Conference!

http://wsrp.org
Ballots Are Out, Vote By November 2nd!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WeGlgXqOx-Y

With ballots out, now is the perfect time to get out there and volunteer on a conservative campaign. Every door you knock on in these local races matter a lot and the results of this election year will be used as a bellwether for the 2022 midterms.

We are also hosting another WSRP Statewide Day Of Action on Saturday, October 30th! Bring a friend or neighbor to volunteer for a few hours to help local conservatives win in November! Sign up here to join our Statewide Day Of Action! (https://form.jotform.com/212737084845058)
State Sen. Gildon On Vaccine Mandates
https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws
State Senator Chris Gildon (R - Puyallup) joins the podcast this week to discuss vaccine mandates, anti-policing laws, the Long-Term Care Tax, and how he got his start in politics. WAGOP is now on Apple Podcasts and Spotify, follow us and never miss an episode! Listen here. (https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws)
Republican Leaders Fight Inslee's Mandate
Thanks to our Republican leaders in the State House and Senate for fighting back and offering a strong rebuke of Inslee's harmful vaccine mandate. Below is an excerpt of their most recent statement to the press:

“We are already experiencing higher prices and empty shelves partially as a result of COVID's shutdowns and workforce shortages. Today's deadline, with its unnecessarily hardline consequences, will only make that worse when hundreds, if not thousands, lose their jobs and are denied unemployment benefits. It also threatens public safety by reducing our police forces at a time when crime is already rising. People feel unsafe. They are afraid of what criminals will do when there are even fewer law enforcement officers to respond. And they are worried about people's chances of survival if there aren't enough first responders to help in an emergency. The governor underestimates the potential impact of his actions.

“Coercion, intimidation, threats and public shaming are not tactics a leader should be using against the people. The governor's obvious disdain for those who are choosing to lose their jobs rather than compromise their right to make their own medical decisions is unhelpful. He is dividing the public – segregating us and turning people against each other. Yesterday, even unvaccinated health-care workers were heroes. Today, they become villains in the governor's narrative."

Read the full statement. (https://jtwilcox.houserepublicans.wa.gov/2021/10/18/republican-leaders-todays-vaccine-deadline-threatens-critical-services-public-safety/?fbclid=IwAR3WxI9H29hbbmfbZhdkDS9QjqdVd2TIRCdjNjUkUlLdeThtbUjK_WBWJuw)
Smiley Campaign Shows Grassroots Support In Latest Fundraising Quarter
Tiffany Smiley is fighting hard to retire Patty Murray and her latest fundraising numbers show not only has Tiffany raised more than $1.6 million but she also has unequivocal grassroots support, with over 10,000 donors from Washington State. Flipping a U.S. Senate seat is hard work but Tiffany has shown in the only 5 months since starting her campaign, that she is a force to be reckoned with. Learn more about how Tiffany stands on the issues here (https://www.smileyforwashington.com/issues) .
Contact:
Steve Johnson
Communications Director
Washington State Republican Party
(425) 460-0570
steve@wsrp.org (mailto:steve@wsrp.org)

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Change starts today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
I'm looking for founding members of our new cultural movement to revive the American Dream.

| [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=066b44f8706548228f1313f10fa7c6bc&_e=0dFgkZ1u68yG6agby3jKNGi9nW0AwWHvo4yD9Q5_T8uKJMI-mtzJLRoDLzwc1OikzdoFop21cja0X6_Jdx5uh5tFWLK4-srPlNRXZFXbNQ-5-kvGOMyumm0t8kq1VPUSN_65fcdDgYQxmQ16Zbs8HoFqfTmEcVNpF8juaNsNjUq1yUYaSWEKgz04Ct2ql6RAGeY07GZXd83M1sxyv_hSAj4VXS0RCjM6FtsIOebu08D6FU1zX0rcnRxS6ajU1BZEMrLOtu6aGBOLx420OLLOzjq_oEZa-lGXR6NioZRwALVLN7ZHfWUGX5HVpaImL4lw5pxxJWm8R5mwOVrq3gPU_23BHtNUtLJKPZUGc9OXdkiQz77JXiNP4HF_-i8xpmkfvoVzov19V7Z0hVen-u70shMkKI29g5uAd9L9jgJHOhJZ_UcxTNAXNHcCtKiZJeyD)
Fellow American

I am sending you a different type of political email - _mostly because I am not building your typical political campaign._

When I launched my campaign for President, I knew that for us to win on November 5, 2024, we needed to change the way conservatives reach Americans-that's why I am looking to recruit founding members of our new cultural movement to revive the American Dream.

[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=066b44f8706548228f1313f10fa7c6bc&_e=0dFgkZ1u68yG6agby3jKNGi9nW0AwWHvo4yD9Q5_T8uKJMI-mtzJLRoDLzwc1OikzdoFop21cja0X6_Jdx5uh5tFWLK4-srPlNRXZFXbNQ-5-kvGOMyumm0t8kq1VPUSN_65fcdDgYQxmQ16Zbs8HoFqfTmEcVNpF8juaNsNjUq1yUYaSWEKgz04Ct2ql6RAGeY07GZXd83M1sxyv_hSAj4VXS0RCjM6FtsIOebu08D6FU1zX0rcnRxS6ajU1BZEn4jP7uNpPXqoLk_tS47Cbe7BKplqQdZ4G8roLOJGBip6vpsMhPCcSP-aOyRsIDZejZgetmd76-ZWkmGn8gf6N1KeCB8EFH7GQM8CBGx92JMdaOQsoqL18RNMMqmab1jttTZJ_odvjUxQmFxesXoPoEhnEAl7SI6EUjCTwDnGRInZtAPJQx8JWwMPZkxEswAS)
I am running for President to restore the voices of everyday citizens. It's time to stand up to the ruling aristocracy. They try to divide and conquer, **but that won't work if we stay united.**

How do we start? Bottom-up, grassroots support. **[A $1 donation will help us take back the Oval Office from politicians and put it back in the people's hands.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=066b44f8706548228f1313f10fa7c6bc&_e=0dFgkZ1u68yG6agby3jKNGi9nW0AwWHvo4yD9Q5_T8uKJMI-mtzJLRoDLzwc1OikzdoFop21cja0X6_Jdx5uh5tFWLK4-srPlNRXZFXbNQ-5-kvGOMyumm0t8kq1VPUSN_65fcdDgYQxmQ16Zbs8HoFqfTmEcVNpF8juaNsNjUq1yUYaSWEKgz04Ct2ql6RAGeY07GZXd83M1sxyv_hSAj4VXS0RCjM6FtsIOebu08D6FU1zX0rcnRxS6ajU1BZEn4jP7uNpPXqoLk_tS47Cbe7BKplqQdZ4G8roLOJGBirl4ZGHCR1yhzcmQ3p2e4TM4U2koYLy0aFBuEZkIjGLiiO5sEk1BleKdbwIC13ftl2Qe0Z5bjqbjv-QAwnh6opAW0OKPq9esj1NIbn3W35eLOuh6Ov8ucDogaeTeLNj5AaRRf8mBV6spcU_uCuH1sBT)**

Change starts today. Thanks for joining this movement.

For The American Dream,

[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=066b44f8706548228f1313f10fa7c6bc&_e=0dFgkZ1u68yG6agby3jKNGi9nW0AwWHvo4yD9Q5_T8uKJMI-mtzJLRoDLzwc1OikzdoFop21cja0X6_Jdx5uh5tFWLK4-srPlNRXZFXbNQ-5-kvGOMyumm0t8kq1VPUSN_65fcdDgYQxmQ16Zbs8HoFqfTmEcVNpF8juaNsNjUq1yUYaSWEKgz04Ct2ql6RAGeY07GZXd83M1sxyv_hSAj4VXS0RCjM6FtsIOebu08D6FU1zX0rcnRxS6ajU1BZEMrLOtu6aGBOLx420OLLOzmAMKJeWkoXOlkntKVNItFGvoPN3SSnlOzoPmBOu-PC-DB9821UY0IKXIiS6TWhpcP_JtHySCJ3udeeAo-NC7wTRsR8zxG4fNH6ouQaBwIyupCEheUFkctNWNt4i8THEx9KMBEC5nfOioK7CmMzYCZRwphNO3rx1-lStn9Y10kU0)
Vivek Ramaswamy

P.S. To build this new movement, I need people just like you to sign on to be a founding member. **[That means a little bit of money (as little as $1) from as many people who are looking for a change. Join Team Vivek today to become a founding member!](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=066b44f8706548228f1313f10fa7c6bc&_e=0dFgkZ1u68yG6agby3jKNGi9nW0AwWHvo4yD9Q5_T8uKJMI-mtzJLRoDLzwc1OikzdoFop21cja0X6_Jdx5uh5tFWLK4-srPlNRXZFXbNQ-5-kvGOMyumm0t8kq1VPUSN_65fcdDgYQxmQ16Zbs8HoFqfTmEcVNpF8juaNsNjUq1yUYaSWEKgz04Ct2ql6RAGeY07GZXd83M1sxyv_hSAj4VXS0RCjM6FtsIOebu08D6FU1zX0rcnRxS6ajU1BZEn4jP7uNpPXqoLk_tS47Cbe7BKplqQdZ4G8roLOJGBioHv3zTpkQnSkZ3HV_q9ZxgbnCvCQUviiAtE6zpSuWhdsfcq6Bqby_qG4Es4774s6YlzSAu9sbzSuycKJqXKgWCLPXwIyj2cWa_9JK1D7K2KU_VDoj3Rap7tN0Juwz_WAhw_TrVze5cf8lI-3zBXiGq)**

| [** BECOME A
FOUNDING MEMBER ->**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=066b44f8706548228f1313f10fa7c6bc&_e=0dFgkZ1u68yG6agby3jKNGi9nW0AwWHvo4yD9Q5_T8uKJMI-mtzJLRoDLzwc1OikzdoFop21cja0X6_Jdx5uh5tFWLK4-srPlNRXZFXbNQ-5-kvGOMyumm0t8kq1VPUSN_65fcdDgYQxmQ16Zbs8HoFqfTmEcVNpF8juaNsNjUq1yUYaSWEKgz04Ct2ql6RAGeY07GZXd83M1sxyv_hSAj4VXS0RCjM6FtsIOebu08D6FU1zX0rcnRxS6ajU1BZEMrLOtu6aGBOLx420OLLOzrI0yjU2OhQDUgKEsJ1_Bn_SgcHMajOUw5L1QQ5qjZrp1zQBC6Me3PncrRKV4XTr57ZUA4aRCJ6P4m3A99WyJSnPMryl0HPaSQyqYXp08uKv7EwlTWZvpQMUjLJ-1P0B2uDPgyRuiSJPeSNRz-QM9zAylMzuHud9wb_YhvR7AXMq)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=066b44f8706548228f1313f10fa7c6bc&_e=0dFgkZ1u68yG6agby3jKNGi9nW0AwWHvo4yD9Q5_T8uKJMI-mtzJLRoDLzwc1OikzdoFop21cja0X6_Jdx5uh5tFWLK4-srPlNRXZFXbNQ-5-kvGOMyumm0t8kq1VPUSN_65fcdDgYQxmQ16Zbs8HoFqfTmEcVNpF8juaNsNjUq1yUYaSWEKgz04Ct2ql6RAGeY07GZXd83M1sxyv_hSAj4VXS0RCjM6FtsIOebu08D6FU1zX0rcnRxS6ajU1BZEMrLOtu6aGBOLx420OLLOzkuWoj_SPJD_OEVnXMQ6Nhlc1EZGluA6MuHRK7uw2DRJONJl7GuGDMLyj0VvBdsOQge2FdbGz8V8DNqGT2uFFhRpBaE2XD9l0FneLfaTGBx0xex8E5TBfUN4IuMoHnXIij3kA-CPrfV8T1UyItk1IHGSDBLTBzgvLDQc0PceOMyO)

---

| [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=066b44f8706548228f1313f10fa7c6bc&_e=0dFgkZ1u68yG6agby3jKNGn0RfpeHp6S-LpyHyE6eKEYvCv5lMekWaXAZ4whGT3og_DijgCVH7u5FzFVXtyovTGH0ZsuhjAlVf84T-JALRP97Zn8VEzn2Rq-6I68IyEULgT3gFFy50y2AEwk9PrVG7CcyE9Wz3nhaz0SYYTb-EpFsBWZnTW3_1gnLdtA5BZcjX4tP728rJ75JiIC_N2krHUthzGAh6sbzcL2WESGn4A%3D) | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=066b44f8706548228f1313f10fa7c6bc&_e=0dFgkZ1u68yG6agby3jKNAzf9aPZcUCAih9brYWlb1jQpE_IVewFihOHqbcGXmvzR5JCTJgmyda2h9mRDbrPckx9zBq4QcnpT0_7c6gSkhfOw8arJMY1xecyMSCXqZWXXKzN_sJq9r70jF7KpyI-rnyIu5-oNvgmTarqxbpZ_tyjrziU_fko2ZIdCQh5PSXpdl6EusxIUMJvwQPf0AOMFA%3D%3D) | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=066b44f8706548228f1313f10fa7c6bc&_e=0dFgkZ1u68yG6agby3jKNNO-9q7-0LGk5KcvIDT9j48fpt6m6xT2ZCa_-wZyY2fp0OF2Z1czZavtHtDCn1UhJytOiNdbRSUr-hrgty7QvtcfgJvDPCv56jQ2StJxYGKAaJWjnIIjx7bX8-MZho-Xe_Zjv79ukQV-JQS3l_HHiQDwKVNf6vPPvTrqbQpdj1_ZyIjTB6GK_giYi90wqUoN59iwztBj7cNWm8GEcBAuNo4%3D)

Enough is enough.
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59777124/395042748/461678200?refcode=em_eng_2023.03.06_b1_lhq_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDg1OWNhNy01ZWJjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EYufSMYFOmqE6WklUYmAtb9O2GGBlGRJhIOZr5VuxVE=)

Friend,

**Nobody should go broke paying for life-saving medication.** But over the last decade, nearly one in four diabetes patients have reported rationing or skipping insulin doses due to the high costs.

Enough is enough. Last year’s _Inflation Reduction Act_ capped the price of insulin at $35 for seniors on Medicare, but we can’t just stop there.

**It’s time to finish the job and cap the cost of insulin at $35 for all Americans, especially our children.** So we need to know:
|
**Are you with us?
Do you agree that insulin should be capped at $35?**
| [Yes](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59777125/395042749/1173118045?refcode=em_eng_2023.03.06_b1_lhq_all_yes&amount=10&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDg1OWNhNy01ZWJjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EYufSMYFOmqE6WklUYmAtb9O2GGBlGRJhIOZr5VuxVE=)

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: I need you on this team.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Let me explain how we got here.
#
We’ve had a big couple months, Peter.
From launching this campaign on January 6th to calling out Josh Hawley on cable news to breaking Missouri fundraising records, your support has helped us put a national spotlight on Missouri’s U.S. Senate race. And now, our first FEC deadline is just around the corner.
In a moment, I’m going to ask you to **[chip in $10 or whatever you can to help our grassroots campaign stay on track.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/28364?refcode=em20230306-2849&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2849%2E614464%2ESQRSyT) But first, let me explain a little more about how we got here.**
**[ADD A DONATION NOW](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/28364?refcode=em20230306-2849&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2849%2E614464%2ESQRSyT)**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/28364?refcode=em20230306-2849&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=2849%2E614464%2ESQRSyT)
I grew up in Central Missouri. And like so many other Americans, my family lived paycheck-to-paycheck. So when my little sister was born with a heart condition, the medical bills bankrupted us. Maxed-out credit cards and no money left, times had never been tougher.
But we weren’t alone — our community took care of us. When my parents had to take my sister to the hospital in St. Louis, our neighbors and friends took my siblings and me into their homes and brought more meals by the house than we could ever hope to eat. **That’s the Missouri I grew up in.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/28364?refcode=em20230306-2849&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=2849%2E614464%2ESQRSyT)
Their support helped send me to college, and after that I joined the Marines to honor everything they had done for me and my family growing up. Got deployed to Iraq and Afghanistan. Later the Pentagon. I was on the Joint Staff negotiating arms control agreements with NATO and Russia.
When I came home between tours in Iraq and Afghanistan, one of the hardest things was seeing what was happening back in my old neighborhood. It was a community picked for parts — the local corner store boarded up, my first family house bulldozed to the ground. **Here’s all that’s left of it:**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/28364?refcode=em20230306-2849&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=2849%2E614464%2ESQRSyT)
While all of us were risking our lives building up towns like Habbaniyah, Fallujah, and Herat, career politicians like Josh Hawley let our country waste away. They spent trillions on bailouts, tax breaks, and subsidies for the industries that stripped our communities for parts — like Wall Street, Big Pharma, and Big Oil — and then told us they can’t figure out how to invest even a fraction of that into building up our own country and investing in our own people.
**I saw what was happening — and I was ready to fight back.**
So in my final year of active duty, I worked to upend the corporate defense monopolies that leave our country less safe. I also joined an organization that fights corporate monopolies — we took on defense contractors, Big Pharma, Big Tech, Big Ag, Wall Street. The people buying off our politicians and leaving the rest of us behind.
**And now, I’m running for U.S. Senate to replace Josh Hawley and fundamentally change who has power in our country** — so everyday people call the shots, not massive corporations or corrupt politicians. I want to abolish corporate PACs, expose lobbyists writing our laws, criminalize war profiteering, ban insider trading among members of Congress, and enact a Marshall Plan for the Midwest — a massive investment and job creation program that will rebuild our forgotten communities and get us off fossil fuels once and for all.
**Without a single cent of corporate PAC money, we’re building a people-powered movement to defeat Josh Hawley and flip this Senate seat — and I want you on this team.[Please add a donation of any amount right now so we can continue building this movement and finally give power back to working people.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/28364?refcode=em20230306-2849&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=6&akid=2849%2E614464%2ESQRSyT)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:

clean_body: Let me explain how we got here. We’ve had a big couple months, Peter. From launching this campaign on January 6th to calling out Josh Hawley on cable news to breaking Missouri fundraising records, your support has helped us put a national spotlight on Missouri’s U.S. Senate race. And now, our first FEC deadline is just around the corner. In a moment, I’m going to ask you to But first, let me explain a little more about how we got here. I grew up in Central Missouri. And like so many other Americans, my family lived paycheck-to-paycheck. So when my little sister was born with a heart condition, the medical bills bankrupted us. Maxed-out credit cards and no money left, times had never been tougher. But we weren’t alone — our community took care of us. When my parents had to take my sister to the hospital in St. Louis, our neighbors and friends took my siblings and me into their homes and brought more meals by the house than we could ever hope to eat. That’s the Missouri I grew up in. Their support helped send me to college, and after that I joined the Marines to honor everything they had done for me and my family growing up. Got deployed to Iraq and Afghanistan. Later the Pentagon. I was on the Joint Staff negotiating arms control agreements with NATO and Russia. When I came home between tours in Iraq and Afghanistan, one of the hardest things was seeing what was happening back in my old neighborhood. It was a community picked for parts — the local corner store boarded up, my first family house bulldozed to the ground. Here’s all that’s left of it: While all of us were risking our lives building up towns like Habbaniyah, Fallujah, and Herat, career politicians like Josh Hawley let our country waste away. They spent trillions on bailouts, tax breaks, and subsidies for the industries that stripped our communities for parts — like Wall Street, Big Pharma, and Big Oil — and then told us they can’t figure out how to invest even a fraction of that into building up our own country and investing in our own people. I saw what was happening — and I was ready to fight back. So in my final year of active duty, I worked to upend the corporate defense monopolies that leave our country less safe. I also joined an organization that fights corporate monopolies — we took on defense contractors, Big Pharma, Big Tech, Big Ag, Wall Street. The people buying off our politicians and leaving the rest of us behind. And now, I’m running for U.S. Senate to replace Josh Hawley and fundamentally change who has power in our country — so everyday people call the shots, not massive corporations or corrupt politicians. I want to abolish corporate PACs, expose lobbyists writing our laws, criminalize war profiteering, ban insider trading among members of Congress, and enact a Marshall Plan for the Midwest — a massive investment and job creation program that will rebuild our forgotten communities and get us off fossil fuels once and for all. Without a single cent of corporate PAC money, we’re building a people-powered movement to defeat Josh Hawley and flip this Senate seat — and I want you on this team. name: John Bisognano
subject: I want to say thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, Kelly Burton, President
body:
|
---

Team,

**I wanted to reach out to say thank you.**

Earlier this year, we were in a difficult spot. We had hit a fundraising slump over the holidays, and we were worried we might not have the necessary resources to continue powering the NDRC’s fight for fair maps, voting protections, and a strong democracy.

**But last month, this grassroots team showed up in a _huge_ way, and we hit our February fundraising goal. With a critically important election just around the corner in Wisconsin, this was exactly the boost we needed.

[_That said, now is not the time to claim victory – instead, we need to keep this momentum going. If you’re able, I hope you’ll consider making a contribution to the NDRC today to help us continue our work nationwide._](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59777256/395043608/1068403165?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230306_FR_3C_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhlNTc2ZGM1LTVmYmMtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=jxzH_5KPntW8hdOHLKG_rSJLUYUclM1XXTPD--DlmV4=)**

Next month, Wisconsin will hold a state supreme court election, which _The New York Times_ has called “2023’s Biggest, Most Unusual Race.” The outcome will have massive consequences for the future of abortion rights and voting rights in Wisconsin, and could even influence the state’s 2024 presidential election.

Republicans have already started pouring cash into Wisconsin, and experts are predicting this could become the most expensive state supreme court contest in U.S. history. That’s why it’s crucial that we maintain a strong grassroots fundraising pace for our work in Wisconsin and states across the country.

**There is a lot at stake, team. But as President Obama has emphasized, “Our democracy is resilient as long as we stay engaged and active.”

So please: Will you pitch in now, even if it’s just a few dollars, to support the NDRC’s work and help us elect leaders who will defend democracy?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: | Team, I wanted to reach out to say thank you. Earlier this year, we were in a difficult spot. We had hit a fundraising slump over the holidays, and we were worried we might not have the necessary resources to continue powering the NDRC’s fight for fair maps, voting protections, and a strong democracy. But last month, this grassroots team showed up in a huge way, and we hit our February fundraising goal. With a critically important election just around the corner in Wisconsin, this was exactly the boost we needed. = Next month, Wisconsin will hold a state supreme court election, which The New York Times has called “2023’s Biggest, Most Unusual Race.” The outcome will have massive consequences for the future of abortion rights and voting rights in Wisconsin, and could even influence the state’s 2024 presidential election. Republicans have already started pouring cash into Wisconsin, and experts are predicting this could become the most expensive state supreme court contest in U.S. history. That’s why it’s crucial that we maintain a strong grassroots fundraising pace for our work in Wisconsin and states across the country. There is a lot at stake, team. But as President Obama has emphasized, “Our democracy is resilient as long as we stay engaged and active.” So please: Will you pitch in now, even if it’s just a few dollars, to support the NDRC’s work and help us elect leaders who will defend democracy? | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = – John = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Our patchwork, profit-driven healthcare system is failing us.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter,
**Our healthcare system is in crisis.** To get a better idea of just how broken the system is, take a look at this:
[](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/39910?refcode=em20230306-2243&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2243%2E420207%2EpA6C70) _“Guns seem to be easier and cheaper to access than treatment for the wounds they cause. A survivor of the recent mass shooting in Half Moon Bay, California reportedly said to Gov. Gavin Newsom that he needed to keep his hospital stay**as short as possible in order to avoid a massive medical bill.”**_
---
**We know there's a better way forward.** That's why polling from Gallup reaffirms what we've already known to be true for years now — _**a majority of Americans want the government to enact Medicare for All.**_
[**We're closer than ever and we don't plan on backing down now. If you agree, can you chip in today to power our efforts to make Medicare for All a reality?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/39910?refcode=em20230306-2243&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2243%2E420207%2EpA6C70)
**[Chip in $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/39910?refcode=em20230306-2243&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=2243%2E420207%2EpA6C70)**
For far too long, Americans' ability to access quality, affordable healthcare has been determined by the whims of a faulty patchwork of employer-based, individual, and government run-healthcare. Democrats passed the Affordable Care Act, but the GOP has continued to undermine it at every turn. **The costs of care have become astronomically high while the quality of care being received has cratered.**
This has Republicans scared and scrambling to mobilize against Medicare for All by fearmongering with misleading and outright false narratives. But there's no amount of fearmongering the GOP and its allies can use to distract from the glaring reality that the U.S. spends twice as much per capita on healthcare than comparable countries.
Medicare for All could save individuals and families thousands of dollars, undercutting the fake right-wing narrative that a single-payer system would be too expensive. **We know it, the GOP knows it, and the American people know it.**
Passing Medicare for All has never been more urgent. While the number of uninsured Americans has dropped to a record low, thanks to legislation like the Affordable Care Act, _**this alone is not enough.**_ The road ahead will be challenging, but our movement's determination to pass our progressive agenda will never slow down.
**Our grassroots campaign will continue to advocate and organize around the bold solutions needed** to answer the biggest issues facing working people across the country. [**Will you stand with me today, and chip in to power our movement?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/39910?refcode=em20230306-2243&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=2243%2E420207%2EpA6C70)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/39910?refcode=em20230306-2243&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=2243%2E420207%2EpA6C70)**
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230306-2243-footer&t=24&refcode2=2243_420207_pA6C70&akid=2243%2E420207%2EpA6C70)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=25&akid=2243%2E420207%2EpA6C70)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=2243%2E420207%2EpA6C70)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

|
Dear Friend, **President Donald Trump made some outstanding appointments.** First, he appointed actual conservatives to the Supreme Court. Then he made Betsy DeVos Secretary of Education. **In a few days, Mrs. DeVos will be speaking in Jackson. Please come and hear what she has to say! **
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=5a7c31b702&e=5703353baa)
---
_Click on the image above to reserve a ticket!_
| Betsy DeVos’ new book “Hostages No More: The Fight for Education Freedom and the Future of the American Child” is a roadmap for the changes we need to put our country back on the right path.

Single tickets can be purchased for $60 or a VIP table for $800. More details about the event can be found [here.](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=70a266284c&e=5703353baa "https://www.eventbrite.com/e/betsy-devos-tickets-517028455027")

I hope to see you there!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=1897e85338&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
All the Best,

Tyler B. Jones
Director of Communications and Legislative Affairs

Please come and hear what she has to say! | Click on the image above to reserve a ticket! | Betsy DeVos’ new book “Hostages No More: The Fight for Education Freedom and the Future of the American Child” is a roadmap for the changes we need to put our country back on the right path. Single tickets can be purchased for $60 or a VIP table for $800. More details about the event can be found "" I hope to see you there! | "Forward this email to a friend!" | | All the Best, Tyler B. Jones Director of Communications and Legislative Affairs | | |

| **Peter—** I am proud to endorse my friend Bryce Reeves for re-election to the State Senate. He is the conservative fighter we need to help Republicans regain majority control, so they can cut taxes, reduce government, and protect our constitutional freedoms. Please join me in supporting Senator Bryce Reeves! Sincerely,U.S. Congressman Bob Good
---
| | [HELP PROTECT YOUR CONSTITUTIONAL FREEDOMS](https://j0l1y7h.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Ffriends-of-bryce-reeves%2Fdonate/1/01000186b8ba10d0-e1e71725-c865-47b5-8ad1-7df1141e5097-000000/UbvM6Ib22uJ1rHZ2Uf3XIeXu76Y=311)

| A letter from Senator Reeves -
---
| Friend, It comes as no surprise to anyone that America is in trouble. The Bible says, “Where there is no vision, the people perish.” (Proverbs 29). Joe Biden's failure to lead and provide a vision for America has become more prevalent each day he spends in office. In Virginia, the radical left-wing Democrats constantly attempt to erode our parental rights, the quality of our children's education, and our constitutional rights, like our right to bear arms. The VA Senate is currently controlled by a Democrat majority, and we must turn it red. I would graciously ask for your vote on Saturday, May 6, 2023 in the Republican Primary and that you consider contributing a few dollars to my reelection campaign; as the Senate Republican Whip, it is my duty to ensure victory this November and I cannot do that without your help. Thank you for your prayers and support. Yours Truly,
---

name: Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
subject: "Drugmaker Eli Lilly caps the cost of insulin at $35 a month, bringing relief for millions"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
We need all pharmaceutical companies to put a cap on the monthly cost of insulin. Huge update, Peter: **pharmaceutical company Eli Lilly just announced they're capping the cost of their insulin at $35 a month!**

After Kim and Congress capped insulin costs for seniors, drug companies are facing pressure to lower the cost of insulin.

As someone with Type 1 diabetes who has seen insulin prices skyrocket, Kim knows firsthand how this move will help millions afford the lifesaving medication they need. But we still have more work to do. We need all drug companies to put a cap on the monthly cost of insulin.

**[Add your name to stand with Kim and demand a cap on insulin for every American →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59777715/395045526/1534647834?ms=em23_230306_cap2_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&refcode=em23_230306_cap2_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&source=em23_230306_cap2_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230306_cap2_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=VJF2AE10HMw+s0xifmZoaqpYQQm/6+lZszvh0FsFougBUQZpIcfzZZndI4SjSDHspqNaJcekBUDGRKVLRISk1VhqRc3BjHuMo8mw3ApnHcWkpCUH5kbrhIjTWBxMD6QJveJJVfOQ7Xfb5LForFGpIo6xOYASZk5HJbHuGxVple8=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwY2Q2ZGZkYS02MWJjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Nbu_ivO7kFVlUzf4y06y2r2pLfvfde3YSgDEXfF1MQA=&emci=29b8c232-36bc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=0cd6dfda-61bc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=15820338)**

\---------Begin Forwarded Message---------
Sender: Team Schrier
Subject: Lowering the cost of insulin is personal to Kim
Date: Thursday, February 23, 2023 [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59777716/395045527/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwY2Q2ZGZkYS02MWJjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Nbu_ivO7kFVlUzf4y06y2r2pLfvfde3YSgDEXfF1MQA=&emci=29b8c232-36bc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=0cd6dfda-61bc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=15820338)
Team,

When Kim was 16 years old, she was diagnosed with Type 1 diabetes. Like the other 1.6 million people in America with Type 1 diabetes, she depends upon insulin to stay alive.

However, over the last 20 years, the price of insulin has skyrocketed due to Big Pharma’s greed – from $40 a vial to upwards of $300.

Lowering the cost of insulin is personal to Kim. That's why she was proud to help pass a $35 per month cap on insulin for seniors that went into effect at the beginning of the year. This insulin cap will make life saving medication more affordable for thousands of Americans, but we can't stop there.

At his State of the Union address, President Joe Biden called for an insulin cap for _all_ Americans. We got it done for seniors, now we need to finish the job and ensure every American can afford the lifesaving medication they need.

**[Are you with Kim and President Biden in the fight to lower prescription drug costs? Add your name to call for an insulin cap for every American →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59777717/395045528/1534647834?ms=em23_230306_cap2_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&refcode=em23_230306_cap2_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&source=em23_230306_cap2_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230306_cap2_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=VJF2AE10HMw+s0xifmZoaqpYQQm/6+lZszvh0FsFougBUQZpIcfzZZndI4SjSDHspqNaJcekBUDGRKVLRISk1VhqRc3BjHuMo8mw3ApnHcWkpCUH5kbrhIjTWBxMD6QJveJJVfOQ7Xfb5LForFGpIo6xOYASZk5HJbHuGxVple8=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwY2Q2ZGZkYS02MWJjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Nbu_ivO7kFVlUzf4y06y2r2pLfvfde3YSgDEXfF1MQA=&emci=29b8c232-36bc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=0cd6dfda-61bc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=15820338)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59777718/395045529/1534647834?ms=em23_230306_cap2_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&refcode=em23_230306_cap2_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&source=em23_230306_cap2_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230306_cap2_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=VJF2AE10HMw+s0xifmZoaqpYQQm/6+lZszvh0FsFougBUQZpIcfzZZndI4SjSDHspqNaJcekBUDGRKVLRISk1VhqRc3BjHuMo8mw3ApnHcWkpCUH5kbrhIjTWBxMD6QJveJJVfOQ7Xfb5LForFGpIo6xOYASZk5HJbHuGxVple8=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwY2Q2ZGZkYS02MWJjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Nbu_ivO7kFVlUzf4y06y2r2pLfvfde3YSgDEXfF1MQA=&emci=29b8c232-36bc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=0cd6dfda-61bc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=15820338)

But we still have more work to do. body:
✅ Vote for Ryan Chamberlin | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/voteryanchamberlin/conservative-businessman-ryan-chamberlin-321865?e=d1c1b9864f)
---
| |
---
| | | **ELECTION DAY IS TOMORROW!**
---
| **Friends,**

**Tomorrow is Election Day for District 24! I have run a clean race during my campaign, despite the attacks from my left-leaning opponents!** _I have stuck to my principles of Faith, Family, and Freedom and made that my platform because I know we are all tired of mud-slinging campaigns that try to tear apart a person's reputation._

This election is vital to District 24 and the State of Florida! **Why?** **Because liberal dollars are trying to win this seat and put into place a Biden ally who will side with his policies and agenda! ** These _special interest groups want to take away your rights as a parent, your right to bear arms, and your right to raise your children according to your beliefs._ **We can't let that happen.**

When you head to the polls tomorrow and cast your vote, please remember that I am the only true Ron DeSantis Conservative! I will stand with him, defend your rights and freedoms, and continue to make Florida a shining example to the Nation of what True Leadership can accomplish! Sincerely,

**_Ryan Chamberlin
Candidate for Florida House District 24_**

name: Scott Peters
subject: It’s time to expand affordable housing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Peters for Congress
body:
---
| | Peter,

Last year, I introduced the Fair Housing Improvement Act of 2022 to combat housing discrimination and expand access to affordable housing. My bill would add “source of income” and “veteran status” to the list of protected classes under the Fair Housing Act.

Housing insecurity still permeates communities across the country, and that’s why I will soon reintroduce this important legislation. I’m continuing to fight against housing discrimination and ensure that every American has access to safe and affordable housing.

The Fair Housing Improvement Act will help veterans and low-income families facing the increasingly high cost of rent – hard-working people who desperately need our help. The time to act is right now.

[Congress must ensure equitable access to affordable housing and fight back against housing discrimination. Add your name if you agree:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59778740/395049536/-1945842787?refcode2=20999b5d-65bc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&refcode=SP_EM_PT_WL_230306_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODA2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDk5OWI1ZC02NWJjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0Cpz1mR6lG7VjfRv3iAKQdb4zRk4cBmsd9Y2zMp0rbU=&emci=f5184a76-63bc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=20999b5d-65bc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=5258741) | | **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59778741/395049537/-1945842787?refcode2=20999b5d-65bc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&refcode=SP_EM_PT_WL_230306_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODA2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDk5OWI1ZC02NWJjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0Cpz1mR6lG7VjfRv3iAKQdb4zRk4cBmsd9Y2zMp0rbU=&emci=f5184a76-63bc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=20999b5d-65bc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=5258741)**

name: Greg Casar
subject: “A Smokescreen of right-wing conspiracy theories”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GREG CASAR FOR CONGRESS
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59778782/395049697/1120393829?refcode=em-wrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDI0ODllZC02NWJjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VQElsx69QdtrlOJHZ-tNQPndgkxiF-ed7EEA_JMy9Q0=&emci=7fb76ae7-65bc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=902489ed-65bc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=6830379)
Peter,

**As a former labor organizer, I know that joining a union should be a RIGHT, not a fight.**

That’s why, alongside my colleagues, we are reintroducing the _**Protecting the Right to Organize (PRO) Act**_. This historic bill would restore the right of workers to freely form a union by protecting against union busting activity and helping workers bargain for changes in their workplace.

By restoring union rights, we drastically reduce inequality in America. With your help, we can make a strong push to make the PRO Act the law. **[Can you chip in $10, or whatever you can, today to help me and my team fight for workers’ rights and protections in Congress? Your support makes a big difference as we take on this fight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59778783/395049698/-733383820?refcode=em-20230303&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDI0ODllZC02NWJjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VQElsx69QdtrlOJHZ-tNQPndgkxiF-ed7EEA_JMy9Q0=)**

****[Donate »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59778784/395049699/-733383820?refcode=em-20230303&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDI0ODllZC02NWJjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VQElsx69QdtrlOJHZ-tNQPndgkxiF-ed7EEA_JMy9Q0=)****
---

**Peter,** **did you know that a majority of workers in the U.S. want to join a union—but only about 10% are currently union members?**

That’s because Congress hasn’t passed legislation guaranteeing many of the rights and protections that are in the PRO Act. Here are just a few of the important parts of the PRO Act:
* **It bans union busting** and closed door meetings where executives threaten workers against joining a union

* **It gets rid of “right to work for less” laws** in places like Texas that hurt unions’ financial ability to protect their workers

* **It requires that employers come to the negotiating table** after workers unionize to sign a contract raising wages and improving benefits

Bills like the PRO Act are one of the reasons I ran for Congress in the first place. If we truly want to tackle income inequality, boost wages for our workers, and build a more competitive workforce, we must push for bills like this.

Help me and my team get it done – **[chip in $10, or whatever you can, to support our work to pass the PRO Act and support our nation’s workers.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59778785/395049700/-733383820?refcode=em-20230303&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDI0ODllZC02NWJjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VQElsx69QdtrlOJHZ-tNQPndgkxiF-ed7EEA_JMy9Q0=)**

Thank you,
Greg

_Congressman Greg Casar
Texas Congressional District 35_

clean_body: Peter, As a former labor organizer, I know that joining a union should be a RIGHT, not a fight. That’s why, alongside my colleagues, we are reintroducing the Protecting the Right to Organize (PRO) Act. This historic bill would restore the right of workers to freely form a union by protecting against union busting activity and helping workers bargain for changes in their workplace. By restoring union rights, we drastically reduce inequality in America. With your help, we can make a strong push to make the PRO Act the law. = **= Peter, did you know that a majority of workers in the U.S. want to join a union—but only about 10% are currently union members? That’s because Congress hasn’t passed legislation guaranteeing many of the rights and protections that are in the PRO Act. Here are just a few of the important parts of the PRO Act: It bans union busting and closed door meetings where executives threaten workers against joining a union It gets rid of “right to work for less” laws in places like Texas that hurt unions’ financial ability to protect their workers It requires that employers come to the negotiating table after workers unionize to sign a contract raising wages and improving benefits Bills like the PRO Act are one of the reasons I ran for Congress in the first place. If we truly want to tackle income inequality, boost wages for our workers, and build a more competitive workforce, we must push for bills like this. Help me and my team get it done – = Thank you, Greg Congressman Greg Casar Texas Congressional District 35 **=** | ****** ---|---

We started fighting for working people through direct democracy in 2016 when we secured our first set of ballot measure victories, including minimum wage increases in Colorado, D.C., and Maine, along with paid sick leave and minimum wage wins in Arizona and Washington. **Since then, we’ve won in states all over the country,_in both red states and blue ones_ , on a range of issues from Medicaid expansion to ending predatory payday lending.**
**One of our biggest impacts, however, has been in the battle for reproductive rights.** Last November, we helped voters in Michigan and Vermont make history by winning the first-ever ballot measures to restore the protections of _Roe v. Wade_ and protect abortion rights _for good_. With these victories, we showed everyone that using ballot measures is a surefire way to defend our reproductive freedom.
[**But our work’s far from over, team. There are still 10 states where a ballot measure campaign could restore abortion protections after the fall of _Roe_. We need to be ready for the fights ahead in 2023 and 2024. clean_body: NPR just published a feature on our work at Fairness Project highlighting the success of our ballot measure campaigns! | | Have you seen this, friend? NPR just published a feature on our work at Fairness Project highlighting the success of our ballot measure campaigns! = This is huge, team. As we continue to rack up progressive wins at the ballot box across the country, the national press is finally starting to pay attention. We’re so proud of how far we’ve come – but we can’t get complacent. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to the Fairness Project will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = We started fighting for working people through direct democracy in 2016 when we secured our first set of ballot measure victories, including minimum wage increases in Colorado, D.C., and Maine, along with paid sick leave and minimum wage wins in Arizona and Washington. Since then, we’ve won in states all over the country,in both red states and blue ones , on a range of issues from Medicaid expansion to ending predatory payday lending. One of our biggest impacts, however, has been in the battle for reproductive rights. Last November, we helped voters in Michigan and Vermont make history by winning the first-ever ballot measures to restore the protections of Roe v. Wade and protect abortion rights for good. With these victories, we showed everyone that using ballot measures is a surefire way to defend our reproductive freedom. = = Thank you, Fairness Project Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, our team at the Fairness Project has won 31 people-powered ballot measure campaigns since 2016, changing over 18 million lives by expanding health care, raising wages, guaranteeing paid leave, and ending predatory lending directly at the ballot box when politicians refuse to act. Your support allows us to make this progress possible.** = = Contributions or gifts to the Fairness Project are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. The 2022 Midterm Elections were one of the toughest battles we've seen**, but the worst has yet to come. **

**The Democrats are prepared to pull out all the stops to attempt to stop us from implementing sound Conservative policies, and worse yet, they 're going to try to stop us from taking back the White House. **

**Now more than ever before, we need you to STAY on our team,_[but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2dcd22cd8b764ab88c5f3b547f81d65a&_e=Wzcs_ymvbDTJrn1rl4Y9XOmU6vwxM0DFOFHXNJ5gJxRKALPeeUWxipUJvqYG1UyHnf-lxDfwkpC_Idh68EMWMmwpFAu6hxn82dIgTEBrXMP1uMA6s8EwS5sBKOnDE7u3k8oJK1ew3ds9yL5bOL0mm3l9XJX3vt_Os7AOhQW3YcSVTDP3oXodkifV0_kfaV3PjjOEyly2NPApkbz7N4IslckeKYGvIo7j1t0-1PmwXmCYnHzyliML9Ujpj6JCDMv6vrUKgJ90Efeu50V9FVYWA0XBeF3F30Zce5aywGRSpuxXrMoiBdrZgZz68zczCoJhKFORaDtwfL9zL6KEBmuruqqMMDRlzgU3e9Crr9K3jlNbaAoRKtU6weKC5OBks9f1FsK7Qn96yXGbm2EAt0BdueiI7CM2uXFweeP1MR48hdJVX4f0Zkp9-LUgJaAGLIVV "but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership.")_**

Friend, for the last **3 years** , you have stood by House Republicans' side. You've supported the Conservative fight furiously and consistently through every battle we've seen,**but we have bad news for you. **

**It pains me to tell you that for the first time ever, you 've failed to renew your Republican Membership and have lost your support streak.**

There's good news though, Friend. We've come a long way since 25 women and I gathered in my basement to found EMILYs List back in 1985. Since then, we've helped elect 175 Democratic pro-choice women to the House, 26 to the Senate, 20 to governors' seats, and over 1,500 to state and local office.

None of this would have been possible without dedicated supporters like you who share our commitment to protecting reproductive rights for all.

**So as we celebrate Women's History Month and all of our candidates who have broken barriers and ushered in progressive change, we have put together a timeline of our work over these nearly four decades. We hope you'll take a look now:**

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Colorado
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59779783/395053585/-1313129971?refcode=X_030623_Tim_Kaine_Tandem&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZDkzYzgzYi02YWJjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H0kTmaUXIlYk1isq9gjA8m6QB8r_cyLReqkVugNKDIk=) Folks, I feel so lucky to be marking my 65th birthday, and I'm writing to you today with a request to help celebrate this milestone. **Right now I’m ramping up my re-election campaign, and my team could really use your support:[Will you split a donation of $20 or any amount that’s meaningful to you between ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59779785/395053587/1054253659?refcode=X_030623_Tim_Kaine_Tandem&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZDkzYzgzYi02YWJjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H0kTmaUXIlYk1isq9gjA8m6QB8r_cyLReqkVugNKDIk=)[Senator Michael Bennet**** and my campaign today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59779787/395053589/-1313129971?refcode=X_030623_Tim_Kaine_Tandem&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZDkzYzgzYi02YWJjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H0kTmaUXIlYk1isq9gjA8m6QB8r_cyLReqkVugNKDIk=)** Birthdays are often a time to reflect on our accomplishments — and think about what lies ahead. I’m incredibly proud of the many things I’ve been able to accomplish during my career of public service — some just in the past couple of years: We’ve lowered the costs of both health care and energy with the _Inflation Reduction Act_. We made the biggest commitment to infrastructure since the Interstate Highway System Initiative in the Eisenhower Administration with the bipartisan infrastructure bill. We brought back American manufacturing jobs with the _CHIPS Act_. We protected marriage equality with the _Respect for Marriage Act_. And we passed the first major federal legislation in decades that will tackle the scourge of gun violence. **But there is so much still to be done.[Can you help by splitting an online contribution right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59779789/395053592/1054253659?refcode=X_030623_Tim_Kaine_Tandem&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZDkzYzgzYi02YWJjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H0kTmaUXIlYk1isq9gjA8m6QB8r_cyLReqkVugNKDIk=)** Because we need more skilled workers, we should invest in job training, provide more affordable high-quality child care, and find a path to a work-based immigration reform bill. We need to expand access to mental health services, to battle addiction, and bring down health care costs for all. We need to fight for fundamental liberties, including the freedom to make your own reproductive decisions and the right to vote. Virginia’s natural bounty — air, water, open space — needs protection from threats including climate change. And in a world with threats to democracies at home and abroad, we need a national security strategy that keeps us safe while building up the capacity of the U.S. and our allies to link arms against global threats of all kinds. [**These challenges are exactly why I’m seeking re-election to the U.S. Senate in 2024. Will you help make sure I get there by splitting a donation with Michael Bennet and my campaign today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59779791/395053593/1054253659?refcode=X_030623_Tim_Kaine_Tandem&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZDkzYzgzYi02YWJjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H0kTmaUXIlYk1isq9gjA8m6QB8r_cyLReqkVugNKDIk=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Tim Kaine & Michael Bennet will go through immediately:_ | | | ******[Donate $10 now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59779794/395053596/1054253659?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZDkzYzgzYi02YWJjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H0kTmaUXIlYk1isq9gjA8m6QB8r_cyLReqkVugNKDIk=)******

As a Senator, my priority is to deliver for ALL Virginians. To listen to my constituents' thoughts and concerns, and to work across the aisle to solve the problems that keep us up at night. _Because in a divided government, we need to work with Democrats and Republicans to get things done._
**My friends, we’ve got a big fight ahead of us, and we can’t take a single thing for granted. **
But if we work together, we can protect our Democratic majority in the Senate, we can help elect more Democrats all the way down the ballot throughout the Commonwealth, and we can secure victories for Virginians and all Americans.
[**Please split a donation today to help support my campaign for re-election so we can continue to lead with solutions, not stunts.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59779804/395053608/1054253659?refcode=X_030623_Tim_Kaine_Tandem&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZDkzYzgzYi02YWJjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H0kTmaUXIlYk1isq9gjA8m6QB8r_cyLReqkVugNKDIk=)

clean_body: | = Folks, I feel so lucky to be marking my 65th birthday, and I'm writing to you today with a request to help celebrate this milestone. Right now I’m ramping up my re-election campaign, and my team could really use your support:= Birthdays are often a time to reflect on our accomplishments — and think about what lies ahead. I’m incredibly proud of the many things I’ve been able to accomplish during my career of public service — some just in the past couple of years: We’ve lowered the costs of both health care and energy with the Inflation Reduction Act. We made the biggest commitment to infrastructure since the Interstate Highway System Initiative in the Eisenhower Administration with the bipartisan infrastructure bill. We brought back American manufacturing jobs with the CHIPS Act. We protected marriage equality with the Respect for Marriage Act. And we passed the first major federal legislation in decades that will tackle the scourge of gun violence. But there is so much still to be done.= Because we need more skilled workers, we should invest in job training, provide more affordable high-quality child care, and find a path to a work-based immigration reform bill. We need to expand access to mental health services, to battle addiction, and bring down health care costs for all. We need to fight for fundamental liberties, including the freedom to make your own reproductive decisions and the right to vote. Virginia’s natural bounty — air, water, open space — needs protection from threats including climate change. And in a world with threats to democracies at home and abroad, we need a national security strategy that keeps us safe while building up the capacity of the U.S. and our allies to link arms against global threats of all kinds. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Tim Kaine & Michael Bennet will go through immediately: | | | ****=** | **=** | | **=** | **=** | | **=** | **=** As a Senator, my priority is to deliver for ALL Virginians. To listen to my constituents' thoughts and concerns, and to work across the aisle to solve the problems that keep us up at night. Because in a divided government, we need to work with Democrats and Republicans to get things done. My friends, we’ve got a big fight ahead of us, and we can’t take a single thing for granted. But if we work together, we can protect our Democratic majority in the Senate, we can help elect more Democrats all the way down the ballot throughout the Commonwealth, and we can secure victories for Virginians and all Americans. = Thanks so much! Tim Kaine Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States | mailto:info@michaelbennet.com | Paid for by Bennet for Colorado ** By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

name: Team Cori
subject: We demand student debt relief NOW.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
No one should have to have their wages garnished because they pursued higher education
#
This month, Cori stood on the steps of the Supreme Court alongside progressive policymakers, advocates — and most importantly — borrowers being crushed by the burden of student loan debt.
**We want to share her powerful words with you:**
> _“As a nurse and a single mother, raising two children, my paycheck barely covered my monthly expenses before my loans were taken out. I struggled to put food on the table. I risked eviction every single month so a multimillion-dollar corporation — the student loan servicer — including MOHELA themselves could make an extra few hundred dollars out of my paycheck a month?_
> _So when I defaulted on my loans because my expenses were higher than my wages, my income taxes were garnished. For several years, I was left to raise my two babies without receiving the tax benefits needed to help keep them clothed and fed and housed. No one — not anyone — should have to have their wages or their taxes garnished because they pursued a higher education._
> **_You shouldn’t have to choose between student debt, or investing in your future._ **
> **_You shouldn’t have to choose between student debt or furthering your education._ **
> **_You shouldn’t have to choose between student debt or going to school at all._**
> **_The President has the legal authority to cancel student debt. We demand that debt relief and we demand it now._**
> _The Supreme Court must see through the falsehoods and look at the facts. Look outside, look at our faces, hear our cries. We, on behalf of the over forty million plus federal student loan borrowers, we demand the Supreme Court upholds the law — and not the fabrications of the far right._
> _We know that 1.7 trillion dollar debt crisis won’t solve itself but we the borrowers, we the advocates, we the policymakers, we the organizers, we the activists, we the regular everyday folks of this country, we are united and we are ready to push and push and push until we get that delivered and get it delivered now.”_
**[Cori will _never_ stop fighting for the millions of people impacted by student loan debt. You can help us amplify her message with a contribution today.](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230306.DBap9-&refcode=em20230306-2286&t=1&akid=2286%2E1082990%2E-I6t0h)**
**[Chip in $5](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230306.DBap9-&refcode=em20230306-2286&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=2286%2E1082990%2E-I6t0h)**
Thank you,
Team Cori

**[Contribute ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cori-em-20230306?refcode=em20230306-2286-footer&t=21&refcode2=2286_1082990_-I6t0h&akid=2286%2E1082990%2E-I6t0h) **
---
Follow us on **[Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/VoteCoriBush/)** , **[Twitter](https://twitter.com/CoriBush)** , **[Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/coribush/)** , and **[visit our website](https://coribush.org/)**. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Mail us: Cori Bush for Congress, 75 North Oaks Plaza, St. Louis, MO 63121.
Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress

| | |

| | **Social Security is a lifeline for MILLIONS.

[**That’s why I am asking you to add your name now to urge Congress to protect Social Security!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59780033/395054560/-522013986?code=jtk988-su-nd&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=http%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2FLJ4NY23-social-security-0323%3F&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NGJiMjVmMi02YWJjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0of-YKzgSF79jNFpzaFYpLokdsb_jY5N7zjTiG4iNrE=&emci=9e4e44c5-d4b9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=64bb25f2-6abc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=25369504)**

Peter, this is urgent: Extremist Republicans have announced a plan that would open Social Security up to SEVERE cuts – a move that would harm the nearly 67 million Americans who receive Social Security checks every month – including more than 3.7 million New Yorkers.

**Here’s everything you need to know about the latest developments in our fight to protect Social Security:**
**_FIRST_** , Republicans across the country began to put Medicare, Medicaid, and Social Security on the chopping block.

**_THEN_** , in a heated exchange during the State of the Union, President Biden got Republican lawmakers to agree NOT to touch Social Security benefits in the next round of budget cuts.

**_NOW_** , I’m calling on 5,000 fearless fighters to join me in urging Congress to stay true to their word and protect Social Security.
**I’ll be honest, Peter: I’ve seen Republican lawmakers go back on their word _dozens_ of times. **But, with nearly 3.7 MILLION New Yorkers currently depending on Social Security benefits, we CANNOT let them go back on their word.

**This isn’t about politics. This is about _real people_ who could fall into poverty if Republicans gut Social Security. So I have to ask: [Will you sign my petition now to urge Congress to protect Social Security? I need to collect 5,000 signatures before 11:59 p.m. tonight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59780035/395054562/-522013986?code=jtk988-su-nd&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=http%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2FLJ4NY23-social-security-0323%3F&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NGJiMjVmMi02YWJjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0of-YKzgSF79jNFpzaFYpLokdsb_jY5N7zjTiG4iNrE=&emci=9e4e44c5-d4b9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=64bb25f2-6abc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=25369504)**
| | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59780036/395054563/-522013986?code=jtk988-su-nd&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=http%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2FLJ4NY23-social-security-0323%3F&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NGJiMjVmMi02YWJjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0of-YKzgSF79jNFpzaFYpLokdsb_jY5N7zjTiG4iNrE=&emci=9e4e44c5-d4b9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=64bb25f2-6abc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=25369504)

Thank you for standing with me.

Letitia

name: 2A Task Force
subject: The fight isn’t over. The fight has only just begun.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 2nd Amendment Task Force [2ataskforce
body:
| |
---
|

I want to take a moment to explain why we’ve already started to gear up for 2024 and why your support today will go a long way.

I know we just finished a tough campaign not many months ago, and people are exhausted from politics and want a break. I get it too, but I’m not going to take a break delivering for the people of Ohio.

The truth is the National Republican Congressional Committee (NRCC) is already back attacking me and my record to try and flip this seat. If they win here, they will reverse any progress we’ve made in the last few years and take away any chance we have at retaking the House Majority in 2024.

name: JD Vance
subject: I wanted to catch up

body:
Hey, Peter, I hope you're doing well

| [](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=b97e9461c3b84680ba9c3b869bdd0716&_e=uFgZZfyz6W-DHkh1XumEvWS7DS1Eb6yr0UQ59uy-cqW7jFTFN_jUuUYTfz2pImqNrZ73POSj8olBBKbZ1NJlmYNSwz0C06JEDX_DmXPLMJ4gzXINL5OUSIZ6pDyt59QNt1-SiU3682FtzzDUW1lzNMTJgfE1zJNjVY453Kw30rCWP943eChUHFzfxA6ii14pIiQTVv_Wrxnbh-J6Dz67R5gicZLFy-C1TdLi9krqrU3fnSQzMKdbA__IV8_xzYCrC-94W5tCpH11Qd2nJvvib8BNExZO5IV9m88uEPxpHvhD61zujNHyJi76wyRQeMXBTq-7IzaXRd6bpa4Pa4JDJYdyTgyLCMpRlAKk7j7woB7PHV6cUBnfz-KEEfDZQwYLjvPEaD05liVbhXhUlvNpp89SESvRxMOXiLcvZVlod_mZMkUILdcpACe9BMqme_ogAn8cixR00g4jRR5DKJiIA-4op6N_0_CvRC39_IzZjhqxlOo908SL8PivEi8WiYBNZRVbxT7qqdmfOSC9ydaYoDDLE3F3wLk9fNqCeKldIRwBemwegD-PIqlNwUtdP_he)
---
Hi Peter,

I've been on the road non-stop since before the election; I feel like I haven't had a chance to introduce myself properly.

I was born and raised in Ohio, and while I didn't have the easiest upbringing, it taught me a lot. I'm no stranger to hardship, but I found early on that my love for my country was the driving force in my life. I knew that I had to give back to my country in the best way possible by joining the Marines and serving in Iraq. After this experience, **I no longer took most things in my life for granted because I saw these freedoms taken away firsthand.** I also learned the importance of patriotism, respect, and perseverance.

After serving this great nation, I returned to Ohio and founded a business, where I very quickly learned how countries like China were stealing our jobs and hurting our workers. This career path emphasized what I learned in the military about dedication and hard work. Seriously, owning a business when every Democrat is after you is no joke.

I decided to run for Senate in Ohio because I knew that this was lacking in the US government. Our elected officials have failed to protect us, and I won't let that happen any longer. I won because you trusted my mission and my character. **I won 't let you down.**

I'm so honored to have your support, Peter. Knowing you had my back through one of the craziest adventures of my life was all I needed to make it worth the fight. I'm looking forward to representing the values you and I hold dearly in the U.S. Senate in these upcoming years. I want to protect my fellow Ohioans and Americans, and I hope you have my back on this journey. | [**STAND WITH ME** ](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=b97e9461c3b84680ba9c3b869bdd0716&_e=uFgZZfyz6W-DHkh1XumEvWS7DS1Eb6yr0UQ59uy-cqW7jFTFN_jUuUYTfz2pImqNrZ73POSj8olBBKbZ1NJlmYNSwz0C06JEDX_DmXPLMJ4gzXINL5OUSIZ6pDyt59QNt1-SiU3682FtzzDUW1lzNMTJgfE1zJNjVY453Kw30rCWP943eChUHFzfxA6ii14pIiQTVv_Wrxnbh-J6Dz67R5gicZLFy-C1TdLi9krqrU3fnSQzMKdbA__IV8_xzYCrC-94W5tCpH11Qd2nJvvib8BNExZO5IV9m88uEPxpHvhD61zujNHyJi76wyRQeMXBTq-7IzaXRd6bpa4Pa4JDJYdyTgyLCMpRlAKk7j7woB7PHV6cUBnfz-KEEfDZQwYLjvPEaD05liVbhXhUlvNpp4bJgEVm5wEN47shzNEAQtuP0SiS8_FJYmZH6cJhu3QjRCMLQcV3hHuvU4M1tr2N47sv2bTRnHz8HpDvx5Vxqesa1c42fNfy7H4hX1hwak2P-SgahvhBIiKCfkLCQBf-DbY0qRdhTHKfaJNGH4CLcGTZ_9gJtvr-FfsquFJQ1-I7)
---

Thank you,

JD Vance

**Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author.**
Ohio needs a true conservative in the U.S. Senate. It needs someone who understands how our
economic and government leaders conspire to make life harder for normal Americans.
Ohio needs JD Vance.

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: Huge news on reproductive freedom
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN
body:
| | |
---
Friend, this is huge news: **A coalition of reproductive freedom advocates just took action to put abortion rights on the ballot in Ohio – a move that would give Ohio voters the chance to enshrine the right to abortion in the Ohio Constitution and protect it from attacks by anti-abortion legislators and judges for generations to come. **

I'm proud to support this work, but this effort needs our help to make sure the amendment can successfully get on the ballot, so I hope you'll show your support today, too: **[If you believe in this cause, will you donate $5 or more now – split between Ohioans for Reproductive Freedom and our campaign – to help restore abortion rights in our state? I know this is a fight we can win with your support.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59782042/395061219/2061827178?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk28-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYWMwZDk1NS03M2JjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bfTuov8oc5V7F30TwFzY9HyTwBHGj_V5cJZdd8Vej80=)**
Ever since the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade, more than a dozen GOP-led states have banned abortion – and there are a heck of a lot more trying to follow suit. Here in Ohio, extreme politicians are currently litigating a six-week abortion ban that makes the procedure illegal before many people even know they’re pregnant.
I've spoken to Ohioans and health care providers about how restrictive abortion laws affect them. They force clinics to close their doors. They put the health of women and girls at risk. They take away women’s freedom to make their own health care decisions – and put those decisions in the hands of politicians.
**We’ve seen pro-choice majorities succeed in other states when abortion access is on the ballot. Now it’s time for Ohioans to get that same chance to make our voices heard – ****and with your**** grassroots support from the start we can ensure it will succeed.**
**[Please, friend, donate $5 or more now – split between Ohioans for Reproductive Freedom and our campaign – to fuel our statewide effort to get abortion rights on the ballot.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59782043/395061220/2061827178?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk28-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYWMwZDk1NS03M2JjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bfTuov8oc5V7F30TwFzY9HyTwBHGj_V5cJZdd8Vej80=)**

clean_body: | | | Friend, this is huge news: A coalition of reproductive freedom advocates just took action to put abortion rights on the ballot in Ohio – a move that would give Ohio voters the chance to enshrine the right to abortion in the Ohio Constitution and protect it from attacks by anti-abortion legislators and judges for generations to come. I'm proud to support this work, but this effort needs our help to make sure the amendment can successfully get on the ballot, so I hope you'll show your support today, too: = Ever since the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade, more than a dozen GOP-led states have banned abortion – and there are a heck of a lot more trying to follow suit. Here in Ohio, extreme politicians are currently litigating a six-week abortion ban that makes the procedure illegal before many people even know they’re pregnant. I've spoken to Ohioans and health care providers about how restrictive abortion laws affect them. They force clinics to close their doors. They put the health of women and girls at risk. They take away women’s freedom to make their own health care decisions – and put those decisions in the hands of politicians. We’ve seen pro-choice majorities succeed in other states when abortion access is on the ballot. Now it’s time for Ohioans to get that same chance to make our voices heard – and with your grassroots support from the start we can ensure it will succeed. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be split between Ohioans for Reproductive Freedom and Sherrod Brown: | | | = | | = | | = | | = With gratitude, Sherrod | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Susie Lee
subject: As we celebrate Women’s History Month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susie Lee for Congress
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59782219/395061945/-1839819742?refcode=lee_headerlogo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYmQ1YzM5Ny03NGJjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=feRQpxMThMUgJqsQg-CwqPWe9Od_YsGGxHe6QcV9wCY=)

| | Folks — As we celebrate Women’s History Month, I’m reminded of the countless women in my life who have inspired and shaped me into the person I am today. From an early age, my mother instilled in me the importance of working hard and being thankful for what you have. I saw her and my father navigate some of life’s most difficult hurdles while raising us kids – _all eight of us!_ Being a mother is one of the greatest joys in my life. For those of you who are parents, you’ll understand when I say that it’s always been my goal to ensure that my kids grow up with the same rights and privileges that I did. However, as reproductive rights remain under attack, I’m determined to follow the footsteps of the activists and trailblazers who came before me. I’m doubling down on my fight for reproductive rights for my daughter and women across Nevada. As I continue my work to serve the people across Nevada’s Third District, it’s strong women that I look up to for guidance along the way. And did you know that Nevada has a majority-female congressional delegation? I’m proud to serve alongside Dina Titus, Jacky Rosen, and Catherine Cortez Masto as we fight for working families across the Silver State. I’m so grateful for the women in my life who have helped guide me to being the best mother and public servant I can be. Wishing you a reflective Women’s History Month, Susie Lee
---
