body:
I am proud to be the first woman ever to lead BOLD PAC and continue their work of expanding Hispanic representation in Congress.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59782250/395062092/-367193230?refcode=BLU-SAN-20230306-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTk0YzFiNy03NGJjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cHsbiPLkwzZpS_vBhXTiwlyoMlVBhZDvukSWkkuyAbs=)
---
| Peter,

I am proud to be the first woman ever to lead BOLD PAC, the campaign arm of the Congressional Hispanic Caucus, and continue their work of expanding Hispanic representation in Congress.

Growing up one of seven children, I saw my parents’ tireless work to provide for us and set us up for a bright future. Despite not having graduated high school themselves, they made sure all seven of us became first-generation college graduates. Thanks to their sacrifices, I learned the importance of dedication, hard work, and community – values I still uphold today.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59782251/395062093/-367193230?refcode=BLU-SAN-20230306-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTk0YzFiNy03NGJjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cHsbiPLkwzZpS_vBhXTiwlyoMlVBhZDvukSWkkuyAbs=)
As a first-generation college graduate, I was confronted with many of the same barriers that impede the Hispanic community from running for office. As the new Chair of the BOLD PAC, I will fight to ensure Latinos and Latinas across the US feel empowered to run and have the resources they need to win. And as many of our fundamental rights, including voting access and reproductive freedom, come under attack, we must have a Congress that represents ALL of us.

In 2022, we helped elect nine new Democratic Latinos to Congress. As we work to take back the majority, it’s clear that the Democratic House majority runs through BOLD PAC. I’m so excited to see what we can accomplish together.

[_**Will you make your first contribution to my campaign help elect Democrats across the country? body:
The National Republican Senatorial Committee will spend whatever it takes in key swing states – including Ohio – to try and flip the Senate in 2024.
| **_AP News_ : GOP leaders, stung by losses, plan to wade into Senate races**
**[Rush a split donation to Senator Sherrod Brown and the Ohio Democratic Party to help defend this crucial Senate seat.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59782324/395062367/365275985?refcode=em23_230306_sbtand_fndt_gq_act___ODP_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230306_sbtand_fndt_gq_act___ODP_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYmZiNGI2ZS03NWJjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=grGM2kZcKrTfv-Eiepvk4PwbAQ8AjBdU7ewMZ3Lzo7o=)** | [CHIP IN →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59782325/395062370/365275985?refcode=em23_230306_sbtand_fndt_gq_act___ODP_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230306_sbtand_fndt_gq_act___ODP_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYmZiNGI2ZS03NWJjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=grGM2kZcKrTfv-Eiepvk4PwbAQ8AjBdU7ewMZ3Lzo7o=)
---
Team,

The National Republican Senatorial Committee will spend whatever it takes in key swing states – _including Ohio_ – to try and flip the Senate in 2024.

Since Sherrod Brown announced he’s running to represent Ohio for another term, National Republicans and dark money groups are gearing up to pour **tens of millions** into Ohio trying to unseat him.

Sherrod is a champion for working families and a leading proponent of American manufacturing who has stood up for workers, small businesses, and entrepreneurs for decades. We can't risk losing his leadership in the Senate, _and he'll need our help to fight back._

**[Will you join us in helping to defend Sherrod's seat in 2024 by making a split donation right away? name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: ‘Fumbling the bag’
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

New York Democrats really ‘fumbled the bag’ this last cycle:

[1]The New York Times: ‘The Democratic Party in New York Is a Disaster’

The Democratic Party in New York spent more time and energy fighting
progressives in the primaries than keeping seats in the generals. They
lost seats.

On the other hand, Justice Democrats have recruited and played a major
role in working to elect two progressives in New York City — Alexandria
Ocasio-Cortez and Jamaal Bowman. Maybe if New York Democrats focused more
on helping their candidates run successful campaigns like we do, instead
of tearing down progressives like former Justice Democrat Rana Abdelhamid,
the party wouldn’t be hemorrhaging critical seats.

We operate on a shoe-string budget and spend every single dollar that we
receive in the most effective way possible to elect progressive
candidates.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/129862?refcode=em20230306-27857&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=27857%2E1203867%2EW6xHCo ]Will you contribute $3 right now to help us continue to
elect progressives across the country? So much goes into recruiting
candidates and helping them win — unlike the Democratic Party of New York,
our success record speaks for itself.

We’ve accomplished so much in only a few years because of our grassroots
supporters. It all started with recruiting and helping to elect AOC. Then
we re-elected the Squad and powered upset victories for Cori Bush, Jamaal
Bowman, and Summer Lee. A powerful bloc fighting for the people is forming
in Congress, and we’re determined to grow it even more.

Unlike the Democratic establishment and the New York Democratic Party, we
will continue to fight to elect candidates who will actually fight for
policies that match the scale of the crises we face — and we’ll never
fumble the bag like New York Democratic Party leadership did last cycle.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/129862?refcode=em20230306-27857&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=27857%2E1203867%2EW6xHCo ]Please make your best gift right now to help us continue this work of
recruiting candidates and supporting their campaigns from day #1.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/129862?refcode=em20230306-27857&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=27857%2E1203867%2EW6xHCo ]Contribute $3

Thank you,
Team JD

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1022&akid=27857%2E1203867%2EW6xHCo ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1023&akid=27857%2E1203867%2EW6xHCo ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230306-27857-footer&t=1024&refcode2=27857_1203867_W6xHCo&akid=27857%2E1203867%2EW6xHCo

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=27857%2E1203867%2EW6xHCo

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Team Katie Porter
subject: A cockroach
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Nearly a fifth of all Members of Congress reported a stock trade with a possible conflict of interest
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=18906%2E3422442%2Eia-_km)
Derek,
**As of last fall, nearly a fifth of all Members of Congress reported a stock trade with a possible conflict of interest.[Katie’s leading the fight to stop this corruption, can you add your name to show your support?](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s_em_congress_ban_stocks/?source=em20230306-1&akid=18906%2E3422442%2Eia-_km)**
**[Sign Now ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s_em_congress_ban_stocks/?source=EMAF06_1_STO_20230306_V1_F&akid=18906%2E3422442%2Eia-_km)**
This isn’t just a Republican or a Democrat issue, leaders from _both sides_ are trading stocks related to the industries they oversee. It should be simple: Members who oversee environmental issues shouldn’t be trading Exxon Mobil stock, and Members who oversee the defense industry shouldn’t be trading Boeing or Lockheed Martin stock.
Katie has been leading efforts to pass legislation which would ban Members of Congress and their spouses from trading stocks, and **she’s determined to make sure the legislation has a real and serious penalty for breaking the law.**
**Congress is about as popular as a cockroach** , and Americans deserve to know their elected officials work for them, not their stock portfolio. Stopping this corruption will help restore people's trust in our government.
**[Sign on to our petition today to show your support for banning Members of Congress from trading stocks.](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s_em_congress_ban_stocks/?source=EMAF06_1_STO_20230306_V1_F&akid=18906%2E3422442%2Eia-_km)**
**[Sign Now ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s_em_congress_ban_stocks/?source=EMAF06_1_STO_20230306_V1_F&akid=18906%2E3422442%2Eia-_km)**
Onward,
Team Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAF06_1_STO_20230306_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=18906_3422442_ia-_km&akid=18906%2E3422442%2Eia-_km)**

clean_body: When we relaunched our 2023 membership drive, Democrats across the country stepped up to join this movement: | | | | | When we relaunched our 2023 membership drive, Democrats across the country stepped up to join this movement. And we want to see your name come through on ActBlue! Our grassroots members are the core of this movement, powering our work to build Democratic power seat-by-seat in state legislatures nationwide. With each new member joining this team, this movement grows stronger – and that momentum will power us to victories this year, in 2024, and beyond! But with this outpouring of support, our stock of membership cards is already running low – and we want you to be able to have a piece of this fight. That’s why we’re reaching out to you specifically: | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | With the support of our official membership team of 10,000+ Democrats from across the country, we’ve accomplished some HUGE wins this year.In fact, Democrats are undefeated in key special elections this year! But we can’t slow down now – Democrats are facing some must-win special elections in chambers where our margins are razor-thin, and we need to mobilize now , ahead of Virginia’s ultra-competitive elections this November. So we’re relying on Democrats like you to step up today and help power this fight. name: Ohioans for Reproductive Freedom
subject: URGENT: Extremists attacking reproductive freedom in Ohio
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
We have to secure the resources to protect abortion access for all Ohioans.
| | |
---
Hello,
**Recently, we filed language to put abortion rights on the ballot in Ohio _this year._ **
With Roe overturned and federal protections for abortion stripped away, codifying abortion access in Ohio is _critical_. Otherwise, extremist politicians will continue their attacks on reproductive freedom and bodily autonomy.
**Fortunately, we just got some good news: our petition to advance and protect abortion rights was officially certified and is one step closer to being on the ballot.**
Alarmingly but not surprisingly, extremists are _already_ fighting tooth and nail to stop this amendment from moving forward.
Make no mistake: with your help, we can stop these extremists: **[Please split a donation of $3 or more between Maggie Hassan’s campaign and Ohioans for Reproductive Freedom right now to make sure abortion is on the ballot in Ohio this year.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59782864/395064346/-1283990982?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2227-bu-nd&recurring=0&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDcwMzA5Zi03OWJjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L-ZYT2atiYHCaAz6swK9Z-WTrqmP1Cs-9hwXk_mDaJE=)**
**We have the momentum. Now, we have to secure the resources to protect abortion access for all Ohioans.**
Since you’re a top supporter of abortion rights, we’re coming to you directly. **[Chip in $3 or as much as you can TODAY to become a founding member of our movement. Your gift will be split between Maggie Hassan and Ohioans for Reproductive Freedom.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59782865/395064347/-1283990982?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2227-bu-nd&recurring=0&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDcwMzA5Zi03OWJjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L-ZYT2atiYHCaAz6swK9Z-WTrqmP1Cs-9hwXk_mDaJE=)**
Thank you for getting involved,
Ohioans for Reproductive Freedom

clean_body: Before we print yours, I wanted to make sure your card looks correct: | | Derek, we’re so excited about our Official 2023 DNC Member Cards, but you should know: Time is running out to claim your card. If your order isn’t received by March 31,you may not get a personalized card. Before we print yours, I wanted to make sure your card looks correct: | If that looks right, please donate $10 to claim your personalized Official 2023 DNC Member Card. I’ll make sure that it’s in our next shipment to grassroots donors! There are no off years at the DNC, Derek. Electing Democrats year after year means building the strongest party infrastructure we possibly can. And hiring organizers, empowering volunteers, and expanding our voter protection efforts isn’t cheap. So, I have to ask: Thanks, Erin Erin Conway Direct Mail and Telemarketing Director Democratic National Committee P.S. As a card-carrying member of the DNC, you’ll show your dedication to our party’s mission of fighting for a better, fairer, and brighter future -- and help elect Democrats nationwide. name: CaucusRoom
subject: China is Gearing Up!
body:
Did you see the results of the CPAC Straw Poll? No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-e-qkyyutd-trhiujldw-s/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkyyutd-trhiujldw-r/)
## **Happy Monday! Do you have friends or family that would enjoy CaucusRoom? Forward this newsletter to them and [ask them to join!](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkyyutd-trhiujldw-y/)**
[](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkyyutd-trhiujldw-j/) [Schedule a CaucusRoom Live demo today!](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkyyutd-trhiujldw-t/) **Results of the CPAC Straw Poll** Former President [**Trump won the Conservative Political Action Conference 's straw poll by a wide margin Saturday**](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkyyutd-trhiujldw-i/) -- proof, his supporters said, that he remains the GOP's formidable front-runner as the 2024 Republican primaries loom. **UK Says No to Illegals** **[Anyone arriving illegally in Britain will be prevented from staying](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkyyutd-trhiujldw-d/)** , Prime Minister Rishi Sunak said in an interview ahead of new legislation, which is expected to be set out next week. _Why can't the U.S. do this?_ **China is Gearing Up** **[China announced it will boost its military budget by nearly $230 billion](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkyyutd-trhiujldw-h/)** this year amid concerns it will launch an invasion of Taiwan. _Does this concern you?_ **FBI Plants on Jan 6th ** The FBI's Washington Field Office **[affirmed that there may have been"undercover officers" and "confidential human sources"](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkyyutd-trhiujldw-k/)** inside the Capitol on Jan. 6, 2021, according to whistleblower testimony. **Infringing On Freedom** Former Democratic Rep. **[Tulsi Gabbard ripped Democratic Party leaders Saturday over infringing upon Americans' freedom](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkyyutd-trhiujldw-u/)** in what she called a "blind pursuit of power." **Memo Leaked**
## The Biden administration acknowledged in a memo, accidentally leaked on Friday, [**that charging fossil fuel companies less to drill would provide "greater energy security"**](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkyyutd-trhiujldw-o/) despite its plans to hike royalty fees.

**Let****'s[ have a good laugh](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkyyutd-trhiujldw-x/)!**
* **[California Fleein](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkyyutd-trhiujldw-m/)** '.
* Rest in **[Peace](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkyyutd-trhiujldw-c/)**.
* This **[wins the internet](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkyyutd-trhiujldw-q/)**!
* The **[hard truth](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkyyutd-trhiujldw-a/)**.
